temperament.zh: 温柔安静、独立自主、不粘人但很忠诚，像一个优雅的英伦绅士/淑女
temperament.en: Gentle and calm, independent but loyal, like an elegant British gentleman/lady

diet.zh: 优质猫粮为主，可搭配煮熟的鸡胸肉、三文鱼。注意控制食量，英短容易发胖哦！
diet.en: Premium cat food as staple, supplemented with cooked chicken breast and salmon. Watch portions - British Shorthairs gain weight easily!

habitat.zh: 室内饲养即可，它们不喜欢太热的环境。给一个舒适的猫窝和猫爬架就够了
habitat.en: Indoor living is fine. They don't like heat. A cozy cat bed and cat tree are enough

appearance.zh: 圆脸圆眼圆身体，蓝灰色短毛最经典。整个猫就像一个毛绒绒的圆球，走路都有弹性
appearance.en: Round face, round eyes, round body. Blue-gray short hair is the most classic. They look like a fluffy ball bouncing when walking

history.zh: 据说由罗马人带到英国，有两千多年的历史。在维多利亚时代非常流行，是世界上最古老的猫品种之一
history.en: Believed to be brought to Britain by Romans over 2,000 years ago. Very popular in the Victorian era, one of the oldest cat breeds in the world

funFact.zh: 英短是emoji猫的原型之一哦！而且它们小时候特别调皮，长大了才会变安静，简直是猫咪界的「小时偷针大时偷金」😂
funFact.en: British Shorthairs are one of the original models for cat emojis! They're extra playful as kittens but calm down as adults - totally a case of 'a kitten today, a lazy loaf tomorrow' 😂

myths.zh: 民间说英短是「招财猫」的远亲，因为蓝灰色的毛色在中国传统中被认为能带来好运。还有人说养英短的人容易变「猫奴」，因为它们会用圆溜溜的大眼睛看着你，让你无法拒绝。
myths.en: Folklore says British Shorthairs are distant relatives of lucky cats because their blue-gray fur is considered auspicious in Chinese tradition. Some say owning one turns you into a cat servant because of their irresistible round eyes.

careTips.zh:
1. 每周梳毛1-2次就够了，短毛好打理
2. 注意体重管理，别让圆球变成椭圆球
3. 定期检查牙齿，英短容易有口腔问题
4. 多准备一些互动玩具，它们虽然安静但也需要运动
careTips.en:
1. Brush 1-2 times weekly, short hair is easy to manage
2. Weight management is key - don't let the ball become an oval
3. Regular dental checks, they're prone to mouth issues
4. Prepare interactive toys, even calm cats need exercise

temperament.zh: 超级温柔、非常粘人、喜欢跟着主人到处走。坐下的时候喜欢把两只前腿缩起来，像个小佛一样
temperament.en: Super gentle, very clingy, loves following their owner everywhere. Sits with front legs tucked in like a little Buddha

diet.zh: 需要特别注意骨骼健康，补充软骨素。选择高品质猫粮，避免高磷食物
diet.en: Pay special attention to bone health, supplement with chondroitin. Choose high-quality cat food, avoid high-phosphorus foods

habitat.zh: 室内饲养，保持温暖。软软的窝对它们的关节很重要
habitat.en: Indoor living, keep warm. Soft bedding is important for their joints

appearance.zh: 最标志性的就是那对折叠的小耳朵！圆圆的脸配上小折耳，看起来永远在卖萌。加上它们常坐着像佛陀一样的姿势，被称为「猫中弥勒佛」
appearance.en: Most iconic are the folded little ears! Round face with folded ears, always looking adorable. They often sit Buddha-style, earning the nickname 'Maitreya Buddha of cats'

history.zh: 1961年在苏格兰一个农场被发现，第一只折耳猫叫Susie。因为耳朵突变折叠而得名。传说看到第一只折耳猫的人都说「天哪这猫的耳朵是不是被什么东西压到了？」😂
history.en: Discovered in 1961 on a Scottish farm, the first folded-ear cat was named Susie. Named for the mutation that folds their ears. Legend says people who first saw one exclaimed 'OMG did something crush its ears?!' 😂

funFact.zh: 折耳猫其实是基因突变的产物，所有折耳猫都追溯到同一只祖先Susie！它们睡觉的时候也喜欢把耳朵藏起来，简直不要太可爱
funFact.en: Folded ears are actually a genetic mutation - all Scottish Folds trace back to one ancestor named Susie! They even hide their ears while sleeping, which is beyond adorable

myths.zh: 有人说折耳猫会「听不见」，这其实是谣言！它们听力完全正常。不过它们确实需要特别的健康关注，因为折耳基因和骨骼疾病有关联。
myths.en: Some say Scottish Folds are 'hard of hearing' - that's a myth! Their hearing is perfectly normal. However, they do need special health attention as the fold gene is linked to bone conditions.

careTips.zh:
1. ⚠️ 必须定期带去检查骨骼健康
2. 选择软骨保护型猫粮
3. 避免让它们跳太高的地方
4. 每年至少做一次全面体检
careTips.en:
1. ⚠️ Must have regular bone health checkups
2. Choose chondroitin-rich cat food
3. Avoid letting them jump too high
4. Annual comprehensive health exam minimum

temperament.zh: 活泼好动又通情达理，是猫界的「好学生」。既会玩又不会拆家，简直是完美室友
temperament.en: Lively and sensible, the 'good student' of cats. Plays well but doesn't destroy the house - the perfect roommate

diet.zh: 杂食性强，各种猫粮都能适应。适当补充一些肉食，保持营养均衡
diet.en: Very adaptable eater, handles various cat foods well. Supplement with some meat for balanced nutrition

habitat.zh: 适应能力超强，在哪里都能活得很开心。室内外都可以，但建议室内
habitat.en: Super adaptable, happy anywhere. Indoor or outdoor, but indoor is recommended

appearance.zh: 银色虎斑纹最经典，肌肉结实，看起来像穿了件条纹小西装的运动员
appearance.en: Silver tabby is the most classic, muscular build - looks like an athlete wearing a striped suit

history.zh: 最初是跟早期欧洲移民到美国的「工作猫」，专门抓老鼠。所以它们的身体素质特别好，可以说是猫界的特种兵
history.en: Originally 'working cats' that came to America with early European immigrants as mouse catchers. Excellent physical condition - the special forces of cats

funFact.zh: 美短的银虎斑纹看起来就像穿了件名牌西装，所以有人叫它们「猫界华尔街精英」💼
funFact.en: Their silver tabby pattern looks like wearing designer suits, so some call them the 'Wall Street elites of cats' 💼

myths.zh: 据说美短是最会「养家」的猫，因为祖上就是靠抓老鼠吃饭的。有人说养了美短之后家里再也没见过蟑螂——这倒很可能是真的！
myths.en: Rumor has it American Shorthairs are the best 'breadwinners' since their ancestors caught mice for a living. Some say after getting one, they never saw a cockroach again - this might actually be true!

careTips.zh:
1. 身体健康不易生病，但也要定期疫苗
2. 每周梳毛一次
3. 它们运动量大，多准备玩具和猫爬架
careTips.en:
1. Generally healthy but keep up with vaccinations
2. Brush weekly
3. High energy - prepare plenty of toys and cat trees

temperament.zh: 优雅高贵，安静得像个贵族。不急不躁，连伸懒腰都很有仪式感
temperament.en: Elegant and noble, quiet as royalty. Never rushed - even stretching is a ceremony

diet.zh: 需要特别注意眼部和皮肤护理。高品质长毛猫专用粮，多补充维生素
diet.en: Special attention to eye and skin care. Premium long-hair cat food with extra vitamins

habitat.zh: 室内饲养，需要凉爽干燥的环境。每天需要梳理毛发
habitat.en: Indoor living, needs cool dry environment. Daily grooming required

appearance.zh: 扁平的脸、长毛飘飘、大眼睛，像一只从童话书里走出来的毛绒玩具
appearance.en: Flat face, flowing long fur, big eyes - like a plush toy from a fairy tale

history.zh: 曾经是波斯帝国皇室的最爱，被誉为「猫中皇后」。16世纪被带到欧洲后，迅速成为各国王室的座上宾
history.en: Once the favorite of Persian imperial royalty, known as 'Queen of Cats'. After arriving in Europe in the 16th century, quickly became a favorite of royal courts everywhere

funFact.zh: 波斯猫一天能睡16个小时，是猫界的「睡美人」。有主人开玩笑说：「我家猫醒着的时间还没我午睡的时间长」😴
funFact.en: Persian cats can sleep 16 hours a day - the 'Sleeping Beauty' of cats. Owners joke: 'My cat is awake less time than I nap' 😴

myths.zh: 古代波斯传说中，波斯猫是沙漠精灵的朋友，拥有预知未来的能力。还有人相信波斯猫的蓝色眼睛能看到灵魂——不过这些都是美好传说啦！
myths.en: Ancient Persian legends say Persian cats were friends of desert spirits with the power to foresee the future. Some believed their blue eyes could see souls - though these are just beautiful legends!

careTips.zh:
1. 每天必须梳毛！长毛容易打结
2. 每天清洁眼睛分泌物
3. 注意呼吸道健康，扁脸猫容易呼吸困难
4. 夏天要防暑降温
careTips.en:
1. Daily brushing is a must! Long fur tangles easily
2. Clean eye discharge daily
3. Watch respiratory health - flat-faced cats can have breathing issues
4. Keep cool in summer

temperament.zh: 被称为「小狗猫」，因为它们像狗一样粘人。一抱起来就像布偶一样瘫软在你怀里，特别乖
temperament.en: Called 'puppy cats' because they're as clingy as dogs. Go limp like a ragdoll when held - super sweet

diet.zh: 体型大需要充足营养，选择大颗粒猫粮，补充蛋白质和钙质
diet.en: Large size needs plenty of nutrition. Choose large-kibble cat food, supplement protein and calcium

habitat.zh: 室内饲养，它们太信任人了，放出去容易被拐走！
habitat.en: Indoor only - they trust humans too much and might get 'catnapped' outside!

appearance.zh: 蓝色的眼睛像宝石，半长的毛发像丝绸，体型大得像个小雪豹。抱起来手感满分！
appearance.en: Sapphire blue eyes, silky semi-long fur, as big as a snow leopard. Feels amazing to hold!

history.zh: 1960年代在美国被培育出来。传说第一只布偶猫被车撞后变得特别粘人，然后就有了这个名字。不过这个传说有点惨…
history.en: Bred in 1960s America. Legend says the first Ragdoll became super clingy after being hit by a car, giving them their name. Though that's a bit tragic...

funFact.zh: 布偶猫是猫界的「软体动物」，因为抱起来真的像布偶一样全身瘫软。网友戏称它们为「猫界液态」，因为放在哪里就化成什么形状 🫠
funFact.en: Ragdolls are the 'soft-bodied animals' of cats because they literally go limp when held. Netizens call them 'liquid cats' because they melt into whatever shape you put them in 🫠

myths.zh: 有人说布偶猫不会感到疼痛，这完全是谣言！它们只是特别能忍，所以才叫「布偶」。
myths.en: Some say Ragdolls can't feel pain - completely false! They're just very tolerant, which is why they're called 'Ragdolls'.

careTips.zh:
1. 每周梳毛2-3次
2. 不要让它们单独在户外
3. 多陪它们玩，它们很需要陪伴
4. 注意心脏健康
careTips.en:
1. Brush 2-3 times weekly
2. Never leave them alone outdoors
3. Spend lots of time with them, they need companionship
4. Watch heart health

temperament.zh: 猫界的「话唠」，叫声独特且频繁。极其粘人、好奇心旺盛、智商高，被戏称为「猫中之狗」
temperament.en: The 'chatterbox' of cats, with unique and frequent vocalizations. Extremely clingy, curious, intelligent, nicknamed 'the dog of cats'

diet.zh: 代谢较快，需要高蛋白猫粮。少食多餐更好，体型偏瘦不爱胖
diet.en: Fast metabolism, needs high-protein cat food. Small frequent meals better, naturally lean

habitat.zh: 室内饲养，怕冷。暹罗猫极度依赖主人，不适合长时间独处
habitat.en: Indoor living, sensitive to cold. Extremely dependent on owner, not suited for long periods alone

appearance.zh: 奶油色的身体搭配深色的「重点色」脸部、耳朵、四肢和尾巴。蓝色的杏仁眼最为标志性，纤细优雅的身材
appearance.en: Cream body with dark 'point coloration' on face, ears, legs and tail. Blue almond eyes are iconic, slender elegant build

history.zh: 源自泰国皇室，曾是只有王室和贵族才能饲养的珍贵猫咪。19世纪后期被带到欧洲，立刻成为展览明星。是世界上最古老的猫咪品种之一
history.en: Originated from Thai royalty, only nobles could own them. Brought to Europe in the late 19th century, became an exhibition star. One of the oldest cat breeds

funFact.zh: 暹罗猫刚出生时全身雪白！重点色是随着温度逐渐显现的——体温低的部位（四肢、耳朵、尾巴）颜色更深。所以冬天暹罗猫会变得比夏天颜色更深哦！❄️
funFact.en: Siamese kittens are born completely white! Point coloration develops with temperature - cooler body parts get darker. So Siamese cats actually get darker in winter! ❄️

myths.zh: 古代暹罗传说中，暹罗猫是寺庙的守护者，去世高僧的灵魂会附身在皇家暹罗猫身上。还有一个说法是它们能带来好运，所以经常被作为贵重礼物赠送。
myths.en: Ancient Siamese legend says they were temple guardians, with souls of deceased monks entering royal cats. Another belief says they bring good luck, often given as precious gifts.

careTips.zh:
1. 需要大量陪伴，不适合经常出差的家庭
2. 提供高处的猫爬架，它们喜欢登高望远
3. 梳毛需求低，短毛好打理
4. 注意口腔健康，定期检查
careTips.en:
1. Needs lots of companionship, not for frequently traveling families
2. Provide tall cat trees, they love high vantage points
3. Low grooming needs, short hair
4. Watch dental health, regular checkups

temperament.zh: 温柔巨兽！虽然体型巨大但性格温和，像狗一样喜欢跟随主人。常被称为「温柔的巨人」
temperament.en: Gentle giant! Despite huge size, temperament is mild, follows owner like a dog. Often called 'gentle giant'

diet.zh: 体型大需要充足蛋白质和热量。选择大型猫专用粮，注意控制体重
diet.en: Large size needs ample protein and calories. Choose large breed cat food, watch weight

habitat.zh: 适应力强，室内外均可。但体型大需要较大空间和大型猫爬架
habitat.en: Adaptable, indoor or outdoor. But large size needs more space and large cat trees

appearance.zh: 猫界的「狮子王」，蓬松的长毛、大丛的耳朵毛、大圆爪子上有簇毛，还有标志性的大尾巴像羽毛扇
appearance.en: The 'Lion King' of cats, fluffy long fur, large ear tufts, tufted big paws, and signature large feather-like tail

history.zh: 美国最古老的本土猫品种之一，也是缅因州的州猫。名字来源于北美浣熊（raccoon），因为它们蓬松的尾巴和浣熊很像。关于起源有很多民间传说
history.en: One of America's oldest native cat breeds, also the state cat of Maine. Named after raccoons due to fluffy tails. Many folk legends surround their origin

funFact.zh: 缅因猫是家猫中体型最大的品种！最重的缅因猫记录是14.2kg，比很多小狗都重。但它们虽然大，却特别喜欢玩水——甚至会把手伸进水龙头里玩！🐊
funFact.en: Maine Coons are the largest domestic cat breed! The heaviest on record was 31.4 lbs, heavier than many small dogs. Despite their size, many love playing with water, even reaching into faucets! 🐊

myths.zh: 传说缅因猫是家猫和浣熊杂交的后代——这从科学上是不可能的，因为它们属于不同物种。但这并不影响缅因猫的酷炫程度！
myths.en: Legend says Maine Coons are cat-raccoon hybrids - scientifically impossible as they're different species. Doesn't make them any less cool though!

careTips.zh:
1. 每周梳毛2-3次，换毛季需每天梳
2. 注意心脏健康，缅因猫易患肥厚型心肌病
3. 提供大号猫爬架和足够空间
4. 大猫饭量大，注意合理喂养
careTips.en:
1. Brush 2-3 times weekly, daily during shedding
2. Watch heart health, prone to hypertrophic cardiomyopathy
3. Provide large cat trees and ample space
4. Big cats eat a lot, feed reasonably

temperament.zh: 安静优雅、观察力敏锐，对陌生人害羞但对主人忠诚。被称为猫界的「蓝血贵族」
temperament.en: Quiet and elegant, keen observer, shy with strangers but loyal to owner. Called the 'blue-blooded aristocrat' of cats

diet.zh: 不挑食，适应性好。标准优质猫粮即可，注意控制体重
diet.en: Not picky, adaptable. Standard premium cat food, watch weight

habitat.zh: 喜欢安静稳定的环境，对变化敏感。室内饲养即可
habitat.en: Prefers quiet stable environment, sensitive to changes. Indoor living is fine

appearance.zh: 银蓝色的短毛带有独特的银色光泽，像丝绸一样。翠绿色的大眼睛是最醒目的特征
appearance.en: Silver-blue short fur with unique silvery sheen like silk. Striking emerald green eyes are the most distinctive feature

history.zh: 据说源自俄罗斯的阿尔汉格尔斯克港，因此又称「阿尔汉格尔斯克猫」。传说曾被俄国沙皇和英国维多利亚女王所宠爱
history.en: Said to originate from Arkhangelsk port in Russia, also called 'Archangel Cat'. Legend says they were cherished by Russian Tsars and Queen Victoria

funFact.zh: 俄罗斯蓝猫几乎是「零过敏」猫之一！它们的皮脂腺分泌的Fel d1蛋白（主要猫过敏原）比其他品种少很多。想养猫但对猫过敏的人可以考虑！💎
funFact.en: Russian Blues are one of the most 'hypoallergenic' cats! They produce much less Fel d1 protein (the main cat allergen) than other breeds. Great for cat-allergic cat lovers! 💎

myths.zh: 传说俄罗斯蓝猫是女巫的伙伴，因为它们安静神秘、走路无声无息、绿眼睛在黑暗中闪烁。当然这只是传说——它们只是很安静而已！
myths.en: Legend says Russian Blues were witches' companions due to their silent movement and glowing green eyes in the dark. Just a legend - they're simply very quiet!

careTips.zh:
1. 短毛好打理，每周梳一次就够了
2. 需要安静的居家环境
3. 它们怕生，有客人来可能会躲起来
4. 观察力强，适合喜欢安静陪伴的人
careTips.en:
1. Short hair easy to groom, brush weekly
2. Needs quiet home environment
3. Shy with strangers, may hide from guests
4. Keen observer, great for those who enjoy quiet companionship

temperament.zh: 猫界的「运动员」，精力极其旺盛。聪明好动、好奇心强、喜欢水，需要大量运动和刺激
temperament.en: The 'athlete' of cats, incredibly energetic. Smart, active, curious, loves water, needs lots of exercise and stimulation

diet.zh: 需要高蛋白饮食，建议搭配生骨肉或冻干。能量消耗大，食量比普通猫多
diet.en: High-protein diet recommended, supplement with raw meat or freeze-dried. High energy burn, eats more than average cats

habitat.zh: 需要大空间、高猫爬架和丰富的玩具。最好有户外封闭区域，室内也要充分 enrichment
habitat.en: Needs large space, tall cat trees and lots of toys. Ideally have enclosed outdoor area, indoor enrichment too

appearance.zh: 豹纹花色极具野性美感，短毛带有丝绒光泽。看起来像一只缩小版的野生豹猫，是猫界的「超模」
appearance.en: Wild leopard-like markings with velvety sheen. Looks like a mini wild leopard cat, the 'supermodel' of cats

history.zh: 由亚洲豹猫（野生）与家猫杂交培育而来。培育目的是为了让大家拥有「野猫的外表、家猫的性格」。1963年开始培育，1986年被正式认可
history.en: Bred by crossing Asian Leopard Cats (wild) with domestic cats. Goal: 'wild appearance, domestic personality'. Breeding started 1963, officially recognized 1986

funFact.zh: 孟加拉豹猫的花纹是独一无二的——每只猫的斑点排列都不同，就像人的指纹一样！而且很多孟加拉豹猫真的会像狗一样去捡你扔出去的东西 🐾
funFact.en: Bengal markings are unique - every cat's spot pattern is different, like human fingerprints! Many will fetch like dogs too 🐾

myths.zh: 有人认为孟加拉豹猫是野猫，很危险——其实它们至少是第四代以上的家猫后代，性格和普通家猫一样温顺，只是精力更旺盛而已。
myths.en: Some think Bengals are wild and dangerous - actually they're at least 4th generation domestic crosses, temperament same as regular cats, just more energetic.

careTips.zh:
1. 每天至少30分钟互动游戏
2. 提供高处空间和水源（它们爱玩水！）
3. 智力玩具很重要，不然无聊了会拆家
4. 短毛好打理，每周梳一次
careTips.en:
1. At least 30 min interactive play daily
2. Provide high spaces and water (they love water!)
3. Puzzle toys important, boredom leads to destruction
4. Short hair easy care, brush weekly

taxonomy.species: 豹猫 × 家猫杂交 P. bengalensis × F. catus

temperament.zh: 社交达人！超级粘人、热情好客，对任何人都很友好。体温比普通猫高，摸起来像温热的皮手套
temperament.en: Social butterfly! Super clingy, warm and friendly to everyone. Higher body temperature than regular cats, feels like a warm leather glove

diet.zh: 代谢快，消耗热量多，需要高热量高蛋白饮食。食量比有毛猫大
diet.en: Fast metabolism, high calorie burn, needs high-calorie high-protein diet. Eats more than furry cats

habitat.zh: 必须室内饲养！冬天需要保暖衣物，夏天要涂防晒霜。对温度极其敏感
habitat.en: Must be indoor! Needs warm clothes in winter, sunscreen in summer. Extremely sensitive to temperature

appearance.zh: 全身几乎无毛，皮肤有褶皱，大耳朵、柠檬形的眼睛。看起来像个外星生物，有人觉得丑萌，有人觉得超酷
appearance.en: Nearly hairless with wrinkly skin, large ears, lemon-shaped eyes. Looks like an alien - some find it ugly-cute, others think it's cool

history.zh: 1966年在加拿大一只普通猫产下的自然突变无毛小猫开始。经过数十年的 selective breeding 才稳定了基因
history.en: Started in 1966 when a normal Canadian cat gave birth to a naturally hairless kitten. Decades of selective breeding stabilized the gene

funFact.zh: 斯芬克斯猫不是完全无毛的！其实覆盖着一层细细的绒毛，摸起来像桃子或麂皮。而且它们会出汗——没错，猫咪也会出汗，只是只有无毛猫才能看出来！💦
funFact.en: Sphynx aren't completely hairless! Covered in fine peach-fuzz, feels like peach skin or suede. And they sweat - yes cats sweat, only visible on hairless ones! 💦

myths.zh: 「无毛猫不会过敏」——这是谣言！过敏原来自唾液和皮脂，不是毛发。不过它们确实因为无毛，过敏原不容易附着在环境中。
myths.en: 'Hairless cats won't cause allergies' - myth! Allergens come from saliva and sebum, not fur. However, without hair, fewer allergens spread in the environment.

careTips.zh:
1. 每周洗澡1-2次，去除皮肤油脂
2. 定期清洁耳朵和剪指甲
3. 冬天必须穿衣服保暖
4. 夏天注意防晒
5. 经常擦身，它们皮肤会出油
careTips.en:
1. Bathe 1-2 times weekly to remove skin oils
2. Regularly clean ears and trim nails
3. Must wear clothes in winter
4. Sun protection in summer
5. Frequent wiping, skin gets oily

temperament.zh: 猫界的「好奇宝宝」，永远在探索。聪明活泼、不喜欢被抱太久，但对主人非常亲近
temperament.en: The 'curious kitten' of cats, always exploring. Smart and active, doesn't like being held long but very affectionate to owner

diet.zh: 标准高质量猫粮即可，活泼好动需要充足营养补充体力
diet.en: Standard high-quality cat food, active lifestyle needs ample nutrition

habitat.zh: 需要丰富的环境和垂直空间。不能关笼，要让它自由探索
habitat.en: Needs enriched environment and vertical spaces. Never caged, allow free exploration

appearance.zh: 独特的「跳蚤纹」（agouti ticking），每根毛发都有深浅交替的色带。身形修长优雅，大耳朵显得十分精灵
appearance.en: Unique 'ticked' fur with alternating dark and light bands on each hair. Sleek elegant body, large ears give an elf-like look

history.zh: 被认为是世界上最古老的猫咪品种之一，外形酷似古埃及壁画和雕塑中的猫。但基因研究表明可能起源于东南亚海岸
history.en: Considered one of the oldest cat breeds, resembles cats in ancient Egyptian art. But genetic research suggests origin along Southeast Asian coast

funFact.zh: 阿比西尼亚猫被称为「猫界的边牧」——因为它们智商超高，能学会开门、翻箱倒柜，甚至有的能学会响应用户指令。养阿比的家必须要有好的猫锁！🔒
funFact.en: Called 'the Border Collie of cats' - super intelligent, can learn to open doors, rummage through things, even respond to commands. Aby households need good cat locks! 🔒

myths.zh: 因为外形像古埃及壁画上的猫，很多人以为阿比西尼亚猫就是古埃及的圣猫。虽然很浪漫，但基因研究显示它们的真正起源地可能不在非洲。
myths.en: Because they look like cats in ancient Egyptian art, many believe Abyssinians ARE the sacred cats of Egypt. Romantic but genetics suggest their true origin may not be in Africa.

careTips.zh:
1. 提供足够的探索空间和益智玩具
2. 每周梳一次毛
3. 定期体检，注意肾脏健康
4. 需要大量互动，不能忽视它
careTips.en:
1. Provide ample exploration space and puzzle toys
2. Brush weekly
3. Regular checkups, watch kidney health
4. Needs lots of interaction, don't neglect

temperament.zh: 温柔到骨子里，是最安静友善的猫之一。从不乱抓不咬人，是完美的家庭伴侣猫
temperament.en: Gentle to the bone, one of the quietest and friendliest cats. Never scratches or bites, perfect family companion cat

diet.zh: 标准优质猫粮即可，不挑食。注意控制体重
diet.en: Standard premium cat food, not picky. Watch weight

habitat.zh: 室内饲养即可，性格安静不需要太大空间。但需要主人的陪伴
habitat.en: Indoor living fine, calm personality doesn't need much space. But needs owner companionship

appearance.zh: 半长的丝质毛发、蓝色大眼睛、重点色分布，四爪的白色像穿了白袜子，非常优雅
appearance.en: Semi-long silky fur, blue eyes, point coloration. Four white paws look like wearing white socks, very elegant

history.zh: 传说来自缅甸的寺庙，被称为「神圣的缅甸猫」。据说一位僧侣在临终前，寺庙的猫跳上他的膝盖上为他祈祷，从此猫的眼睛变蓝、爪子变白
history.en: Legend says they're from Burmese temples, called 'Sacred Cat of Burma'. A monk was dying when a temple cat jumped on his lap to pray, and its eyes turned blue and paws turned white

funFact.zh: 伯曼猫的四只白爪子被称为「手套」，这是品种标准的一部分——没有「手套」的伯曼猫不能参加正式比赛。穿上「白袜子」才能当冠军！🧦
funFact.en: Birman's four white paws are called 'gloves', part of breed standard - Birmans without 'gloves' can't compete. Must wear 'white socks' to be a champion! 🧦

myths.zh: 传说中的寺庙故事虽然美好，但没有历史证据支持。基因研究表明伯曼猫实际上是在法国由暹罗猫和波斯猫杂交培育而成的。
myths.en: The beautiful temple legend has no historical evidence. Genetic research shows Birmans were actually bred in France from Siamese and Persian crosses.

careTips.zh:
1. 每周梳毛2-3次
2. 性格安静，适合公寓饲养
3. 需要定期陪伴，不要长期独处
4. 注意定期体检
careTips.en:
1. Brush 2-3 times weekly
2. Quiet temperament, apartment-friendly
3. Needs regular companionship
4. Regular vet checkups

temperament.zh: 独立但友善，既有野性又有温柔。喜欢高处，攀爬能力强。性格沉稳，不太粘人
temperament.en: Independent but friendly, both wild and gentle. Loves heights, excellent climber. Calm personality, not overly clingy

diet.zh: 适应力强不挑食，大型猫需要足够蛋白质和营养
diet.en: Adaptable eater, large cat needs sufficient protein and nutrition

habitat.zh: 非常适合有院子的家庭，但也可以室内饲养。需要高大的猫爬架满足攀爬需求
habitat.en: Great for homes with yards, but indoor is fine too. Needs tall cat trees for climbing

appearance.zh: 浓密的双层防水长毛、三角形的脸、大丛耳朵毛。看起来像一只迷路走进家里的野猫，威风凛凛
appearance.en: Dense double waterproof coat, triangular face, large ear tufts. Looks like a wild cat that wandered into your home, majestic

history.zh: 源自北欧维京时代，据说维京人的长船上就有挪威森林猫。它们出现在北欧神话中，女神弗蕾亚的战车就是由两只大猫拉的
history.en: From the Viking era, said to have sailed on Viking ships. They appear in Norse mythology - goddess Freya's chariot was pulled by two large cats

funFact.zh: 挪威森林猫是北欧神话中女神弗蕾亚的御用座驾！传说中，如果你把牛奶放在门外，弗蕾亚的猫经过时就会留下来喝——所以北欧人至今还有给猫留牛奶的传统 🥛
funFact.en: Norwegian Forest Cats were the personal ride of Norse goddess Freya! Legend says if you leave milk outside, Freya's cats would stop to drink - Scandinavians still leave milk for cats 🥛

myths.zh: 北欧传说中，雷神托尔的力量来源之一就是他的两只猫（其实是挪威森林猫）。这些神话反映了维京人对森林猫的敬重。
myths.en: Norse legend says Thor's strength partly came from his two cats (actually Norwegian Forest Cats). These myths reflect Viking respect for forest cats.

careTips.zh:
1. 每周梳毛2-3次，换毛季需每天梳
2. 防水毛不容易打结，但仍需护理
3. 提供高大猫爬架
4. 注意心脏健康，定期体检
careTips.en:
1. Brush 2-3 times weekly, daily during shedding
2. Waterproof coat resists tangles but still needs care
3. Provide tall cat trees
4. Watch heart health, regular checkups

temperament.zh: 波斯猫的短毛版，拥有波斯猫的优雅温柔但没有那么多护理需求。活泼比波斯猫好动一些，但整体还是安静型
temperament.en: Persian in short hair, has Persian elegance without the grooming demands. Slightly more active than Persians, but generally calm

diet.zh: 容易发胖，需要控制饮食。选择优质猫粮，避免高碳水
diet.en: Prone to weight gain, diet control needed. Choose premium cat food, avoid high carbs

habitat.zh: 室内饲养，对环境要求不高。适应力比波斯猫更强
habitat.en: Indoor living, low environmental demands. More adaptable than Persians

appearance.zh: 扁平的扁脸、大圆眼、短鼻子、短而密的毛发。大家熟知的「加菲猫」的原型！
appearance.en: Flat face, big round eyes, short nose, short dense coat. The real-life inspiration for 'Garfield'!

history.zh: 1960年代培育，目标就是创造一个「短毛版波斯猫」。用波斯猫和美国短毛猫杂交而来
history.en: Bred in the 1960s, goal was creating a 'short-haired Persian'. Crossed between Persians and American Shorthairs

funFact.zh: 加菲猫的原型就是异国短毛猫！虽然原作者说灵感来自多只猫，但圆脸扁鼻子的形象和异国短毛猫几乎一模一样。所以养一只异短，就等于养了一只会动的加菲猫！🐱
funFact.en: Garfield is based on Exotic Shorthairs! While the creator cited multiple cats, the flat face and round body match perfectly. Owning an Exotic is like having a live-action Garfield! 🐱

myths.zh: 「加菲猫什么都吃」——动画片里是，但现实中异短的肠胃并不好。扁脸猫因为鼻腔短，吃东西容易呛到，需要浅口碗喂食。
myths.en: 'Garfield eats everything' - in the cartoon yes, but real Exotics have sensitive stomachs. Flat-faced cats easily choke while eating, need shallow food bowls.

careTips.zh:
1. 每天清洁面部褶皱，防止感染
2. 使用浅口食碗
3. 控制体重，避免肥胖
4. 每周梳毛2次，短毛但密度高
careTips.en:
1. Daily face fold cleaning to prevent infection
2. Use shallow food bowls
3. Weight management
4. Brush 2 times weekly, short but dense coat

temperament.zh: 温柔的巨人，性格大胆友善，像狗一样忠诚。喜欢水，会看门，被称为猫界的「忠犬」
temperament.en: Gentle giant, bold and friendly, dog-like loyalty. Loves water, acts as a watchdog, called the 'faithful hound' of cats

diet.zh: 大型猫需要高蛋白饮食。在野外以猎物为食，家养可选择生骨肉或高质量猫粮
diet.en: Large cat needs high-protein diet. Wild diet is prey, pet diet can be raw meat or premium cat food

habitat.zh: 适应力极强，耐寒能力惊人。室内外均可，但最好有户外空间
habitat.en: Extremely adaptable, amazing cold tolerance. Indoor or outdoor, best with outdoor space

appearance.zh: 三层被毛结构，防水防寒。壮硕的身材、大丛耳朵毛和蓬松大尾巴。看起来像一只温和的小狮子
appearance.en: Triple-layer waterproof coat. Muscular build, large ear tufts, fluffy big tail. Looks like a gentle little lion

history.zh: 俄罗斯的国猫，已存在超过1000年。在西伯利亚严酷的冬季中自然进化，是自然选择的杰作
history.en: National cat of Russia, existed for over 1000 years. Naturally evolved through harsh Siberian winters, a masterpiece of natural selection

funFact.zh: 西伯利亚猫是目前已知「最不容易过敏」的猫品种之一！研究表明它们的唾液中 Fel d1 蛋白含量比普通猫低很多。真正的猫过敏者福音！🎉
funFact.en: Siberian cats are among the most 'hypoallergenic' cats! Studies show much lower Fel d1 protein in their saliva. Great news for cat allergy sufferers! 🎉

myths.zh: 俄罗斯民间传说中，西伯利亚猫能给家庭带来好运和保护。有些家庭甚至会让猫先进新房子——据说猫选择睡觉的地方就是家里最有能量的位置。
myths.en: Russian folklore says Siberian cats bring luck and protection to households. Some families let the cat enter a new house first - where it sleeps is said to be the most positive energy spot.

careTips.zh:
1. 每周梳毛2-3次，换毛季每天梳
2. 非常喜欢水，可以在浴室放浅水让它玩
3. 需要较大空间和猫爬架
4. 注意心脏健康
careTips.en:
1. Brush 2-3 times weekly, daily during shedding
2. Loves water, put shallow water in bathroom for play
3. Needs large space and cat trees
4. Watch heart health

temperament.zh: 聪明灵动、活力充沛，喜欢跑跳和攀爬。对主人非常忠诚，被称为猫界的「小精灵」
temperament.en: Smart and nimble, energetic, loves running and climbing. Very loyal to owner, called the 'little sprite' of cats

diet.zh: 标准优质猫粮即可，活泼好动需要充足营养
diet.en: Standard premium cat food, active lifestyle needs good nutrition

habitat.zh: 室内饲养即可，但需要充足的活动空间和高处猫爬架
habitat.en: Indoor living fine, but needs ample activity space and tall cat trees

appearance.zh: 修长优雅的身型、丝质长毛、大尖耳朵。白色+蓝色或异色瞳孔最为经典，飘逸的长尾巴像羽毛笔
appearance.en: Sleek elegant body, silky long fur, large pointed ears. White with blue or odd-colored eyes is classic, flowing tail like a quill pen

history.zh: 世界上最古老的长毛猫品种之一，来自土耳其安卡拉地区。土耳其政府将白色土耳其安哥拉猫视为国宝加以保护
history.en: One of the oldest long-haired cat breeds, from Ankara, Turkey. The Turkish government protects white Turkish Angoras as national treasures

funFact.zh: 土耳其安哥拉猫是「跳水冠军」——它们非常喜欢水！很多安哥拉猫会主动跳进浴缸、玩水龙头，甚至和主人一起游泳。这在猫界是极其罕见的！🏊
funFact.en: Turkish Angoras are 'diving champions' - they love water! Many will jump into bathtubs, play with faucets, even swim with owners. Extremely rare in the cat world! 🏊

myths.zh: 伊斯兰传说中，先知穆罕默德非常爱猫。有一种说法是土耳其安哥拉猫因为太像天使（尤其是异瞳的），所以穆罕默德曾特意为它们祈祷。传说穆罕默德的大衣被猫睡过，他不忍心吵醒猫就剪掉了袖子。
myths.en: Islamic legend says Prophet Muhammad loved cats. Some say he prayed for Turkish Angoras because they looked like angels. Legend says he cut off his sleeve rather than wake a sleeping cat on it.

careTips.zh:
1. 每周梳毛2-3次
2. 提供水源和游泳机会（它们爱水！）
3. 每天互动游戏消耗精力
4. 注意耳部清洁
careTips.en:
1. Brush 2-3 times weekly
2. Provide water and swimming opportunities (they love water!)
3. Daily interactive play
4. Regular ear cleaning

temperament.zh: 安静的观察者，微笑的猫。很少叫，用独特的「微笑」表情表达情感。粘人但不闹腾
temperament.en: Quiet observer, the smiling cat. Rarely meows, expresses emotion with a unique 'smile'. Clingy but not noisy

diet.zh: 不挑食，适应性好。标准优质猫粮即可
diet.en: Not picky, adaptable. Standard premium cat food

habitat.zh: 室内饲养即可，喜欢安静的环境。适应力强，能和各种人相处
habitat.en: Indoor living fine, prefers quiet environment. Adaptable, gets along with various people

appearance.zh: 蓝灰色的双层短毛像羊毛一样有质感，圆脸配上略带弧度的嘴角——看起来永远在微笑。金黄色或铜色的大眼睛
appearance.en: Blue-gray double coat with woolly texture, round face with slightly curved mouth - always looks like it's smiling. Large gold or copper eyes

history.zh: 法国的国猫之一。传说由中世纪的卡尔特教团修士培育。法国总统戴高乐曾养过一只夏特尔猫，让它成为了名人猫
history.en: One of France's national cats. Legend says raised by Carthusian monks in the Middle Ages. President de Gaulle had one, making it a celebrity cat

funFact.zh: 夏特尔猫是猫界的「微笑大师」——因为面部骨骼结构的特殊，它们的嘴角天然上翘，看起来像在微笑。养一只夏特尔猫，每天回家都看到笑脸迎接！😊
funFact.en: Chartreux are the 'smile masters' of cats - their facial bone structure naturally curves the mouth upward. Come home to a smiling cat every day! 😊

myths.zh: 传说夏特尔猫是卡尔特教团修士培育的「静默猫」——因为它们的叫声极其轻柔，几乎不发出声音，符合修道院安静的要求。
myths.en: Legend says Chartreux were bred as 'silent cats' by Carthusian monks - their meows are extremely soft, almost silent, fitting monastery's quiet requirements.

careTips.zh:
1. 每周梳毛一次
2. 几乎不叫，适合安静环境
3. 喜欢捉老鼠，本能保留得好
4. 注意牙齿健康
careTips.en:
1. Brush weekly
2. Almost silent, great for quiet environments
3. Good mousing instinct retained
4. Watch dental health

temperament.zh: 和折耳猫一样温柔粘人，但更健康。喜欢跟着主人，安静乖巧，是理想的家庭猫
temperament.en: As gentle and clingy as Folds but healthier. Follows owner, quiet and well-behaved, ideal family cat

diet.zh: 标准优质猫粮即可，注意控制体重
diet.en: Standard premium cat food, watch weight

habitat.zh: 室内饲养，适应力强。不需要特别的环境
habitat.en: Indoor living, adaptable. No special environmental needs

appearance.zh: 和苏格兰折耳猫几乎一模一样，唯一的区别是耳朵是直立的不是折叠的。圆圆的脸、大眼睛，同样可爱
appearance.en: Nearly identical to Scottish Fold except ears stand straight, not folded. Same round face, big eyes, equally adorable

history.zh: 苏格兰折耳猫的直耳兄弟姐妹。在折耳猫的繁殖过程中，两只折耳交配会产生骨骼问题，所以必须和立耳猫交配。立耳猫因此是保持品种健康的关键
history.en: The straight-eared siblings of Scottish Folds. Two Folds bred together cause bone issues, so they must be bred with Straights. Straights are key to keeping the breed healthy

funFact.zh: 很多人不知道苏格兰立耳猫的存在！它其实是折耳猫品种中更健康的选择——同样的可爱外表，但没有折耳基因带来的骨骼问题。堪称「完美替代品」！✨
funFact.en: Many don't know Scottish Straights exist! They're the healthier alternative to Folds - same adorable look without the fold gene's bone issues. A 'perfect substitute'! ✨

myths.zh: 「立耳猫就是普通猫」——不对，苏格兰立耳猫是注册的独立品种，拥有和折耳猫一样的血统和体态特征，只是耳朵基因不同。
myths.en: 'Straight ears are just regular cats' - wrong, Scottish Straights are a registered breed with the same lineage and body type as Folds, just different ear genes.

careTips.zh:
1. 比折耳猫更健康，但仍需定期体检
2. 短毛好打理，每周梳一次
3. 性格温顺适合有孩子的家庭
4. 注意体重管理
careTips.en:
1. Healthier than Folds but still needs regular checkups
2. Short hair easy care, brush weekly
3. Gentle temperament, great for families with children
4. Weight management

temperament.zh: 世界上最小的猫品种之一，但性格超大胆。好奇心旺盛、活泼好动，喜欢高处和探索
temperament.en: One of the world's smallest cat breeds but super bold personality. Curious, active, loves heights and exploring

diet.zh: 体型小食量小，选择高品质猫粮即可。代谢快，少食多餐
diet.en: Small size small appetite, premium cat food fine. Fast metabolism, small frequent meals

habitat.zh: 适合各种居住环境，公寓也没问题。需要猫爬架和玩具
habitat.en: Fits any living environment, apartments fine. Needs cat trees and toys

appearance.zh: 超小的身材、大眼睛、大耳朵、浅棕色的「ticking」毛色。看起来永远像只小奶猫
appearance.en: Tiny body, big eyes, big ears, light brown 'ticked' coat. Always looks like a kitten

history.zh: 被认为是新加坡的下水道猫（大教堂猫）的后代。1980年代被带到美国后培育成正式品种。新加坡曾将其作为旅游吉祥物
history.en: Believed to descend from Singapore's drain cats (church cats). Brought to America in the 1980s, developed into an official breed. Singapore once used it as a tourism mascot

funFact.zh: 新加坡猫是吉尼斯世界纪录认证的「最小的家猫品种」——成年猫体重只有2-4kg，比很多品种的幼猫还轻！养一只永远不会长大的猫的感觉🐾
funFact.en: Singapura is Guinness World Record's 'smallest domestic cat breed' - adults weigh only 4-9 lbs, lighter than many kittens! Having a cat that never really grows up 🐾

myths.zh: 传说新加坡猫是「猫界的小精灵」，因为它们总在新加坡老城区的小巷里穿梭，动作轻盈得几乎看不到。实际上它们确实体型极小，这增加了神秘感。
myths.en: Legend says Singapuras are 'elf cats' because they dart through Singapore's old town alleys so lightly they're almost invisible. Their tiny size adds to the mystique.

careTips.zh:
1. 体型小注意保暖
2. 短毛好打理，偶尔梳理
3. 需要互动玩具消耗精力
4. 注意不要让它们被踩到！
careTips.en:
1. Small size, keep warm
2. Short hair easy care, occasional brushing
3. Interactive toys for energy
4. Be careful not to step on them!

temperament.zh: 活泼好动、聪明健谈，会发出各种叫声。喜欢和人互动，是猫界的「社交达人」
temperament.en: Lively, smart and talkative, makes various sounds. Loves interacting with people, the 'social butterfly' of cats

diet.zh: 不挑食，标准优质猫粮即可。活力旺盛需要充足营养
diet.en: Not picky, standard premium cat food. High energy needs good nutrition

habitat.zh: 室内饲养，适合公寓。喜欢有窗户可以看外面
habitat.en: Indoor living, apartment-friendly. Enjoys windows to look outside

appearance.zh: 最显著的特征是短小的卷尾巴，像兔子的尾巴！三花色（calico）最经典，后腿比前腿长
appearance.en: Most striking feature is the short bobbed tail like a rabbit! Calico pattern is most classic, hind legs longer than front

history.zh: 日本最古老的猫品种，已有一千多年历史。就是日本「招财猫」（Maneki-neko）的原型！在日本文化中地位极高
history.en: Japan's oldest cat breed, over 1000 years of history. The original model for the Japanese 'lucky cat' (Maneki-neko)! Highly esteemed in Japanese culture

funFact.zh: 招财猫的原型就是日本短尾猫！你见过的每一个招财猫——无论是餐厅门口还是手机挂件——都是三花色的日本短尾猫。养一只就是养了一个活招财！🧧
funFact.en: The lucky cat (Maneki-neko) is modeled after Japanese Bobtails! Every lucky cat you've seen is a calico Japanese Bobtail. Owning one is like having a living lucky charm! 🧧

myths.zh: 日本传说中，一只三花猫在江户时代的寺庙前向路过的武士招手，引导他进庙避开了雷击。从此招财猫就成了日本的幸运象征。
myths.en: Japanese legend says a calico cat waved a passing samurai into a temple, saving him from a lightning strike. The lucky cat became Japan's symbol of good fortune.

careTips.zh:
1. 短毛好打理，偶尔梳理
2. 活泼好动，多准备玩具
3. 三花色几乎都是母猫
4. 短尾巴是基因决定，每只猫的尾巴都不同
careTips.en:
1. Short hair easy care, occasional brushing
2. Active, provide lots of toys
3. Calico pattern is almost always female
4. Bobbed tail is genetic, each one is unique

temperament.zh: 独立、聪明、忠诚，是中国最常见的田园猫。天生的捕鼠高手，性格沉稳不粘人，但对主人很专一
temperament.en: Independent, smart, and loyal, the most common Chinese garden cat. A born mouser with a calm personality, not clingy but very devoted to their owner

diet.zh: 不挑食，适应力强。肉类为主，搭配猫粮即可。肠胃好，是最好养的猫之一
diet.en: Not picky, highly adaptable. Meat-based diet with cat food works well. Strong digestion, one of the easiest cats to keep

habitat.zh: 适应各种环境，从农村到城市公寓都能生活。喜欢有活动空间的地方
habitat.en: Adapts to various environments, from countryside to city apartments. Prefers places with room to roam

appearance.zh: 身材健壮匀称，毛发短密，最经典的毛色是棕色虎斑纹（狸花），额头有清晰的「M」形花纹，眼睛大而圆，多为黄绿色
appearance.en: Athletic and well-proportioned with short dense fur. Classic coat is brown tabby (lihua pattern), with a distinctive 'M' marking on the forehead, large round eyes usually yellow-green

history.zh: 中国本土自然品种，有两千多年历史。宋代《狸奴赋》中就有记载。2003年CFA正式认可，英文名Dragon Li（龙猫）。是中国最常见的猫种
history.en: Natural Chinese breed with over 2000 years of history. Recorded in Song Dynasty texts. Officially recognized by CFA in 2003 as Dragon Li. The most common cat breed in China

funFact.zh: 狸花猫是中国唯一被国际猫协(CFA)认可的本土自然品种！古代中国人称猫为「狸奴」，苏东坡就写过「裹盐迎得小狸奴」的诗句。狸花猫的虎斑花纹和野生祖先非常接近
funFact.en: The Li Hua is the only Chinese natural breed recognized by CFA! Ancient Chinese called cats 'Linu' (little slave). Poet Su Dongpo wrote about welcoming a 'small linu' with salt. Their tabby pattern is very close to their wild ancestors

myths.zh: 民间传说狸花猫有「九条命」，因为它们生存能力超强，从高处摔下来也能安全着陆。还有说法认为黑褐色的狸花猫能镇宅辟邪。
myths.en: Folklore says Li Hua cats have 'nine lives' because of their incredible survival ability, able to land safely from high falls. Some also believe dark brown Li Hua cats can ward off evil spirits.

careTips.zh:
1. 短毛品种，每周梳毛1-2次即可
2. 体质强健，很少生病
3. 运动需求较高，多准备玩具
4. 注意定期驱虫，尤其是散养的猫
5. 保持清洁饮水，泌尿系统健康很重要
careTips.en:
1. Short-haired, brush 1-2 times weekly
2. Strong constitution, rarely gets sick
3. High exercise needs, provide plenty of toys
4. Regular deworming, especially for outdoor cats
5. Keep fresh water available, urinary health is important

taxonomy.species: 中华田园猫 F. catus (Chinese Li Hua)

temperament.zh: 活泼好动，性格各异。有趣的是，几乎所有的三花猫都是母猫！公三花猫极为罕见，被称为「猫中钻石」
temperament.en: Active and playful, each with unique personality. Fun fact: almost all calicos are female! Male calicos are extremely rare, called 'diamonds of cats'

diet.zh: 不挑食，好养活。注意控制体重，田园猫体质好但也不能暴饮暴食
diet.en: Not picky, easy to feed. Watch weight, garden cats are hardy but shouldn't overeat

habitat.zh: 适应力极强，城乡皆宜。喜欢有阳光和温暖的地方
habitat.en: Extremely adaptable, suitable for city or country. Loves sunny and warm spots

appearance.zh: 身上有黑、橙（红）、白三种颜色的色块，每只三花的花纹都是独一无二的，就像人类的指纹！体型中等，毛发短密
appearance.en: Three distinct color patches: black, orange, and white. Every calico's pattern is unique, like human fingerprints! Medium build with short dense fur

history.zh: 三花猫不是特定品种，而是一种毛色 pattern。在中国有着悠久的民间文化，三花猫被视为招财进宝的吉祥猫
history.en: Calico isn't a specific breed but a coat color pattern. Has a long folk culture in China, where calico cats are seen as lucky cats that bring wealth

funFact.zh: 三花猫几乎100%是母猫！这是因为决定橙色毛色的基因在X染色体上，需要两条X染色体才能同时呈现黑色和橙色，而母猫恰好是XX。公三花猫出现的概率只有大约三千分之一
funFact.en: Calicos are almost 100% female! The orange fur gene is on the X chromosome, and you need two X chromosomes to show both black and orange. Female cats are XX, making it possible. Male calicos occur only about 1 in 3,000

myths.zh: 日本人把三花猫视为国宝，三色招财猫的原型就是三花猫。中国民间也认为三花猫能带来好运，尤其是额头有三种颜色的「三花盖顶」。
myths.en: Japanese consider calicos a national treasure — the lucky cat (Maneki-neko) is based on calico cats. Chinese folklore also believes calicos bring good luck, especially those with three colors on the forehead.

careTips.zh:
1. 短毛易打理，偶尔梳毛即可
2. 注意防晒，白色毛发多的三花容易被晒伤
3. 定期驱虫和疫苗
4. 公三花猫如有需要特别关注泌尿健康
5. 保持规律饮食
careTips.en:
1. Short coat is easy to maintain, occasional brushing
2. Sun protection needed, white areas can sunburn
3. Regular deworming and vaccinations
4. Male calicos need extra urinary health attention
5. Maintain regular feeding schedule

temperament.zh: 性格温顺亲人，天生吃货，心宽体胖。民间有「十橘九胖」的说法，它们对食物有着无限的热爱
temperament.en: Gentle and affectionate, born food lovers. The saying goes '9 out of 10 orange cats are chubby' — they have infinite love for food

diet.zh: 关键就是控制食量！橘猫天生容易发胖，一定要定时定量喂食，不能自助餐式喂养
diet.en: The key is portion control! Orange cats naturally gain weight easily. Must feed fixed portions at set times, no all-you-can-eat buffets

habitat.zh: 极度适应各种环境，从菜市场到豪宅都能活得很好。对温度不敏感
habitat.en: Extremely adaptable to all environments, from market stalls to mansions. Not sensitive to temperature

appearance.zh: 橘色到深橙色的短毛，体型圆润饱满（尤其容易发胖），大圆脸，眯眯眼时特别可爱。花纹有纯色、橘白、橘虎斑等
appearance.en: Orange to deep orange short fur, round and plump body (especially prone to weight gain), big round face. Super cute when squinting. Patterns include solid, orange-white, and orange tabby

history.zh: 橘猫是中国最常见的猫之一，自古就有。在中国互联网上成为超级网红，被称为「大橘为重」，衍生出无数表情包
history.en: One of the most common cats in China since ancient times. Became a super internet celebrity, spawning the pun 'big orange is heavy weight' and countless memes

funFact.zh: 橘猫中80%是公猫！这是因为控制橘色的基因与性别有关。网络名猫「橘子猫」体重最高记录超过15公斤！科学研究发现橘猫确实比其他颜色的猫更友好、更贪吃
funFact.en: 80% of orange cats are male! The orange color gene is linked to sex chromosomes. The heaviest recorded orange cat weighed over 15kg! Studies show orange cats are indeed friendlier and more food-motivated than other colors

myths.zh: 民间传说养橘猫能让家里食物富足，因为它们总是能找到吃的。古人认为橘猫是「招财猫」的一种，橘色象征金元宝。
myths.en: Folklore says keeping an orange cat ensures food abundance since they always find something to eat. Ancient Chinese considered orange cats a type of lucky cat, with orange symbolizing gold ingots.

careTips.zh:
1. 严格控制食量，防止肥胖（最重要！）
2. 每天陪它玩耍15分钟以上，增加运动量
3. 定期称重，监控体型
4. 选择低脂猫粮
5. 避免过多零食
careTips.en:
1. Strictly control food portions, prevent obesity (most important!)
2. Play with them 15+ minutes daily for exercise
3. Weigh regularly, monitor body shape
4. Choose low-fat cat food
5. Limit treats

temperament.zh: 活泼好动，精力旺盛，善于捕猎。性格独立但有领地意识，忠诚度很高。四川人亲切地称它们为「简阳猫」
temperament.en: Active, energetic, excellent hunter. Independent but territorial, very loyal. Affectionately called 'Jianyang cat' by locals in Sichuan

diet.zh: 杂食适应能力强，以肉食为主。四川田园猫的特点是适应力极强，不挑食
diet.en: Strong adaptability in diet, mainly meat-based. Sichuan garden cats are known for being extremely undemanding eaters

habitat.zh: 适应四川盆地的气候，耐热耐湿。城乡皆可，喜欢有活动空间的环境
habitat.en: Adapted to Sichuan basin climate, heat and humidity tolerant. Works in both city and country, prefers space to roam

appearance.zh: 体型健壮，四肢有力，毛发短密。常见虎斑纹和纯色，眼睛明亮有神，动作灵活矫健
appearance.en: Sturdy build, strong limbs, short dense fur. Common tabby and solid patterns, bright alert eyes, agile movements

history.zh: 四川简阳地区的本土猫种，作为田园猫在当地生活了数百年。以捕鼠能力出众闻名，是四川农村家庭的好帮手
history.en: Local cat breed from Jianyang, Sichuan, living as garden cats for hundreds of years. Famous for outstanding mousing ability, a great helper for rural Sichuan families

funFact.zh: 简阳猫虽然名气不如狸花猫大，但近年来因为短视频平台走红。一些简阳猫因为长相帅气，被网友称为「野生小老虎」
funFact.en: Though less famous than Li Hua cats, Jianyang cats have become internet-famous through short video platforms. Some handsome ones are nicknamed 'wild little tigers' by netizens

myths.zh: 四川民间认为简阳猫能驱邪避灾，尤其是纯黑色的简阳猫，被认为有镇宅的作用。过年时有些家庭会给猫准备小鱼干作为年夜饭。
myths.en: Sichuan folklore believes Jianyang cats ward off evil, especially solid black ones, which are thought to protect the home. Some families prepare dried fish for their cats during New Year's dinner.

careTips.zh:
1. 短毛好打理，每周梳一次
2. 精力旺盛，需要充分运动和玩具
3. 定期驱虫
4. 注意口腔健康
5. 适应力强，换环境不需要太多过渡
careTips.en:
1. Short coat, brush once a week
2. High energy, needs ample exercise and toys
3. Regular deworming
4. Watch dental health
5. Very adaptable, minimal transition needed for new environments

taxonomy.species: 中华田园猫 F. catus (Sichuan Jianyang)

temperament.zh: 性格高雅温顺，聪明机警。有猫中「白雪公主」之称。安静优雅，不太爱闹，适合安静的家庭
temperament.en: Elegant and gentle, smart and alert. Known as the 'Snow White' of cats. Quiet and graceful, not very mischievous, suits calm households

diet.zh: 饮食以肉类和猫粮为主，注意营养均衡。长毛品种容易产生毛球，可以喂化毛膏
diet.en: Meat and cat food based diet, balanced nutrition. Long-haired breed prone to hairballs, can give hairball remedy

habitat.zh: 适合室内饲养，怕潮湿。山东气候干燥，更适合这种长毛猫
habitat.en: Best kept indoors, dislikes humidity. Shandong's dry climate suits this long-haired breed

appearance.zh: 最大的特点是脖子和胸部有一圈浓密的长毛，像雄狮的鬃毛！多为白色，有鸳鸯眼（一蓝一黄），长毛飘逸，非常漂亮
appearance.en: Distinctive feature: a thick mane of long fur around the neck and chest, like a male lion! Mostly white, often with odd eyes (one blue, one yellow), flowing long fur, very beautiful

history.zh: 原产于山东临清市，是中国传统长毛猫品种。历史可追溯到明代，据说与波斯猫有血缘关系。曾在濒临灭绝的边缘，近年保护工作有所进展
history.en: Originally from Linqing, Shandong, a traditional Chinese long-haired cat breed. History traces back to the Ming Dynasty, believed to have Persian cat ancestry. Once near extinction, conservation efforts have progressed recently

funFact.zh: 临清狮子猫是「中国最美的猫」之一！它们最迷人的特征是鸳鸯眼（异瞳），一只蓝色一只黄色。这是因为控制眼睛颜色的基因在白色毛发中表现不同
funFact.en: Linqing Lion Cats are among 'China's most beautiful cats'! Their most charming feature is odd eyes (heterochromia) — one blue, one yellow. This happens because eye color genes express differently in white-furred cats

myths.zh: 传说临清狮子猫是明朝时波斯商人带入中国的波斯猫与本地猫杂交的后代。据说鸳鸯眼的狮子猫特别灵异，能看见人看不见的东西。
myths.en: Legend says Linqing Lion Cats descended from Persian cats brought by Persian merchants during the Ming Dynasty, crossed with local cats. Odd-eyed ones are said to have special powers, able to see things invisible to humans.

careTips.zh:
1. 长毛需每天梳理，防止打结
2. 定期喂化毛膏或猫草，防止毛球症
3. 注意眼部清洁
4. 保持环境干燥
5. 每年至少体检一次
careTips.en:
1. Long coat needs daily brushing to prevent mats
2. Regular hairball remedy or cat grass
3. Keep eyes clean
4. Maintain dry living environment
5. Annual vet checkup at minimum

taxonomy.species: 中华田园猫 F. catus (Linqing Lion Cat)

temperament.zh: 永远的开心果！对所有人友好，包括小偷。热情得像50度的热水，见面就要扑你
temperament.en: Always happy! Friendly to everyone, including burglars. As enthusiastic as 50°C hot water, will pounce on everyone they meet

diet.zh: 食欲旺盛，什么都想吃。控制食量很重要，不然很容易变成一颗金色的大土豆
diet.en: Huge appetite, wants to eat everything. Portion control is crucial, or they'll become a giant golden potato

habitat.zh: 需要较大活动空间，每天至少1-2小时户外运动。有院子最好
habitat.en: Needs ample space, at least 1-2 hours outdoor exercise daily. A yard is ideal

appearance.zh: 金色的长毛，温暖的微笑嘴脸，永远摇个不停的尾巴。看起来就像一团会移动的阳光
appearance.en: Golden long fur, warm smiling face, tail that never stops wagging. Looks like a ball of moving sunshine

history.zh: 19世纪苏格兰的一位贵族培育，专门用来在打猎时捡回猎物。所以它们的嘴特别温柔，叼东西不会咬坏
history.en: Bred in 19th century Scotland by a nobleman to retrieve game during hunts. That's why they have such soft mouths - they can carry things without damaging them

funFact.zh: 金毛是工作犬界的万金油——导盲犬、搜救犬、治疗犬样样行。传说如果金毛会说话，第一句一定是：「你好你好你好你好你好你好！」😂
funFact.en: Goldens are the Swiss army knife of working dogs - guide dogs, search & rescue, therapy dogs, you name it. Legend says if they could talk, their first words would be: 'Hi hi hi hi hi hi hi!' 😂

myths.zh: 民间说金毛的智商排名第4，但养过的人都知道：聪明是聪明，但就是聪明地偷吃。还有人说金毛小时候是恶魔——这居然是真的！小时候真的超级调皮！
myths.en: Folklore says Goldens rank 4th in dog intelligence, but owners know: they're smart enough to steal food cleverly. Some say Goldens are demons as puppies - this is actually true! They're super mischievous when young!

careTips.zh:
1. 每天至少1小时运动
2. 每周梳毛2-3次，掉毛季每天梳
3. 注意髋关节健康
4. 训练越早开始越好，它们学东西很快
careTips.en:
1. At least 1 hour exercise daily
2. Brush 2-3 times weekly, daily during shedding season
3. Watch hip joint health
4. Start training early, they learn fast

temperament.zh: 阳光开朗大男孩/女孩，和金毛一样热情但更皮实。永远精力充沛，像个永动机
temperament.en: Sunny and cheerful big boy/girl, as enthusiastic as Goldens but tougher. Endless energy like a perpetual motion machine

diet.zh: 典型的吃货，眼巴巴看着你吃东西的样子能让你把整桌菜都给它
diet.en: Classic foodie. That begging look while you eat will make you hand over the entire table

habitat.zh: 适应力强，但需要大量运动。特别喜欢水，看到水就想跳进去
habitat.en: Very adaptable but needs lots of exercise. Loves water and will jump into any body of water they see

appearance.zh: 黑色、黄色或巧克力色的短毛，身材结实匀称，眼睛里永远是「饿了没？」的神情
appearance.en: Black, yellow, or chocolate short coat, muscular build, eyes always saying 'Are we eating yet?'

history.zh: 最早是渔夫的帮手，帮忙从海里捡回渔网和鱼。所以拉布拉多天生爱水，是游泳健将
history.en: Originally fishermen's helpers, retrieving nets and fish from the sea. That's why Labs naturally love water and are champion swimmers

funFact.zh: 拉布拉多可以闻出某些疾病的气味！所以很多医院用它们来检测低血糖和癌症。鼻子比一些医疗仪器还灵敏 👃
funFact.en: Labs can smell certain diseases! Many hospitals use them to detect low blood sugar and cancer. Their nose is more sensitive than some medical equipment 👃

myths.zh: 有人说拉布拉多永远不会生气——虽然它们脾气确实好，但饿急了也是会拆家的！别问我怎么知道的。
myths.en: Some say Labs never get angry - while they are indeed good-tempered, they WILL destroy the house if hungry enough! Don't ask me how I know.

careTips.zh:
1. 每天大量运动，至少1.5小时
2. 严格控制饮食量
3. 多游泳，这是它们最喜欢的运动
4. 短毛好打理，每周刷一次就够了
careTips.en:
1. Lots of daily exercise, at least 1.5 hours
2. Strict portion control
3. Swim often - their favorite exercise
4. Short coat is easy, brush weekly

temperament.zh: 人称「拆家大队长」，精力旺盛到令人发指。表情丰富，看起来永远在思考人生（或者在想怎么拆沙发）
temperament.en: Known as the 'Captain of House-Demolition Squad', energy levels that are off the charts. Expressive face always looking deep in thought (or planning sofa destruction)

diet.zh: 食量大，但肠胃比较敏感。需要易消化的高蛋白狗粮，注意别让它们乱吃东西
diet.en: Big appetite but sensitive stomach. Needs easily digestible high-protein dog food, keep them from eating random stuff

habitat.zh: 需要大量运动！至少每天2小时。理想的家是有大院子，或者主人每天陪跑马拉松
habitat.en: Needs lots of exercise! At least 2 hours daily. Ideal home has a big yard or an owner who runs marathons

appearance.zh: 蓝色或异色的眼睛，像穿了件阿拉斯加风的皮草。看起来像狼但其实怂得一批
appearance.en: Blue or heterochromatic eyes, wearing an Alaskan-style fur coat. Looks like a wolf but is actually a total coward

history.zh: 原本是西伯利亚楚科奇人的雪橇犬，能在零下60度的环境里跑上几百公里。所以它精力旺盛也是合理的——祖上就是运动员
history.en: Originally sled dogs of the Chukchi people, able to run hundreds of kilometers in -60°C. So their boundless energy makes sense - their ancestors were athletes

funFact.zh: 哈士奇是「表情包之王」！它们的表情比很多演员都丰富：怀疑人生、翻白眼、委屈巴巴、偷吃被抓……各种表情信手拈来 😂
funFact.en: Huskies are the 'Kings of Memes'! More expressive than many actors: existential crisis, eye-rolling, puppy eyes, caught red-handed... every expression on demand 😂

myths.zh: 有人说哈士奇不咬人，这倒是有几分道理——它们不咬人，但会咬沙发、咬拖鞋、咬电线……总之家里的一切都是它们的磨牙棒。还有人戏称「如果二哈安静了，那它一定在干坏事」
myths.en: Some say Huskies don't bite people, which is partly true - they don't bite people, but they'll bite sofas, slippers, cables... Basically everything is their chew toy. Others joke 'If your Husky is quiet, they're definitely up to no good'

careTips.zh:
1. 每天至少2小时运动（划重点）
2. 不要养在太热的地方
3. 每周梳毛，换毛季每天梳
4. 出门必须牵绳！撒手就没
careTips.en:
1. At least 2 hours exercise daily (take notes!)
2. Don't keep in hot climates
3. Weekly brushing, daily during shedding
4. MUST leash! Off-leash = gone forever

temperament.zh: 小身材大能量！勇敢自信，跑起来像一颗快乐的面包。有女王般的气场和农民般的体力
temperament.en: Small body, big energy! Brave and confident, runs like a happy loaf. Royal presence with peasant stamina

diet.zh: 容易发胖！小短腿大肚腩很可爱但不健康。严格控制饮食
diet.en: Prone to weight gain! Short legs and big belly are cute but unhealthy. Strict diet control

habitat.zh: 适合公寓饲养，但每天仍需适量运动。注意保护脊椎，不要让它频繁上下楼梯
habitat.en: Apartment-friendly but still needs daily exercise. Protect their spine, avoid frequent stairs

appearance.zh: 小短腿、大圆耳、蜜桃屁股——走路时屁股一扭一扭的，是世界级的「治愈系」动物
appearance.en: Short legs, big round ears, peach butt - wiggles when walking, world-class 'healing' animal

history.zh: 英国女王伊丽莎白二世养了一辈子的柯基！据说她从1933年就开始养，一共养了30多只。柯基因此在英国成为皇室象征
history.en: Queen Elizabeth II kept Corgis her entire life! She started in 1933 and had over 30 in total. Corgis became a British royal symbol because of her

funFact.zh: 柯基跑起来的声音像「嗒嗒嗒嗒」，像是穿了双小高跟鞋在地板上跑。而且它们虽然腿短，但以前可是牧牛犬！小短腿在牛腿之间穿梭，够胆！
funFact.en: Corgis make a 'click-click-click' sound when running, like wearing tiny high heels on the floor. Despite short legs, they were herding dogs! Darting between cow legs with their stubby legs - brave!

myths.zh: 有人说柯基的屁股是世界上最好看的屁股——这个争议不大。但还有人说柯基用屁股发电——这个就太离谱了吧！不过它们精力确实像用不完一样。
myths.en: Some say Corgi butts are the best butts in the world - not much debate there. But some say Corgis generate electricity with their butts - that's too ridiculous! Though their energy does seem unlimited.

careTips.zh:
1. 控制体重！小短腿承受不了太多重量
2. 避免频繁上下楼梯，保护脊椎
3. 每天适量运动即可
4. 每周梳毛1-2次
careTips.en:
1. Weight control! Short legs can't bear too much weight
2. Avoid frequent stairs, protect spine
3. Moderate daily exercise is fine
4. Brush 1-2 times weekly

temperament.zh: 永远的微笑天使，对全世界都充满善意。但别被它的笑脸骗了——拆起家来不输哈士奇
temperament.en: The eternal smiling angel, full of goodwill toward the world. But don't be fooled by that smile - house destruction rivals Huskies

diet.zh: 耐寒犬种，消耗大。需要高蛋白高热量的食物，注意补充鱼油保持毛色洁白
diet.en: Cold-climate breed with high energy needs. High-protein high-calorie food, supplement with fish oil to keep coat white

habitat.zh: 凉爽环境最佳。夏天一定要开空调！每天需要1小时以上运动
habitat.en: Cool environment is best. AC is a must in summer! 1+ hours exercise daily

appearance.zh: 全身雪白，永远在微笑的「天使面孔」，毛茸茸的像个行走的棉花糖。但看起来像天使，有时候行为像恶魔
appearance.en: Pure white, eternally smiling 'angel face', fluffy as a walking marshmallow. Looks like an angel but sometimes acts like a demon

history.zh: 西伯利亚萨摩耶族人培育，用于拉雪橇和取暖。对，以前的人真的抱着萨摩耶睡觉来取暖！
history.en: Bred by the Samoyed people of Siberia for pulling sleds and warmth. Yes, people literally hugged them to sleep for warmth!

funFact.zh: 萨摩耶有三种表情：微笑、傻笑和大笑。从来没见过萨摩耶哭——可能因为它们的悲伤都被埋在了毛发里吧？😂
funFact.en: Samoyeds have three expressions: smile, silly grin, and big laugh. No one has ever seen a Samoyed cry - maybe their sadness is buried in all that fur? 😂

myths.zh: 有人说「萨摩耶微笑是因为它们比人类更懂快乐」——虽然很文艺，但其实它们的天生嘴型就那样。还有人说萨摩耶身上没有体味——这个倒是真的！它们是少数不怎么有狗味的狗。
myths.en: Some say 'Samoyeds smile because they understand happiness better than humans' - very poetic but it's just their natural mouth shape. Some say Samoyeds have no body odor - this is actually true! They're one of the few dogs with minimal doggy smell.

careTips.zh:
1. 每天梳毛！掉毛量惊人
2. 夏天一定注意降温
3. 洗完澡要彻底吹干，不然容易皮肤病
4. 保持毛色洁白，注意饮食
careTips.en:
1. Daily brushing! Shedding is惊人的
2. Must keep cool in summer
3. Thoroughly dry after bathing to prevent skin issues
4. Keep coat white, watch diet

temperament.zh: 忠诚、勇敢、聪明，是最全能的工作犬。对主人极度忠诚，对陌生人保持警惕，是天然的守护者
temperament.en: Loyal, brave, intelligent, the most versatile working dog. Extremely loyal to owner, wary of strangers, natural guardian

diet.zh: 需要高蛋白优质狗粮，运动量大需要充足热量。注意关节保护，适当补充软骨素
diet.en: High-protein premium dog food, high energy needs. Joint protection important, supplement with chondroitin

habitat.zh: 需要较大空间和每天充足运动。有院子的家最理想。不喜欢被关在小空间里
habitat.en: Needs ample space and daily exercise. Home with yard is ideal. Dislikes being confined in small spaces

appearance.zh: 黑棕色的经典毛色，竖立的耳朵，威武而优雅的体态。看起来像一个穿制服的军人，充满力量和智慧
appearance.en: Classic black-brown coat, erect ears, majestic yet elegant posture. Looks like a soldier in uniform, radiating strength and intelligence

history.zh: 1899年由德国骑兵上尉马克斯·冯·施特凡尼茨培育。原本是牧羊犬，后被用于警犬、军犬、导盲犬等。是世界上使用最广泛的工作犬
history.en: Bred in 1899 by German cavalry captain Max von Stephanitz. Originally herding dogs, later used as police, military, and guide dogs. The world's most widely used working dog

funFact.zh: 德国牧羊犬智商排名犬界第3！它们能学会超过200个指令词汇。有一只叫Rico的德牧能记住超过200个玩具的名字——比很多小朋友会的词汇都多！🧠
funFact.en: German Shepherds rank 3rd in dog intelligence! Can learn 200+ command words. A GSD named Rico remembered 200+ toy names - more than many kids know! 🧠

myths.zh: 「德牧很危险会咬人」——这是对训练不良德牧的偏见。实际上，一只 properly trained 的德牧非常稳重可靠，是优秀的家庭伴侣犬。 aggression 通常源于不当的繁殖和训练。
myths.en: 'GSDs are dangerous biters' - prejudice against poorly trained ones. Actually, a properly trained GSD is steady and reliable. Aggression usually stems from poor breeding and training.

careTips.zh:
1. 每天至少1-2小时运动
2. 每周梳毛2-3次，掉毛季每天梳
3. 注意髋关节发育不良（常见遗传病）
4. 从小就要开始社会化训练
5. 提供智力游戏满足高智商需求
careTips.en:
1. At least 1-2 hours exercise daily
2. Brush 2-3 times weekly, daily during shedding
3. Watch hip dysplasia (common inherited condition)
4. Socialization training from puppyhood
5. Provide puzzle toys for high intelligence

size.zh: 分迷你型、玩具型、标准型

temperament.zh: 犬界智商冠军，学什么都快。活泼聪明、极少掉毛、不易过敏，被称为最接近完美的伴侣犬
temperament.en: Dog intelligence champion, learns everything fast. Lively, smart, minimal shedding, hypoallergenic, called the closest to perfect companion dog

diet.zh: 体型差异大按体型喂食。迷你型注意牙齿健康，标准型注意关节
diet.en: Feed according to size. Miniatures watch dental health, Standards watch joints

habitat.zh: 迷你型和玩具型适合公寓，标准型需要更多空间。都喜欢水，游泳是很好的运动
habitat.en: Miniature and Toy for apartments, Standard needs more space. All love water, swimming is great exercise

appearance.zh: 卷曲的毛可以修剪成各种造型。泰迪造型（圆脸圆头）在中国最受欢迎，看起来像一个毛绒玩具活了过来
appearance.en: Curly coat can be styled in many ways. 'Teddy cut' (round face and head) is most popular in China, looks like a plush toy come to life

history.zh: 最初是水猎犬，专门帮猎人从水里捡回猎物。名字来自德语「pudeln」意为溅水。贵族造型最初是为了让关节保暖，不是纯装饰
history.en: Originally water retrievers, helped hunters retrieve game from water. Name from German 'pudeln' meaning to splash. Show clips originally kept joints warm, not just decorative

funFact.zh: 贵宾犬智商排名犬界第2，仅次于边境牧羊犬！它们能理解复杂的指令组合，有只贵宾犬甚至学会了骑滑板车——是的，真正的滑板车！🛴
funFact.en: Poodles rank 2nd in dog intelligence, after Border Collies! They understand complex command combinations. One Poodle even learned to ride a scooter - yes, a real scooter! 🛴

myths.zh: 「泰迪是品种名」——其实不是！泰迪是一种修剪造型，品种是贵宾犬。就像理发一样，同样的贵宾犬剪不同造型可以完全不同。
myths.en: 'Teddy is a breed name' - not true! Teddy is a grooming style, the breed is Poodle. Same Poodle with different haircuts can look completely different.

careTips.zh:
1. 每4-6周需要专业美容修剪
2. 每天梳理防止打结
3. 极少掉毛但需要定期护理
4. 注意耳道清洁（垂耳犬易发耳病）
5. 智商高，需要智力刺激
careTips.en:
1. Professional grooming every 4-6 weeks
2. Daily brushing to prevent matting
3. Minimal shedding but needs regular care
4. Clean ears regularly (floppy ears prone to infection)
5. High intelligence needs mental stimulation

temperament.zh: 小丑性格，爱搞笑。安静不爱吠叫，特别喜欢和主人亲近。虽然名字带斗牛但实际温柔得像棉花
temperament.en: Clown personality, loves being funny. Quiet, rarely barks, loves being close to owner. Despite 'bull' in the name, gentle as cotton

diet.zh: 容易发胖！控制饮食非常重要。选择低脂狗粮，避免高热量零食
diet.en: Prone to obesity! Diet control is crucial. Choose low-fat dog food, avoid high-calorie treats

habitat.zh: 最适合公寓的犬种之一！运动量小，每天短时间散步就够。但怕热，夏天必须吹空调
habitat.en: One of the best apartment dogs! Low exercise needs, short daily walks suffice. But hates heat, AC in summer is essential

appearance.zh: 蝙蝠状的大耳朵、扁扁的脸、矮壮的身体、短短的尾巴。看起来像一只穿西装的小胖子，萌力爆表
appearance.en: Bat-like large ears, flat face, short stocky body, stubby tail. Looks like a little guy in a suit, off-the-charts cute

history.zh: 19世纪由英国玩具斗牛犬带到法国后培育而来。最初是巴黎蕾丝工人的伴侣犬，后来被上流社会接受，成为时尚宠儿
history.en: Bred in 19th century France from English Toy Bulldogs brought over. Originally lace workers' companions in Paris, later adopted by high society, becoming a fashion icon

funFact.zh: 法斗睡觉时会打呼噜——而且声音之大能让隔壁都听见！因为它们的短鼻腔结构，呼吸时会发出各种声音：打鼾、叹气、甚至像在「说话」。是狗界的「睡歌之王」
funFact.en: Frenchies snore loudly when sleeping - loud enough for neighbors to hear! Short nasal structure creates various sounds: snoring, sighing, even 'talking'. The 'king of sleep songs' of dogs

myths.zh: 「法斗很凶猛因为是斗牛犬」——法斗虽然祖先确实是斗牛犬，但经过百年的培育，它们的性格已经非常温柔。现在一只法斗最大的攻击力大概就是用脸压扁你。
myths.en: 'Frenchies are fierce because they're bulldogs' - while ancestors were indeed bulldogs, centuries of breeding made them extremely gentle. A Frenchie's biggest attack is probably face-smothering you.

careTips.zh:
1. ⚠️ 怕热！夏天严禁暴晒，保持凉爽
2. 控制体重，肥胖加重呼吸困难
3. 每天清洁面部褶皱
4. 运动不要剧烈，短时间散步即可
5. 注意呼吸道健康，定期体检
careTips.en:
1. ⚠️ Heat-sensitive! No sun exposure in summer, keep cool
2. Weight control, obesity worsens breathing
3. Daily face fold cleaning
4. No intense exercise, short walks only
5. Watch respiratory health, regular checkups

temperament.zh: 犬界智商冠军，聪明到让你怀疑它是人装的。精力无限，有强烈的牧羊本能，甚至会试图「放牧」小孩子
temperament.en: Dog intelligence champion, so smart you'll wonder if a human is inside. Unlimited energy, strong herding instinct, may try to 'herd' children

diet.zh: 运动量大需要高蛋白高能量饮食。注意营养均衡
diet.en: High exercise needs require high-protein high-energy diet. Balanced nutrition important

habitat.zh: 最不适合公寓的犬种之一！需要大空间和大量运动。最好有院子或农场
habitat.en: One of the least apartment-suited breeds! Needs large space and lots of exercise. Yard or farm ideal

appearance.zh: 黑白最经典，也有棕色、蓝陨石色等。眼神专注锐利，看起来就像一个穿着毛皮外套的大学教授
appearance.en: Black-white is classic, also brown, blue merle, etc. Intense focused gaze, looks like a professor in a fur coat

history.zh: 源自苏格兰和英格兰边境地区，专门培育用于放牧羊群。名字中的「border」就是指英格兰和苏格兰的边境。是最优秀的牧羊犬
history.en: From the Scotland-England border region, bred specifically for herding sheep. 'Border' refers to the England-Scotland border. The finest herding dog

funFact.zh: 边牧能记住1000多个单词！有一只叫Chaser的边牧能辨认1022个玩具的名字，不仅能区分名词，还能按类别分类。科学家说它的理解能力相当于一个3岁小孩！🎓
funFact.en: Border Collies can remember 1000+ words! One named Chaser recognized 1022 toy names, distinguished nouns and categorized them. Scientists say her comprehension equals a 3-year-old! 🎓

myths.zh: 「聪明狗就好养」——对边牧恰恰相反！太聪明反而难养，如果运动和智力刺激不够，它们会自己「找事做」——通常是把家拆了。养边牧之前请确保你有足够的时间和精力。
myths.en: 'Smart dogs are easy to keep' - the opposite for Border Collies! Too smart means harder to keep. Without exercise and mental stimulation, they'll 'find things to do' - usually destroying the house.

careTips.zh:
1. 每天至少2小时运动+智力游戏
2. 不适合新手养犬者
3. 需要大量训练和互动
4. 提供飞盘、接球等运动
5. 如果没时间陪伴，请不要养边牧
careTips.en:
1. At least 2 hours exercise + mental games daily
2. Not for first-time dog owners
3. Needs lots of training and interaction
4. Provide frisbee, fetch and more
5. If you can't dedicate time, don't get a Border Collie

temperament.zh: 性格独立、有自己的想法，不会无条件服从。但忠诚度极高，被称为「猫系狗」。著名的doge表情包就是柴犬！
temperament.en: Independent, has own mind, won't unconditionally obey. But extremely loyal, called a 'cat-like dog'. The famous Doge meme is a Shiba Inu!

diet.zh: 食量不大但挑食。选择优质狗粮，避免零食过多
diet.en: Small appetite but can be picky. Choose premium dog food, avoid too many treats

habitat.zh: 适合公寓饲养，但每天仍需散步。注意出门必须牵绳——柴犬撒手就没是出了名的
habitat.en: Apartment-friendly but needs daily walks. MUST leash - Shibas are notorious for running off when off-leash

appearance.zh: 三角形立耳、卷尾巴、浓密的赤色短毛。看起来像一只小狐狸，是表情包界的「顶流」
appearance.en: Triangular erect ears, curled tail, dense reddish short coat. Looks like a little fox, the 'top star' of memes

history.zh: 日本最古老的犬种之一，已有3000年历史。最初用于狩猎小型动物。二战后濒临灭绝，经过拯救才恢复数量。是日本的天然纪念物
history.en: One of Japan's oldest dog breeds, 3000 years of history. Originally for hunting small game. Nearly extinct after WWII, saved through breeding efforts. A Japanese natural monument

funFact.zh: Doge表情包的柴犬叫Kabosu！这只住在日本的柴犬因为一脸「震惊」的表情火遍全球。柴犬也是比特币的吉祥物——没错，那个价值几百亿的狗头就是柴犬！💰
funFact.en: The Doge meme Shiba is named Kabosu! This Japanese Shiba went viral with her 'shocked' expression. Shibas are also Bitcoin's mascot - yes, that multi-billion dollar dog is a Shiba! 💰

myths.zh: 「柴犬会微笑」——柴犬确实会做出类似微笑的表情，但那是它们放松时的嘴部肌肉状态，不是真的在表达快乐。不过看着它们「微笑」确实让人心情变好！
myths.en: 'Shibas smile' - they do make smile-like expressions, but it's relaxed facial muscles, not actually expressing happiness. Though seeing them 'smile' does make people happy!

careTips.zh:
1. 出门必须牵绳！自由跑会不回来
2. 每年春秋换毛季掉毛严重
3. 需要早期社会化训练
4. 独立性强，不适合想养「听话狗」的人
5. 空气层毛发防水但需要定期梳理
careTips.en:
1. MUST leash! Off-leash means they won't come back
2. Heavy shedding in spring and fall
3. Early socialization training needed
4. Very independent, not for those wanting an 'obedient dog'
5. Double coat is waterproof but needs regular brushing

temperament.zh: 狗界的「开心果」，性格憨厚开朗。每时每刻都在卖萌，永远不会让你不开心。唯一的缺点是太容易满足，哪怕只是一块饼干就能让它乐半天
temperament.en: The 'jester' of dogs, cheerful and goofy. Constantly cute, never fails to make you smile. Only downside: too easily pleased, a single cookie makes their day

diet.zh: 超级容易发胖！控制饮食是第一要务。不要因为它们用可怜的眼神看你就给零食
diet.en: Super prone to obesity! Diet control is priority #1. Don't give treats just because of those puppy eyes

habitat.zh: 适合公寓，运动量小。但怕热怕冷，温度要适宜
habitat.en: Apartment-friendly, low exercise. Sensitive to heat and cold, moderate temperature needed

appearance.zh: 扁扁的脸、大眼睛、卷尾巴、满脸褶皱。看起来像一只迷你的外星生物，丑萌丑萌的
appearance.en: Flat face, big eyes, curly tail, full of wrinkles. Looks like a mini alien creature, ugly-cute

history.zh: 源自中国，有超过2500年历史。是中国古代皇室的宠物，后来传入欧洲。维多利亚时代在英国大受欢迎
history.en: Originated in China, over 2500 years of history. Chinese imperial pet, later brought to Europe. Popular in Victorian England

funFact.zh: 巴哥犬是唯一的狗品种能拿到OBE勋章（官佐勋章）！一只叫Otto的巴哥犬在电影《功夫熊猫》首映礼上获得了这个荣誉。中国古代的巴哥犬地位也很高，只有皇室才能饲养
funFact.en: Pugs are the only dog breed to receive an OBE! A Pug named Otto received this honor at the Kung Fu Panda premiere. Ancient Chinese Pugs were so prestigious only royalty could own them

myths.zh: 中国古代传说巴哥犬是佛祖的伙伴，因为它们额头上的皱纹像佛祖的智慧纹。传说养巴哥能带来平安和好运。
myths.en: Ancient Chinese legend says Pugs were Buddha's companions because their forehead wrinkles resemble Buddha's wisdom lines. Said to bring peace and good luck.

careTips.zh:
1. 每天清洁面部褶皱防感染
2. 严格控制饮食防肥胖
3. 避免高温环境
4. 注意眼部健康，大眼睛容易受伤
5. 每天短时间散步即可
careTips.en:
1. Daily face wrinkle cleaning to prevent infection
2. Strict diet control for obesity prevention
3. Avoid high temperature environments
4. Watch eye health, large eyes prone to injury
5. Short daily walks sufficient

temperament.zh: 天生的快乐小猎犬，友善到能和任何人做朋友。嗅觉超级灵敏，一旦闻到感兴趣的气味就走不动路
temperament.en: Natural happy hound, friendly enough to befriend anyone. Super sensitive nose, once they catch an interesting scent, they won't move

diet.zh: 什么都要尝一口的美食家。控制食量很重要，因为它们永远不会自己说「够了」
diet.en: Will taste anything, natural foodie. Portion control is key because they never say 'enough'

habitat.zh: 适合有院子的家，公寓也可但要保证充足运动。出门一定要牵绳——鼻子比服从心强
habitat.en: Yard preferred, apartments okay with enough exercise. MUST leash - nose overrides obedience

appearance.zh: 三色（黑白棕）的经典花色，大耳朵耷拉着，眼睛又大又圆。是 Snoopy 史努比的原型！
appearance.en: Classic tricolor (black-white-brown), large droopy ears, big round eyes. The real-life model for Snoopy!

history.zh: 历史悠久的小猎犬品种，专门用于追猎兔子。伊丽莎白一世就养过比格犬。现代仍被广泛用于嗅探工作，如机场安检
history.en: Ancient hound breed, specialized in rabbit hunting. Queen Elizabeth I owned Beagles. Still widely used in detection work like airport security

funFact.zh: 史努比的原型就是比格犬！漫画家舒尔茨养过一只叫Snoopy的比格犬。而且比格犬的鼻子有多灵敏呢？它们能闻出地雷和非法食物——比很多电子仪器还准！
funFact.en: Snoopy is modeled after Beagles! Cartoonist Schulz had a Beagle named Snoopy. How sensitive are their noses? They can detect landmines and illegal food - more accurate than many electronic devices!

myths.zh: 「比格犬很安静」——恰恰相反！它们会发出各种叫声：嚎叫、吠叫、呜呜叫。尤其是在追踪气味时，那个声音能传遍整条街。
myths.en: 'Beagles are quiet' - the opposite! They make various sounds: howling, barking, whining. Especially when tracking scents, the sound carries down the whole street.

careTips.zh:
1. 出门必须牵绳！鼻子太灵敏容易跑丢
2. 每天充足运动
3. 耳朵大容易感染，定期清洁
4. 注意体重控制
5. 大耳朵下垂，需要经常检查耳道
careTips.en:
1. MUST leash! Nose too sensitive, will wander off
2. Ample daily exercise
3. Large ears prone to infection, regular cleaning
4. Weight management
5. Floppy ears need regular ear canal checks

temperament.zh: 小身材大勇气的猎犬！勇敢固执，有时胆子大到敢挑战大狗。性格活泼好奇，非常粘主人
temperament.en: Small body, big courage! Brave and stubborn, sometimes brave enough to challenge big dogs. Lively, curious, very clingy to owner

diet.zh: 注意控制体重！长身体的短腿承受不了额外重量。肥胖会严重加重脊椎负担
diet.en: Weight control is crucial! Long body on short legs can't handle extra weight. Obesity seriously strains the spine

habitat.zh: 适合公寓，运动量适中。但要注意避免频繁上下楼梯，保护脊椎
habitat.en: Apartment-friendly, moderate exercise. Avoid frequent stairs, protect spine

appearance.zh: 超长的身体+超短的腿=行走的香肠！圆滚滚的大眼睛， floppy 耳朵。有三种毛型：短毛、刚毛、长毛
appearance.en: Extra long body + super short legs = walking sausage! Round big eyes, floppy ears. Three coat types: smooth, wire, long-haired

history.zh: 德语「Dachshund」意为「獾犬」，因为它们就是用来钻进獾洞追捕獾的！矮小的身材正好能在地下隧道里穿梭。已有600多年历史
history.en: German 'Dachshund' means 'badger dog' because they were bred to enter badger dens! Low body perfect for underground tunnels. 600+ years of history

funFact.zh: 腊肠犬曾创下一项吉尼斯纪录——一只叫Otto的腊肠犬是世界上最长的狗！从鼻子到尾巴有1.5米长。而它的高度只有20cm——长宽比简直是犬界的面条！🌭
funFact.en: A Dachshund holds a Guinness record - Otto was the world's longest dog! 1.5 meters nose to tail, only 20cm tall. The length-to-height ratio makes them the 'noodle' of dogs! 🌭

myths.zh: 「腊肠犬是小号的普通狗」——不对，腊肠犬是专门为了钻洞而培育的猎犬，它们的身体比例是独特适应进化的结果，不是为了可爱。
myths.en: 'Dachshunds are miniature regular dogs' - wrong, they were specifically bred for tunnel hunting. Their body proportions are a result of adaptive evolution, not for cuteness.

careTips.zh:
1. 严格控制体重！保护脊椎最重要
2. 避免频繁上下楼梯和跳跃
3. 不要提着前腿抱起来
4. 三种毛型需要不同程度的护理
5. 每天适量散步
careTips.en:
1. Strict weight control! Spine protection is #1
2. Avoid frequent stairs and jumping
3. Never lift by front legs
4. Three coat types need different care levels
5. Moderate daily walks

temperament.zh: 精力充沛的「马拉松选手」，永远有用不完的活力。聪明但有时固执，对主人忠诚
temperament.en: Energetic 'marathon runner', endless energy. Smart but sometimes stubborn, loyal to owner

diet.zh: 幼犬时期需要特别注意饮食——达尔马提亚犬有尿酸结石的遗传倾向，需要低嘌呤饮食
diet.en: Puppies need special diet - Dalmatians have genetic tendency for urate stones, need low-purine diet

habitat.zh: 需要大量运动空间，不适合小公寓。每天至少1-2小时剧烈运动
habitat.en: Needs lots of exercise space, not for small apartments. At least 1-2 hours vigorous exercise daily

appearance.zh: 白底黑斑点，像穿了件波点衣。每只斑点狗的斑点分布都独一无二，就像人的指纹
appearance.en: White coat with black spots, like wearing polka dots. Every Dalmatian's spot pattern is unique, like fingerprints

history.zh: 最著名的身份是「消防犬」——曾经跟在消防马车后面奔跑开道。迪士尼电影《101忠狗》让全世界认识了它
history.en: Best known as 'fire dogs' - once ran ahead of fire carriages to clear the way. Disney's '101 Dalmatians' made them world-famous

funFact.zh: 达尔马提亚犬刚出生时全身雪白，斑点是出生后2-3周才开始出现的！像是一幅画慢慢被填满。而且它们的斑点会一直变化到成年才定型 🎨
funFact.en: Dalmatian puppies are born completely white! Spots appear 2-3 weeks after birth, like a painting slowly being filled in. Spots keep changing until adulthood 🎨

myths.zh: 「斑点狗天生是消防犬」——其实它们是被训练来执行这个任务的。最初的用途更多是 carriage dog（马车犬），跟着贵族的马车跑，保护马匹和行李。
myths.en: 'Dalmatians are born fire dogs' - actually trained for this role. Originally carriage dogs, running with noble carriages, protecting horses and luggage.

careTips.zh:
1. 每天大量运动
2. ⚠️ 需要低嘌呤饮食防结石
3. 短毛好打理，每周刷一次
4. 注意听力问题（约10%先天耳聋）
5. 早期社会化训练很重要
careTips.en:
1. Lots of daily exercise
2. ⚠️ Low-purine diet to prevent stones
3. Short coat easy care, brush weekly
4. Watch hearing (~10% born deaf)
5. Early socialization important

temperament.zh: 聪明警觉、精力充沛，像个小老头一样严肃但其实很贪玩。对家人忠诚，看家一流
temperament.en: Smart and alert, energetic, looks serious like a little old man but very playful. Loyal to family, excellent watchdog

diet.zh: 选择优质狗粮，迷你型注意体重管理。标准型和巨型需要高蛋白饮食
diet.en: Premium dog food, miniatures watch weight. Standards and Giants need high protein

habitat.zh: 迷你型适合公寓，标准型和巨型需要更多空间。都喜欢运动
habitat.en: Miniatures for apartments, Standards and Giants need more space. All enjoy exercise

appearance.zh: 标志性的长眉毛和胡子，看起来像戴了假胡子的老人。耳朵可以裁切也可以自然垂下。有椒盐色、黑色、银色等
appearance.en: Iconic long eyebrows and beard, looks like a little old man with a fake mustache. Ears can be cropped or natural. Colors: salt-pepper, black, silver, etc.

history.zh: 源自15世纪的德国，最初是农场多功能犬——抓老鼠、看家、牧羊都行。名字来源于德语「Schnauze」（口鼻）
history.en: From 15th century Germany, originally multi-purpose farm dogs - ratting, guarding, herding. Named from German 'Schnauze' (snout)

funFact.zh: 雪纳瑞是「狗界的威尔·史密斯」——因为那标志性的浓眉大胡子！很多人第一次看到雪纳瑞都以为它是只被画了胡子的小狗。但其实那是天生的！👴
funFact.en: Schnauzers are the 'Will Smith of dogs' - iconic thick brows and mustache! Many think someone drew a mustache on them, but it's natural! 👴

myths.zh: 「雪纳瑞不会掉毛」——基本正确！它们的毛质更像头发而不是狗毛，掉毛量极低，适合对狗毛过敏的人（但仍不是完全不过敏）。
myths.en: 'Schnauzers don't shed' - mostly true! Their coat is more like hair than fur, minimal shedding, good for mild dog allergies (still not 100% hypoallergenic).

careTips.zh:
1. 每4-6周需要美容修剪
2. 每天梳理胡须防止打结和脏污
3. 迷你型适合公寓
4. 注意耳道清洁
5. 聪明好训练，但有时倔强
careTips.en:
1. Professional grooming every 4-6 weeks
2. Daily beard brushing to prevent tangles
3. Miniatures apartment-friendly
4. Regular ear cleaning
5. Smart and trainable but sometimes stubborn

temperament.zh: 最小的犬种但有着最大的脾气！对主人超级粘人，对陌生人可能会很凶。是典型的「小狗综合症」代表
temperament.en: Smallest breed but biggest personality! Super clingy to owner, can be fierce to strangers. Classic 'small dog syndrome' representative

diet.zh: 食量极小，选择小型犬专用粮。注意不要喂人类食物，肠胃很娇弱
diet.en: Tiny appetite, choose small breed formula. Avoid human food, delicate stomach

habitat.zh: 最适合公寓的犬种之一！运动量小，室内玩耍就够。但怕冷，冬天需要衣服
habitat.en: One of the best apartment dogs! Low exercise, indoor play suffices. But hates cold, needs clothes in winter

appearance.zh: 苹果形的圆脑袋、水汪汪的大眼睛、尖耳朵。有短毛和长毛两种。小到可以放进口袋或包包里
appearance.en: Apple-shaped round head, big watery eyes, pointy ears. Short and long coat varieties. Small enough to fit in a pocket or purse

history.zh: 名字来自墨西哥的奇瓦瓦州。被认为是阿兹特克文明的托尔特克犬的后代，在古代美洲有神圣地位
history.en: Named after Chihuahua state in Mexico. Believed to descend from Techichi dogs of Aztec civilization, held sacred status in ancient Americas

funFact.zh: 吉娃娃是世界上最小的犬种！最小的吉娃娃记录只有10cm高，比一部手机还小。它们还经常被看到骑着大狗——是的，吉娃娃以为自己比实际大得多！📱
funFact.en: Chihuahuas are the world's smallest dog breed! The smallest on record was only 10cm tall, smaller than a phone. They're often seen riding big dogs - yes, Chihuahuas think they're much bigger than they are! 📱

myths.zh: 阿兹特克人相信吉娃娃能在人死后引导灵魂到冥界——因此在阿兹特克文化中，吉娃娃不仅不是宠物，而是神圣的精神向导。
myths.en: Aztecs believed Chihuahuas could guide souls to the afterlife - so in Aztec culture, they weren't pets but sacred spiritual guides.

careTips.zh:
1. 注意保暖，冬天穿衣服
2. 骨骼娇嫩，避免从高处跳下
3. 不要因为体型小就溺爱
4. 需要早期社会化训练防止攻击性
5. 牙齿问题常见，定期口腔检查
careTips.en:
1. Keep warm, wear clothes in winter
2. Fragile bones, avoid jumping from heights
3. Don't spoil just because small
4. Early socialization to prevent aggression
5. Common dental issues, regular checkups

temperament.zh: 外表威猛内心温柔，对家人极其忠诚。优秀的家庭护卫犬，天生有保护欲。经proper训练后非常稳重可靠
temperament.en: Tough exterior, gentle heart, extremely loyal to family. Excellent family guardian, natural protectiveness. Very steady and reliable with proper training

diet.zh: 大型犬需要充足的高蛋白饮食。注意关节保护，适当补充钙质和软骨素
diet.en: Large dog needs ample high-protein diet. Joint protection important, supplement calcium and chondroitin

habitat.zh: 需要大空间和有经验的主人。有院子最理想。不适合新手饲养
habitat.en: Needs large space and experienced owner. Yard is ideal. Not for first-time owners

appearance.zh: 黑色底毛配上铁锈色的标记，强壮有力的体格。走路时充满力量感，让人第一眼就感到安全感
appearance.en: Black coat with rust-colored markings, powerful muscular build. Walks with strength, gives sense of security at first sight

history.zh: 罗马帝国军犬的后裔，名字来源于德国小镇罗特维尔。最初用来赶牛群和拉肉铺的推车，后来成为优秀的警犬和护卫犬
history.en: Descended from Roman military dogs, named after German town Rottweil. Originally herded cattle and pulled butcher carts, later became excellent police and guard dogs

funFact.zh: 罗威纳犬是「温柔的巨人」——虽然外表吓人，但很多罗威纳会让小猫骑在背上，或者在小孩旁边安静地当枕头。力量和温柔在它们身上完美结合 💪❤️
funFact.en: Rottweilers are 'gentle giants' - despite scary looks, many let kittens ride their backs or quietly serve as pillows for kids. Strength and gentleness perfectly combined 💪❤️

myths.zh: 「罗威纳很危险」——未经训练的任何大型犬都有风险。实际上，经过良好训练和 socialization 的罗威纳是非常可靠的家庭犬，很多罗威纳在治疗犬项目中表现出色。
myths.en: 'Rottweilers are dangerous' - any untrained large dog poses risk. Well-trained and socialized Rottweilers are very reliable family dogs, many excel in therapy dog programs.

careTips.zh:
1. 必须从小进行社会化训练
2. 需要有经验的主人
3. 每天充足运动
4. 注意髋关节健康
5. 需要明确的主人领导力
careTips.en:
1. Socialization from puppyhood essential
2. Needs experienced owner
3. Ample daily exercise
4. Watch hip joint health
5. Needs clear leadership

temperament.zh: 比哈士奇更大的「拆家大队」，性格憨厚友善但极其固执。力量大得惊人，是犬界「重型卡车」
temperament.en: Bigger 'demolition squad' than Huskies, good-natured but extremely stubborn. Incredibly strong, the 'heavy truck' of dogs

diet.zh: 食量惊人，需要高蛋白高脂肪饮食。冬天可以适当增加热量摄入
diet.en: Enormous appetite, needs high-protein high-fat diet. Can increase calories in winter

habitat.zh: 需要大量空间和运动。不适合公寓。凉爽环境最佳，夏天必须降温
habitat.en: Needs lots of space and exercise. Not for apartments. Cool environment best, summer cooling essential

appearance.zh: 比哈士奇更大更壮实，毛色多为灰白或黑白。厚实的双层毛和浓密的尾巴，看起来像一只温顺的灰狼
appearance.en: Larger and stockier than Huskies, mostly grey-white or black-white. Thick double coat and bushy tail, looks like a tame grey wolf

history.zh: 因阿拉斯加的马拉缪特族（Mahlemut）而得名，是该族培育的雪橇犬。是力量型雪橇犬，用来拉重物（和哈士奇的速度型不同）
history.en: Named after Alaska's Mahlemut tribe, who bred them as sled dogs. Power sled dogs for heavy loads (unlike speed-focused Huskies)

funFact.zh: 阿拉斯加和哈士奇的最大区别不是体型，而是性格——阿拉斯加更加「一根筋」，一旦决定要做什么，十头牛都拉不回来。养阿拉斯加就像养了一个有自己想法的大力士！🏋️
funFact.en: Biggest difference from Huskies isn't size but personality - Malamutes are more single-minded. Once they decide something, nothing can stop them. Like raising a strongman with a mind of their own! 🏋️

myths.zh: 「阿拉斯加就是大号的哈士奇」——虽然长得像，但它们是不同的品种。阿拉斯加是力量型，哈士奇是速度型。就像卡车和跑车的区别。
myths.en: 'Malamutes are big Huskies' - while similar looking, they're different breeds. Malamutes are power-type, Huskies are speed-type. Like a truck vs a sports car.

careTips.zh:
1. 每天至少2小时运动
2. 每周梳毛2-3次，换毛季每天
3. 夏天严格降温
4. 需要高围栏，它们是挖洞高手
5. 固执，需要耐心训练
careTips.en:
1. At least 2 hours exercise daily
2. Brush 2-3 times weekly, daily during shedding
3. Strict cooling in summer
4. Needs tall fencing, expert diggers
5. Stubborn, needs patient training

temperament.zh: 忠诚的化身！对主人忠心不二，但对陌生人保持高度警惕。独立自主，有强烈的意志力
temperament.en: The embodiment of loyalty! Completely devoted to owner, highly wary of strangers. Independent with strong willpower

diet.zh: 大型犬需要优质高蛋白狗粮。注意控制体重
diet.en: Large dog needs premium high-protein food. Watch weight

habitat.zh: 需要较大空间和有经验的主人。适合有院子的家。不适合没有养犬经验的新手
habitat.en: Needs ample space and experienced owner. Home with yard ideal. Not for novice owners

appearance.zh: 厚实的双层毛、立耳、卷尾、熊一样的面容。看起来像一只会行走的毛绒熊，威严又可爱
appearance.en: Thick double coat, erect ears, curled tail, bear-like face. Looks like a walking plush bear, majestic yet adorable

history.zh: 日本的国犬，有300年历史。最著名的是忠犬八公的故事——一只秋田犬在主人去世后在车站等了整整9年。秋田犬因此成为忠诚的象征
history.en: Japan's national dog, 300 years of history. Most famous is Hachiko - an Akita who waited at the station for 9 years after his owner died. Akitas became the symbol of loyalty

funFact.zh: 忠犬八公是真实故事！1924年一只秋田犬八公每天送教授主人上火车，教授去世后，八公在涩谷车站等了9年9个月直到自己去世。现在涩谷车站还有八公的铜像，是日本最著名的地标之一 🗼
funFact.en: Hachiko is a true story! In 1924, an Akita named Hachiko walked his professor owner to the station daily. After the professor died, Hachiko waited at Shibuya station for 9 years and 9 months. There's a bronze statue there today, one of Japan's most famous landmarks 🗼

myths.zh: 日本传统中，新生儿会收到秋田犬的小雕像，象征健康长寿。在日本，送秋田犬雕像代表最真诚的祝福和最深的敬意。
myths.en: In Japanese tradition, newborns receive small Akita figurines symbolizing health and longevity. Giving an Akita figurine represents the most sincere blessing and deepest respect.

careTips.zh:
1. 必须从小进行社会化训练
2. 每天充足运动
3. 每周梳毛，换毛季每天梳
4. 需要有经验的训练者
5. 对其他动物可能有攻击性，注意管理
careTips.en:
1. Socialization from puppyhood essential
2. Ample daily exercise
3. Brush weekly, daily during shedding
4. Needs experienced handler
5. May be aggressive to other animals, manage carefully

temperament.zh: 忠诚护主，聪明伶俐，看家本领一流。性格温顺但对陌生人警惕，是农村最常见的伙伴犬。现在越来越多的城市人也爱上这种「国犬」
temperament.en: Loyal, smart, excellent guard dogs. Gentle with family but wary of strangers, the most common companion dog in rural China. Increasingly loved by city dwellers as our 'national dog'

diet.zh: 什么都吃，适应力超强，是最不挑食的狗。但也要注意营养均衡，不能只喂剩饭剩菜
diet.en: Eats practically anything, extremely adaptable, the least picky eater. But still need balanced nutrition, don't only feed leftovers

habitat.zh: 适应任何环境，从农村院落到城市公寓。需要一定的运动空间
habitat.en: Adapts to any environment, from rural yards to city apartments. Needs some exercise space

appearance.zh: 长相多样，黄狗最经典。中等体型，竖耳朵，卷尾巴，毛发短密。长相朴实但精神抖擞，是典型的东方犬外观
appearance.en: Varied appearance, yellow is the classic color. Medium build, erect ears, curled tail, short dense coat. Plain but spirited-looking, typical East Asian dog appearance

history.zh: 中国本土犬种，有三千多年历史，是陪伴中华文明发展的最古老犬种之一。曾经遍布全国城乡，被称为「大黄」「小黑」等朴素名字。近年国人对本土犬种的认同感不断增强
history.en: Chinese native breed with 3000+ years of history, one of the oldest dog breeds alongside Chinese civilization. Once found across all of China, affectionately called 'Big Yellow' or 'Little Black'. Growing pride in native breeds in recent years

funFact.zh: 中华田园犬是基因最多样化的犬种之一，因为没有经过人工严格选育，保留了更多原始犬的基因。研究发现田园犬的肠胃消化能力比纯种狗更强！被称为「国犬」当之无愧
funFact.en: Chinese Rural Dogs have some of the most diverse genetics of any dog breed, as they weren't heavily selectively bred, retaining more primitive dog genes. Studies show their digestion is stronger than purebreds! Truly worthy of being called 'national dog'

myths.zh: 民间传说狗来富，有狗来家里意味着财运到来。还说狗能看到鬼怪，半夜狗叫是有「东西」经过。古语「狗来富，猫来穷」在中国流传很广。
myths.en: Folklore says a dog arriving means wealth is coming. Also believed dogs can see spirits, midnight barking means 'something' is passing by. The old saying 'dog brings wealth, cat brings poverty' is widely known in China.

careTips.zh:
1. 体质强健，但也要定期打疫苗
2. 每天保证30分钟以上户外活动
3. 注意社会化训练，减少对陌生人的攻击性
4. 定期驱虫
5. 梳理短毛，保持整洁
careTips.en:
1. Hardy constitution, but still needs regular vaccinations
2. 30+ minutes outdoor activity daily
3. Socialization training to reduce wariness of strangers
4. Regular deworming
5. Brush short coat, keep clean

taxonomy.species: 家犬 C. l. familiaris (Chinese Rural Dog)

temperament.zh: 高贵傲娇，曾经是只属于皇帝的狗！性格倔强但有主见，对主人非常忠诚。自带「皇家气质」
temperament.en: Noble and proud, once exclusively owned by emperors! Stubborn but opinionated, very loyal to their owner. Comes with built-in 'royal attitude'

diet.zh: 少食多餐，注意体重控制。扁脸品种容易消化不良，建议选择小颗粒狗粮
diet.en: Small frequent meals, watch weight. Flat-faced breeds prone to indigestion, choose small kibble

habitat.zh: 非常适合公寓，运动量小。但怕热怕潮，需要凉爽干燥的环境
habitat.en: Great apartment dog, low exercise needs. But sensitive to heat and humidity, needs cool dry environment

appearance.zh: 扁脸大眼，长毛飘逸，前肢比后肢略短。走起路来像滚动的小狮子。毛色丰富，金色最珍贵
appearance.en: Flat face with big eyes, flowing long coat, front legs slightly shorter than hind legs. Walks like a rolling little lion. Various coat colors, gold is most prized

history.zh: 中国最古老的犬种之一，有两千多年历史。唐代就是皇宫宠犬，清朝慈禧太后最爱的犬种。1860年英法联军攻入北京后将京巴带到欧洲，立刻引起轰动
history.en: One of China's oldest dog breeds, 2000+ years of history. Royal pet since Tang Dynasty, Empress Dowager Cixi's favorite. Brought to Europe by Anglo-French forces in 1860, immediately caused a sensation

funFact.zh: 在中国古代，偷一只京巴犬是要杀头的！它们被视为皇家圣物，只有皇帝和皇室成员才能饲养。八国联军攻入北京后，慈禧太后的京巴犬被英国士兵发现，后来被送给维多利亚女王
funFact.en: In ancient China, stealing a Pekingese was punishable by death! They were considered imperial treasures, only royalty could own them. After the Eight-Nation Alliance captured Beijing, Cixi's Pekingese was found by a British soldier and later given to Queen Victoria

myths.zh: 传说京巴犬是狮子和猴子的化身，所以长着狮子的毛和猴子的脸。另一个传说是佛祖让狮子缩小变成京巴来陪伴孤独的修行者。
myths.en: Legend says Pekingese are incarnations of lions and monkeys, hence the lion's mane and monkey-like face. Another story says Buddha asked a lion to shrink into a Pekingese to accompany a lonely monk.

careTips.zh:
1. 长毛需每天梳理，防止打结
2. 注意面部清洁，防止眼部分泌物
3. 扁脸品种，避免剧烈运动和高温
4. 定期清洁耳道
5. 注意呼吸道健康
careTips.en:
1. Long coat needs daily brushing
2. Keep face clean, manage eye discharge
