3. Flat-faced, avoid strenuous exercise and heat
4. Regular ear cleaning
5. Monitor respiratory health

temperament.zh: 独立高冷，有点「猫性格」，不太喜欢被过度摆弄。对主人忠诚但对陌生人冷淡。像一头安静的小狮子，非常酷
temperament.en: Independent and aloof, somewhat 'cat-like', doesn't like being overly handled. Loyal to owner but cold to strangers. Like a quiet little lion, very cool

diet.zh: 注意控制体重，松狮容易发胖。选择优质狗粮，避免高盐高油食物
diet.en: Watch weight, Chows gain easily. Choose quality dog food, avoid high salt and oil

habitat.zh: 适合有院子的家庭，需要适度运动。怕热，厚毛使它们在夏天很不舒服
habitat.en: Best for homes with a yard, needs moderate exercise. Heat-sensitive, thick coat makes summers uncomfortable

appearance.zh: 最突出的特征：蓝黑色舌头！全身被厚厚的狮鬃般长毛包围，站立姿势像一头小狮子。面部扁平，眼睛小而深陷
appearance.en: Most striking feature: blue-black tongue! Entire body wrapped in thick lion-like mane. Stands like a small lion. Flat face, small deep-set eyes

history.zh: 中国最古老的犬种之一，有两千多年历史。原本是拉车、狩猎、看家的全能工作犬。汉武帝时期就已有记载。18世纪传到西方，成为最早被西方认可的中国犬种之一
history.en: One of China's oldest breeds, 2000+ years of history. Originally an all-purpose working dog for pulling carts, hunting, and guarding. Recorded since Han Dynasty. Brought to the West in 18th century, among the first Chinese breeds recognized internationally

funFact.zh: 松狮犬和熊猫一样有蓝黑色舌头！这是松狮独有的特征，世界上只有松狮和 shar-pei（沙皮狗）有蓝黑舌头。当年美国前总统尼克松访华时，中国赠送了两只松狮犬给美国
funFact.en: Chow Chows have blue-black tongues just like pandas! This is unique to the breed — only Chows and Shar-Peis have blue-black tongues. When President Nixon visited China, China gifted two Chow Chows to America

myths.zh: 传说松狮犬是女娲造狗时第一批造出来的，所以它们有一种「老前辈」的气质。古人认为松狮的蓝舌头是吞过天火的证据。
myths.en: Legend says Chow Chows were among the first dogs created by the goddess Nuwa, explaining their 'elder statesman' demeanor. Ancient Chinese believed their blue tongue was proof they once swallowed heavenly fire.

careTips.zh:
1. 厚毛需每周梳理2-3次，换毛期每天梳
2. 夏天注意防暑降温
3. 社会化训练要从小开始
4. 注意眼部和皮肤褶皱清洁
5. 每天适度散步，不宜剧烈运动
careTips.en:
1. Thick coat needs brushing 2-3 times weekly, daily during shedding
2. Summer heat management is crucial
3. Socialization training from puppyhood
4. Keep eyes and skin folds clean
5. Moderate daily walks, avoid strenuous exercise

temperament.zh: 威猛雄壮，领地意识极强。对家人温顺忠诚，对陌生人和入侵者凶猛无比。是天生的护卫犬，夜晚警惕性最高
temperament.en: Mighty and imposing, extremely territorial. Gentle and loyal to family, fierce toward strangers and intruders. Born guard dog, most alert at night

diet.zh: 大型犬食量大，需要高蛋白狗粮。可以搭配牛肉、鸡肉等。幼犬期注意钙质补充
diet.en: Large breed with big appetite, needs high-protein dog food. Can supplement with beef, chicken. Ensure calcium during puppy stage

habitat.zh: 需要大空间，不适合公寓。怕热不怕冷，最适应高原气候。有院子最好
habitat.en: Needs lots of space, not for apartments. Heat-sensitive but cold-tolerant, best suited for highland climate. A yard is ideal

appearance.zh: 体型巨大，浑身浓密的鬃毛，威风凛凛。脖子周围有一圈厚厚的「围脖」毛，站立时像一头雄狮。毛色以黑色、铁包金最常见
appearance.en: Massive build with dense mane, magnificent appearance. Thick 'ruff' around the neck, standing like a male lion. Black and iron-gold (black with tan) are most common colors

history.zh: 世界最古老的犬种之一，有3000多年历史。原产于青藏高原，是牧民看护羊群和帐篷的忠实伙伴。马可波罗游记中就有关于藏獒的记载。被西方人称为「东方神犬」
history.en: One of the world's oldest dog breeds, 3000+ years of history. From the Tibetan Plateau, faithful companion of herders guarding flocks and tents. Recorded in Marco Polo's travels. Called the 'Oriental Divine Dog' by Westerners

funFact.zh: 藏獒是目前体型最大的犬种之一！成年雄性体重可达80公斤以上。2010年左右中国曾出现过藏獒热，一只优质藏獒被炒到上千万元人民币，后来热度退去
funFact.en: Tibetan Mastiffs are among the largest dog breeds! Adult males can exceed 80kg. Around 2010, China had a 'Tibetan Mastiff craze' where premium specimens sold for over 10 million RMB, though the craze eventually faded

myths.zh: 藏族传说中，藏獒是天神的坐骑下凡，所以在藏区被视为神圣动物。据说藏獒在战斗中绝不退缩，即使面对狼群也能保护羊群。藏族有「一獒抵三狼」的说法。
myths.en: Tibetan legend says Mastiffs are heavenly steeds descended to earth, considered sacred animals. Said to never retreat in battle, even against wolf packs. Tibetans say 'one Mastiff equals three wolves.'

careTips.zh:
1. 必须从小进行社会化训练和服从训练
2. 大型犬需要大量运动空间
3. 定期梳理厚毛，换毛期掉毛严重
4. 注意髋关节发育不良等大型犬常见病
5. 不适合没有经验的养犬新手
careTips.en:
1. Socialization and obedience training from puppyhood is a must
2. Large breed needs lots of exercise space
3. Regular brushing of thick coat, heavy shedding during seasonal change
4. Watch for hip dysplasia and other large-breed health issues
5. Not recommended for first-time dog owners

temperament.zh: 活泼可爱，喜欢黏人。虽然是「无毛犬」但其实有两个品种：无毛型和粉扑型。性格温柔，是很好的陪伴犬
temperament.en: Lively and cute, loves to cuddle. Though called 'hairless', actually has two varieties: hairless and powderpuff. Gentle temperament, great companion dog

diet.zh: 小型犬少量多餐，选择小颗粒优质狗粮。无毛型代谢稍快，可适当增加喂食频率
diet.en: Small breed, small frequent meals, choose small kibble quality food. Hairless type has slightly faster metabolism, can feed slightly more often

habitat.zh: 适合室内生活，无毛型怕冷怕晒。冬天要穿衣服，夏天要涂防晒霜！
habitat.en: Indoor living, hairless type fears cold and sun. Needs clothes in winter, sunscreen in summer!

appearance.zh: 最独特的长相：全身大部分无毛，只有头顶、脚趾和尾巴尖有毛——像戴着皇冠一样！皮肤颜色丰富，有粉色、蓝色、黑色等。粉扑型则全身覆盖柔软长毛
appearance.en: Most unique look: mostly hairless body with hair only on head, toes, and tail tip — like wearing a crown! Skin comes in pink, blue, black, etc. Powderpuff variety is covered in soft long fur

history.zh: 虽然名字中有「中国」，但其确切起源有争议。有中国商船的水手携带它们出海灭鼠的说法，因此也叫「中国船犬」。被列为世界上最丑的犬种之一，但也是最有爱的犬种之一
history.en: Despite the 'Chinese' name, exact origin is debated. Chinese sailors may have carried them on ships to catch rats, hence 'Chinese Ship Dog'. Voted one of the world's ugliest dog breeds, but also one of the most loving

funFact.zh: 中国冠毛犬曾多次赢得「世界最丑犬大赛」冠军！它们皮肤温度比有毛狗高，摸上去暖暖的。虽然长得特别，但性格超级黏人可爱
funFact.en: Chinese Crested Dogs have won 'World's Ugliest Dog Contest' multiple times! Their skin is warmer than furry dogs, feeling warm to touch. Despite their unique looks, they're incredibly affectionate and cute

myths.zh: 传说中国古代的水手养冠毛犬不仅是为了捕鼠，还因为无毛犬能发出特殊的叫声，当有危险靠近时能提前预警。
myths.en: Legend says ancient Chinese sailors kept Crested Dogs not just for catching rats, but because their unique barking could warn of approaching danger before other dogs noticed.

careTips.zh:
1. 无毛型皮肤需要涂防晒霜和润肤霜
2. 冬天必须穿衣服保暖
3. 定期清洁皮肤，防止粉刺和干燥
4. 粉扑型需要每天梳理长毛
5. 注意牙齿健康，小犬种容易有牙病
careTips.en:
1. Hairless type needs sunscreen and moisturizer
2. Must wear clothes in winter for warmth
3. Regular skin cleaning to prevent acne and dryness
4. Powderpuff needs daily brushing
5. Watch dental health, small breeds prone to dental issues

temperament.zh: 佛系小青年，大部分时间都在晒太阳和发呆。但吃东西的时候很积极，看见食物就变成短跑健将
temperament.en: Zen-like youth, spends most time basking and spacing out. But turns into a sprint champion when food appears

diet.zh: 不挑食，龟粮、小鱼虾、蔬菜都吃。注意不要喂太多肉，会变胖到缩不回壳里
diet.en: Not picky, eats turtle pellets, small fish/shrimp, veggies. Don't overfeed meat or they'll get too fat to fit in their shell

habitat.zh: 需要水缸+晒台，水质要干净。一定要有UVB灯或自然阳光，不然壳会变软
habitat.en: Needs tank + basking platform, clean water. Must have UVB light or natural sunlight, or shell will soften

appearance.zh: 翠绿色的壳，眼睛后面有两道红色条纹（耳朵位置）。小时候很可爱，长大后有点像个绿色的铁饼
appearance.en: Green shell with red stripes behind the eyes (ear position). Cute when small, looks like a green discus when grown

history.zh: 原产北美，但因为适应力超强，被引入全世界。是世界上被放生最多的龟——所以不要随便放生！
history.en: Originally from North America but introduced worldwide due to extreme adaptability. The most released turtle species - so don't release them randomly!

funFact.zh: 巴西龟其实是「北美洲」的龟，跟巴西没什么关系！名字的误会来源于最早出口这种龟的港口叫巴西。是龟界的「假冒名牌」😂
funFact.en: Red-Eared Sliders are actually from North America, nothing to do with Brazil! The name confusion comes from the export port called Brazil. The 'fake brand name' of turtles 😂

myths.zh: 有人说乌龟会把自己的壳脱掉换新的——完全不可能！龟壳就是它的脊椎骨，脱了壳就等于人脱了脊椎…还有人说放生乌龟能积德，但如果放的是外来物种巴西龟，反而会害死本地龟！
myths.en: Some say turtles shed their shells for new ones - impossible! The shell is their spine, shedding it would be like a human removing their spine... Some say releasing turtles earns merit, but releasing invasive Red-Eared Sliders actually kills local turtles!

careTips.zh:
1. 水质是第一要务，安装过滤器
2. 必须有晒台和UVB灯
3. 不要喂太多，一周3-4次足够
4. ⚠️ 绝对不要放生到野外
careTips.en:
1. Water quality is #1 priority, install filter
2. Must have basking platform and UVB light
3. Don't overfeed, 3-4 times per week is enough
4. ⚠️ NEVER release into the wild

temperament.zh: 胆子小、容易紧张，比巴西龟更害羞。一有动静就「扑通」跳进水里
temperament.en: Timid and easily nervous, shyer than Red-Eared Sliders. SPLASH into the water at any disturbance

diet.zh: 偏肉食性，喜欢吃小鱼虾、昆虫。龟粮也接受，但更喜欢「生鲜」
diet.en: Carnivorous preference, loves small fish, shrimp, insects. Accepts pellets but prefers 'fresh food'

habitat.zh: 需要比巴西龟更大的水域，水质要求更高。喜欢在岩石上晒太阳
habitat.en: Needs larger water area than Red-Eared Sliders, higher water quality requirements. Loves basking on rocks

appearance.zh: 背壳上有像地图一样的纹路，因此得名。看起来就像背着一幅世界地图到处跑的小冒险家
appearance.en: Shell has map-like patterns, hence the name. Looks like a little adventurer carrying a world map everywhere

history.zh: 因背壳独特的花纹得名，在北美分布很广。是淡水龟中最爱晒太阳的种类之一
history.en: Named for unique shell patterns, widely distributed in North America. One of the most sun-loving freshwater turtles

funFact.zh: 地图龟是龟界的「地理学家」，每只地图龟壳上的纹路都像一幅独一无二的地图。也许每只龟心里都有一个想去旅行的小梦想？🗺️
funFact.en: Map turtles are the 'geographers' of turtles, each one's shell pattern is a unique map. Maybe every map turtle dreams of traveling? 🗺️

myths.zh: 有人说地图龟会「导航」回家——虽然它们方向感确实不错，但还不至于自带GPS。
myths.en: Some say map turtles can 'navigate' home - while they do have good sense of direction, they don't come with built-in GPS.

careTips.zh:
1. 水质要求高，需要强效过滤
2. 提供多个晒台
3. 保持安静的环境，它们容易受惊
4. 雌性体型会比雄性大很多
careTips.en:
1. High water quality needs, strong filter required
2. Provide multiple basking platforms
3. Keep environment quiet, they scare easily
4. Females grow much larger than males

temperament.zh: 悠闲自在的老寿星，性格安静温和。动作慢悠悠，享受生活的节奏。认识主人后会主动游过来讨食
temperament.en: A leisurely long-liver with quiet gentle nature. Moves slow and easy, enjoying life's rhythm. Recognizes owner and swims up for food

diet.zh: 杂食性，龟粮、小鱼虾、蔬菜都吃。性格更杂食，比巴西龟食欲旺盛
diet.en: Omnivorous, eats turtle pellets, small fish/shrimp, veggies. More enthusiastic eater than Red-Eared Sliders

habitat.zh: 半水半陆，需要水区和陆区。可以在室外自然光下饲养，比较适应中国气候
habitat.en: Semi-aquatic, needs both water and land areas. Can be kept outdoors in natural light, well adapted to Chinese climate

appearance.zh: 深棕色或黑色的龟壳，腹甲有黄色斑块，皮肤有橙红色条纹。老年草龟会全身变黑，被称为「墨龟」
appearance.en: Dark brown or black shell, yellow patches on plastron, orange-red skin stripes. Old Reeves Turtles turn all black, called 'ink turtles'

history.zh: 中国最常见的本土淡水龟，有几千年历史。在中国文化中，龟是长寿的象征。古代龟甲是用来占卜的工具，甲骨文就刻在龟甲上
history.en: China's most common native freshwater turtle, thousands of years of history. In Chinese culture, turtles symbolize longevity. Ancient turtle shells were used for divination, oracle bones were carved on them

funFact.zh: 草龟是「活化石」级别的动物！它们的祖先在恐龙时代就存在了，外形几乎没有变化。而且老年雄性草龟会全身变黑成为「墨龟」，据说墨龟特别值钱，但这只是普通的色素沉淀现象
funFact.en: Reeves Turtles are 'living fossils'! Their ancestors existed during the dinosaur age, almost unchanged. Older males turn entirely black, called 'ink turtles'. Said to be especially valuable, but it's just natural melanin buildup

myths.zh: 中国古代传说「千年王八万年龟」，意思是龟能活很长寿命。放生乌龟能积德消灾——但注意只能放本地品种！放生巴西龟会危害生态。
myths.en: Ancient Chinese say 'a thousand-year snapping turtle, ten-thousand-year box turtle', meaning turtles live very long. Releasing turtles earns merit - but only release native species! Releasing invasive species harms the ecosystem.

careTips.zh:
1. 提供水陆各占一半的空间
2. 水质保持清洁，安装过滤
3. 夏天防高温，冬天会冬眠
4. 定期晒太阳补充维生素D3
5. ⚠️ 如果放生，只放到原生环境
careTips.en:
1. Provide equal water and land space
2. Keep water clean with filter
3. Prevent overheating in summer, they hibernate in winter
4. Regular sunbathing for vitamin D3
5. ⚠️ If releasing, only in native habitat

temperament.zh: 慢条斯理的「活古董」，好奇心旺盛，喜欢探索。当心！它们力气巨大，能拱翻家具！
temperament.en: A slow-paced 'living antique', curious and exploratory. Watch out! They're incredibly strong, can overturn furniture!

diet.zh: 纯草食性！主食是干草、杂草和各种蔬菜叶。禁止喂肉或高蛋白食物，会损伤肾脏
diet.en: Strictly herbivorous! Staple is hay, weeds, and leafy veggies. Never feed meat or high-protein food, damages kidneys

habitat.zh: 需要大空间，理想是有户外院子。成年后需要几十平米的活动区域。不能关在小房间里
habitat.en: Needs large space, ideally an outdoor yard. Adults need dozens of square meters to roam. Cannot be kept in small rooms

appearance.zh: 厚重粗糙的褐色龟壳，皮肤有大块鳞片，腿部有明显的距突（棘刺）。看起来像一块会走路的大石头
appearance.en: Heavy rough brown shell, large scaled skin, prominent spurs on hind legs. Looks like a walking boulder

history.zh: 世界第三大陆龟，来自非洲撒哈拉沙漠南缘。在干旱环境中进化，耐旱能力极强。近年来成为中国很受欢迎的爬宠
history.en: Third largest tortoise in the world, from the southern edge of the Sahara. Evolved for drought survival. Becoming popular in China's reptile pet hobby

funFact.zh: 苏卡塔陆龟能活100年以上，比人还长寿！买一只苏卡塔，相当于给下一代留了一份「活遗产」。而且它们的力气大到能拱开院墙——养之前请先加固围墙！💪
funFact.en: Sulcata Tortoises can live 100+ years, outliving their owners! Buying one is leaving a 'living inheritance' for the next generation. Their strength can break through yard walls - reinforce your fences first! 💪

myths.zh: 非洲传说苏卡塔陆龟是大地母神的化身，拱地的行为是在为土地祈福。中国爬宠圈流行说法「买苏卡是败家行为」——因为它们越长越大，花费越来越多！
myths.en: African legend says Sulcata are incarnations of the Earth Mother, their burrowing brings blessings to the land. China's reptile hobby has a saying 'buying a Sulcata is financial ruin' - because they keep growing bigger and more expensive!

careTips.zh:
1. 提前准备大空间，成体需要院子级别的空间
2. 绝对不喂肉或高蛋白食物
3. 保持温暖，不耐寒
4. ⚠️ 养之前认真考虑：它可能比你活得更长
careTips.en:
1. Plan ahead for large space, adults need yard-size area
2. NEVER feed meat or high-protein food
3. Keep warm, cold intolerant
4. ⚠️ Think carefully before buying: it may outlive you

temperament.zh: 蛇界的「小暖男/小暖女」，温顺得不可思议。几乎从不咬人，特别适合新手
temperament.en: The 'sweetheart' of snakes, incredibly docile. Almost never bites, perfect for beginners

diet.zh: 以老鼠为主食（喂冷冻解冻的就行，不用活鼠）。一周喂一次就够了，比养猫便宜多了
diet.en: Mainly eats mice (frozen-thawed is fine, no need for live). Feed once a week, much cheaper than keeping cats

habitat.zh: 需要一个比它身体稍大的饲养箱，有躲避洞穴和水盆。温湿度控制很重要
habitat.en: Needs an enclosure slightly larger than its body with hiding cave and water bowl. Temperature and humidity control is important

appearance.zh: 花纹像彩色玉米粒排列而成，所以叫玉米蛇。人工培育出了超多颜色：橘色、红色、雪白、甚至紫色！
appearance.en: Patterns look like arranged colorful corn kernels, hence 'Corn Snake'. Selective breeding created many colors: orange, red, snow white, even purple!

history.zh: 最早在美洲的玉米仓里被发现，因为常出没在粮仓中抓老鼠，所以被叫作「玉米蛇」。农民和它们是好朋友
history.en: First found in American corn cribs because they often hunted mice in granaries. Farmers and corn snakes were good friends

funFact.zh: 玉米蛇的颜色变体超过800种！比有些手机型号还多。其中最贵的一种叫「暴风雪」通体雪白红眼睛，价格能到几千块——比很多名牌包还贵
funFact.en: Corn snakes have over 800 color morphs! More than some phone models. The most expensive is 'Blizzard' - pure white with red eyes, costing thousands - pricier than designer bags

myths.zh: 最大的误解：「蛇会咬人！」——但玉米蛇几乎不咬人，即使咬了也没有毒。另一个误解：「蛇很黏很恶心」——其实摸起来很光滑，像高端的丝织品！
myths.en: Biggest misconception: 'Snakes bite!' - but Corn Snakes almost never bite, and are non-venomous. Another: 'Snakes are slimy and gross' - they're actually smooth, like premium silk!

careTips.zh:
1. 新手最推荐的宠物蛇
2. 提供适当的温度梯度
3. 一周喂一次，别喂太频繁
4. 脱皮时保持湿度
5. 准备好接受朋友们的惊讶目光
careTips.en:
1. Most recommended snake for beginners
2. Provide proper temperature gradient
3. Feed once weekly
4. Keep humidity up during shedding
5. Be prepared for amazed looks from friends

temperament.zh: 名字来源于紧张时会卷成球——是蛇界的「社恐」。安静、不爱动，但摸起来手感一流
temperament.en: Named for curling into a ball when nervous - the 'socially anxious' snake. Quiet, inactive, but amazing to hold

diet.zh: 以老鼠为主食，但比玉米蛇更挑食。有时会「绝食抗议」，需要耐心
diet.en: Eats mice but pickier than corn snakes. Sometimes goes on 'hunger strikes', needs patience

habitat.zh: 需要恒温恒湿的饲养箱，喜欢隐藏。温度控制比玉米蛇更严格
habitat.en: Needs constant temperature and humidity enclosure, loves hiding. Temperature control stricter than corn snakes

appearance.zh: 体型粗壮，花纹像古代的非洲图腾。颜色变体也很多，最经典的是黑棕色的花纹
appearance.en: Stocky build, patterns like ancient African totems. Many color morphs, classic is black-brown pattern

history.zh: 在非洲被视为神圣的动物。据说一些非洲部落把球蟒当作村庄的守护神，不可伤害
history.en: Considered sacred in Africa. Some African tribes treat Ball Pythons as village guardian spirits that cannot be harmed

funFact.zh: 球蟒是蛇界的「抱枕专家」，卷起来就是一个完美的球。有人说抱着球蟒比抱着毛绒玩具还舒服——这个评价很高了！
funFact.en: Ball Pythons are the 'hugging pillow experts' of snakes, curling into a perfect ball. Some say holding one is more comfortable than a plush toy - high praise!

myths.zh: 非洲传说球蟒能带来财运，所以很多西非家庭会主动让球蟒住在家里。但这可能导致家里突然变成「蛇窝」…自己衡量吧！
myths.en: African legend says Ball Pythons bring wealth, so many West African families welcome them. But this could turn your home into a 'snake nest'... weigh the pros and cons!

careTips.zh:
1. 需要稳定的温度环境（27-30°C）
2. 提供至少两个躲避洞
3. 挑食时不要强迫喂食
4. 需要耐心等它适应新环境
careTips.en:
1. Needs stable temperature (27-30°C)
2. Provide at least two hiding spots
3. Don't force-feed during hunger strikes
4. Be patient while it adjusts to new environment

origin.zh: 北美洲（加利福尼亚等地）

temperament.zh: 精力充沛、好奇心强，是蛇中的「小机灵鬼」。比玉米蛇活跃很多，喜欢到处探索
temperament.en: Energetic and curious, the 'clever little one' of snakes. Much more active than Corn Snakes, loves exploring everywhere

diet.zh: 以老鼠为主食，食欲旺盛很少挑食。和球蟒比起来吃饭积极多了
diet.en: Eats mice, enthusiastic eater rarely refusing food. Much more eager to eat compared to ball pythons

habitat.zh: 需要一个比较大的饲养箱，提供足够的攀爬空间和躲避处
habitat.en: Needs a fairly large enclosure with climbing space and hiding spots

appearance.zh: 经典的黑白横纹，像穿了一件黑白条纹囚服！颜色变体很多，有棕色、橙色等，最著名的是黑白交替条纹
appearance.en: Classic black and white bands, like wearing a prison stripes outfit! Many color morphs including brown, orange. Most famous is alternating black and white

history.zh: 在北美广泛分布，是天然的蛇类杀手——能吃掉响尾蛇！因此叫「王蛇」。它们对响尾蛇毒素有天然免疫力
history.en: Widely distributed in North America, a natural snake killer - can eat rattlesnakes! Hence 'King Snake'. They have natural immunity to rattlesnake venom

funFact.zh: 加州王蛇之所以叫「王蛇」，是因为它们吃其他蛇！甚至能吃掉比自己长的蛇。在野外遇到响尾蛇，王蛇不但不跑还会主动攻击——因为它们对神经毒素免疫！👑
funFact.en: Called 'King' Snake because they EAT other snakes! Can even eat snakes longer than themselves. In the wild, meeting a rattlesnake doesn't make them run - they attack instead! They're immune to the neurotoxin! 👑

myths.zh: 「蛇王能统治所有蛇」——加州王蛇确实会吃其他蛇，但它们在宠物状态下是温顺的。还有一说蛇王能克制眼镜蛇，这在北美版本中基本属实。
myths.en: 'Snake king rules all snakes' - Kingsnakes do eat other snakes, but they're docile as pets. Also said they can counter cobras - mostly true in the North American context.

careTips.zh:
1. 加热灯提供温度梯度
2. 饲养箱要盖好，逃跑能力很强
3. 每周喂一次，食欲好不用担心
4. 不建议和其他蛇混养，会被吃掉
careTips.en:
1. Heating lamp for temperature gradient
2. Secure enclosure lid, great escape artists
3. Feed weekly, good appetite no worries
4. Don't house with other snakes - they'll get eaten

temperament.zh: 最会「装死」的蛇！感到威胁时会仰躺装死——包括吐出舌头、分泌臭液，演技堪称奥斯卡级别
temperament.en: The best 'death faker' of snakes! When threatened, flips onto its back and plays dead - tongue out, secreting foul smell, Oscar-worthy acting

diet.zh: 主要吃老鼠（冷冻解冻的就行），偶尔也吃蟾蜍。食欲中等
diet.en: Mainly mice (frozen-thawed is fine), occasionally toads. Moderate appetite

habitat.zh: 干燥沙质环境，需要可以挖掘的松软基材。提供躲避处
habitat.en: Dry sandy environment, needs loose substrate for digging. Provide hiding spots

appearance.zh: 最显著特征是翘起来的猪鼻子！身体偏粗短，颜色多样，有棕色、橙色、粉色等。看起来很可爱
appearance.en: Most distinctive feature is the upturned pig-like snout! Short stocky body, various colors including brown, orange, pink. Very cute looking

history.zh: 原产北美洲，是北美洲的本土物种。因为独特的外形和逗趣的行为，近年来成为很受欢迎的宠物蛇
history.en: Native to North America. Increasingly popular as pet snake due to unique appearance and amusing behavior

funFact.zh: 猪鼻蛇的「装死」戏法真的是一绝！它们翻过来肚子朝上、张嘴吐舌、还会流出体液，把自己弄臭——然后如果你翻它们回来，它们会再翻回去，因为「死蛇不会趴着的嘛」。这套剧本烂大街了但就是很好用🎭
funFact.en: Hognose's death act is truly spectacular! They flip belly up, mouth open, tongue out, secreting foul liquid - then if you flip them back, they flip over again, because 'dead snakes don't lie right-side up'. Script is basic but effective every time 🎭

myths.zh: 「猪鼻蛇有毒」——它们有轻微的后牙毒素，对人几乎无害，最多是轻微肿胀。被称为「假毒蛇界最能演的演员」。
myths.en: 'Hognose snakes are venomous' - they do have mild rear-fanged venom, almost harmless to humans, just minor swelling. Called 'the best actor among fake venomous snakes'.

careTips.zh:
1. 需要5-10cm厚的基材用于挖掘
2. 喂食时用镊子，避免误咬
3. 不要翻弄装死中的蛇，顺着它演
4. 脱皮期保持湿度
careTips.en:
1. 5-10cm deep substrate for digging
2. Use tongs for feeding to avoid accidental bites
3. Don't disturb a snake playing dead, let it perform
4. Maintain humidity during shedding

temperament.zh: 蜘蛛界的「优雅淑女」，性格温和，很少踢毛或攻击。看起来很凶其实很乖
temperament.en: The 'elegant lady' of spiders, gentle temperament, rarely kicks hairs or attacks. Looks fierce but is very sweet

diet.zh: 以蟋蟀、面包虫为主食，一周喂1-2次。进食画面很酷，但胆小的人慎看
diet.en: Mainly eats crickets and mealworms, feed 1-2 times weekly. Feeding is cool to watch but not for the faint-hearted

habitat.zh: 需要干燥的饲养箱，铺上椰土。它们喜欢挖洞，给足基材就好
habitat.en: Needs dry enclosure with coconut fiber substrate. They love digging, provide enough substrate

appearance.zh: 深色的身体加上鲜橙红色的膝盖关节，像穿了一双炫酷的红袜子。是蜘蛛中最漂亮的品种之一
appearance.en: Dark body with bright orange-red knee joints, like wearing cool red socks. One of the most beautiful spider species

history.zh: 曾是捕鸟蛛中最受追捧的种类，在《哈利波特》和《夺宝奇兵》等电影中都有出现，是最出名的蜘蛛之一
history.en: Once the most sought-after tarantula species, appeared in Harry Potter and Indiana Jones. One of the most famous spiders in the world

funFact.zh: 红膝头蜘蛛是最「上镜」的蜘蛛，没有之一。它的大长腿+红膝盖看起来像穿了滑稽的彩色袜子，网友戏称它是「蜘蛛界的时尚博主」👞
funFact.en: Red Knees are the most 'photogenic' spiders, period. Long legs + red knees look like wearing funny colored socks. Netizens call them the 'fashion blogger of spiders' 👡

myths.zh: 有人说「蜘蛛有毒会咬死人」——虽然有毒性，但红膝头的毒对人来说比蜜蜂蜇还弱。被咬的话就是肿一下，不会死。当然，过敏体质除外！
myths.en: Some say 'spiders are venomous and deadly' - while they do have venom, their bite is weaker than a bee sting to humans. Just some swelling, not deadly. Allergies excepted, of course!

careTips.zh:
1. 保持饲养箱干燥通风
2. 不要用手直接抓
3. 铺5-10cm厚的椰土让它挖洞
4. 脱皮期间不要喂食和打扰
careTips.en:
1. Keep enclosure dry and ventilated
2. Don't handle with bare hands
3. 5-10cm coconut substrate for digging
4. Don't feed or disturb during molting

taxonomy.species: 墨西哥红膝头 B. hamorii

temperament.zh: 蜘蛛界的「佛系青年」，慢悠悠的，不怎么动。有时候能保持一个姿势好几天，比树懒还懒
temperament.en: The 'zen youth' of spiders, slow and unhurried. Can hold one pose for days, lazier than a sloth

diet.zh: 蟋蟀为主食，但食量不大。有时候它自己不想吃就不吃，很有个性的
diet.en: Crickets as staple, but not big eaters. Sometimes just won't eat - very opinionated

habitat.zh: 对环境要求不高，干燥偏沙质的底材。新手也能轻松养活
habitat.en: Low environmental requirements, dry sandy substrate. Beginners can keep them alive easily

appearance.zh: 全身覆盖着红棕色的绒毛，摸起来像天鹅绒。是蜘蛛中比较「萌」的存在
appearance.en: Covered in reddish-brown velvety hair, feels like velvet. One of the 'cuter' spider species

history.zh: 最经典的入门蜘蛛品种，宠物蜘蛛界的「大熊猫」——知名度最高，饲养者最多
history.en: The classic beginner spider, the 'Giant Panda' of pet spiders - highest recognition, most keepers

funFact.zh: 红玫瑰蜘蛛最绝技是「表演吃饭」——虽然叫玫瑰，但吃起虫子来毫不含糊，八条腿配合得天衣无缝，是蜘蛛界的米其林大厨 🍽️
funFact.en: Red Roses' special skill is 'performance dining' - despite the romantic name, they devour insects with eight legs in perfect coordination, the Michelin chef of spiders 🍽️

myths.zh: 有人说「养蜘蛛家里会招来其他虫子」——恰好相反！蜘蛛是天然杀虫剂，养了蜘蛛家里的虫只会更少。
myths.en: Some say 'keeping spiders attracts other bugs' - the opposite is true! Spiders are natural pest control, bugs will decrease.

careTips.zh:
1. 最适合新手的宠物蜘蛛
2. 水盆必须一直有干净的饮用水
3. 不需要大空间，普通蜘蛛盒即可
4. 很少需要打扰它，适合忙碌的人
careTips.en:
1. Best pet spider for beginners
2. Always have clean water available
3. Doesn't need much space, standard tarantula enclosure works
4. Rarely needs attention, great for busy people

origin.zh: 南美洲（委内瑞拉等热带雨林）

temperament.zh: 树栖型，行动迅速，容易紧张。脚趾尖是粉色的（因此得名），是蜘蛛界的「树上跑酷选手」
temperament.en: Tree-dweller, fast-moving, easily stressed. Pink-tipped toes (hence the name), the 'parkour athlete' of spiders who lives in trees

diet.zh: 以蟋蟀为主食，食量中等，每周喂1-2次
diet.en: Crickets as main food, moderate appetite, feed 1-2 times weekly

habitat.zh: 树栖型！需要高空间的饲养箱，要有攀爬树枝和隐藏叶片。保持一定湿度
habitat.en: Arboreal! Needs tall enclosure with climbing branches and hiding leaves. Maintain some humidity

appearance.zh: 黑色的身体，脚趾尖呈鲜艳的粉色——就好像涂了粉色指甲油！是蜘蛛中最fashion的品种之一
appearance.en: Black body with bright pink toe tips - like wearing pink nail polish! One of the most fashionable spider species

history.zh: 来自南美热带雨林，原本生活在高大树木上。是入门树栖蜘蛛的好选择，在爬宠圈很受欢迎
history.en: From South American rainforests, naturally living high in trees. A good entry-level arboreal spider, popular in the reptile hobby

funFact.zh: 粉趾蜘蛛会在树枝间编织绳网来移动——就像蜘蛛侠！它们的速度非常快，从饲养箱逃跑的能力一流。养粉趾的第一课：永远确保盖子盖紧了🕸️
funFact.en: Pink Toes weave silk lines between branches to move - just like Spider-Man! They're super fast, with excellent escape abilities. First lesson: ALWAYS keep the lid secure 🕸️

myths.zh: 「蜘蛛会到处乱跑很危险」——粉趾确实跑得快，但跑出去的粉趾更多是在「逃命」而不是「进攻」。保持镇定慢慢引导，它不会主动咬人的。
myths.en: 'Spiders running around are dangerous' - Pink Toes do run fast, but escaped ones are usually 'fleeing' not 'attacking'. Stay calm and guide slowly, they won't bite proactively.

careTips.zh:
1. 必须用高饲养箱，不能用矮扁形的
2. 提供树枝和人工叶片
3. 保持湿度60-70%
4. 速度快，换笼时要小心
careTips.en:
1. Must use tall enclosure, not short flat ones
2. Provide branches and artificial leaves
3. Maintain 60-70% humidity
4. Fast mover, be careful when changing enclosures

temperament.zh: 极度凶猛且防御性强！它们很少主动出现，大部分时间躲在洞穴里。绝对不适合上手——这只是观赏蜘蛛
temperament.en: Extremely aggressive and defensive! Rarely seen, spending most time in burrows. Absolutely not for handling - this is a display-only spider

diet.zh: 蟋蟀为主食，食量中等，捕食时会非常迅速
diet.en: Crickets as main food, moderate appetite, extremely fast when striking at prey

habitat.zh: 挖洞型，需要深厚的基材。东南亚潮湿热带环境，需要保持一定湿度
habitat.en: Burrowing type, needs deep substrate. Southeast Asian humid tropical environment, maintain some humidity

appearance.zh: 全身带有惊艳的钴蓝色金属光泽——像蓝宝石一样！是宠物蜘蛛中颜色最美的品种之一，也是最凶猛的之一
appearance.en: Entire body with stunning cobalt blue metallic sheen - like a sapphire gemstone! One of the most beautiful and also most aggressive pet spiders

history.zh: 来自东南亚热带雨林，是经验丰富玩家追求的高级蜘蛛品种。因为颜值和脾气的极端对比，被称为「外貌欺骗性最强的蜘蛛」
history.en: From Southeast Asian tropical rainforests, sought by experienced keepers. Called 'the most deceptive spider' due to the extreme contrast between beauty and aggression

funFact.zh: 蓝宝石华丽雨林蜘蛛是「颜值担当，脾气最差」的代表！它们蓝得像艺术品，但一旦被惊扰攻击速度极快。有玩家笑称：「这蜘蛛美得让你忘了危险」💙
funFact.en: Cobalt Blue is 'best looks, worst temper'! They're blue like a work of art, but strike with extreme speed when disturbed. Keepers joke: 'This spider is so beautiful you forget the danger' 💙

myths.zh: 「颜色越漂亮的蜘蛛越温顺」——完全相反！蓝宝石蜘蛛以貌欺人，它的美丽和攻击性成正比。外表越美丽往往越需要小心对待。
myths.en: 'The more beautiful the spider, the more docile' - completely backwards! The Cobalt Blue deceives with its looks, beauty and aggression are proportional. The more beautiful, often the more careful you need to be.

careTips.zh:
1. ⚠️ 只适合有经验的玩家！
2. 提供10-15cm厚的基材供挖洞
3. 绝对不要徒手接触
4. 换笼或喂食用长夹子操作
5. 欣赏它的美，保持安全距离
careTips.en:
1. ⚠️ For experienced keepers ONLY!
2. 10-15cm deep substrate for burrowing
3. NEVER handle with bare hands
4. Use long tongs for enclosure and feeding
5. Admire its beauty from a safe distance

taxonomy.species: 蓝宝石华丽雨林 C. lividus

temperament.zh: 鸟界的「话唠+粘人精」，会吹口哨、学说话、还会摇头晃脑跳舞。一旦认主了比狗还粘人
temperament.en: The 'chatterbox + clingy one' of birds, whistles, talks, dances with head bobbing. Once bonded, clingier than dogs

diet.zh: 混合谷物、新鲜蔬果为主。注意不要喂巧克力、牛油果，对鸟类有毒！
diet.en: Mixed seeds/grains and fresh fruits/veggies. NO chocolate or avocado - toxic to birds!

habitat.zh: 需要较大的鸟笼，每天至少放飞1-2小时。需要玩具和互动
habitat.en: Needs a large cage, free flight 1-2 hours daily. Needs toys and interaction

appearance.zh: 橙红的腮红、头顶可以竖起来的黄色冠羽，看起来像打了腮红的摇滚明星🎸
appearance.en: Orange-red cheek blush, yellow crest that can stand up, looks like a rock star with blush on rocker 🎸

history.zh: 来自澳洲内陆，是第二受欢迎的宠物鸟（仅次于虎皮鹦鹉）。在18世纪就被带到欧洲了
history.en: From inland Australia, the second most popular pet bird (after budgerigars). Brought to Europe in the 18th century

funFact.zh: 鸡尾鹦鹉是「口哨大师」，能学会各种歌曲和旋律。有只鸡尾鹦鹉甚至学会了整首《生日快乐》歌——但它总是跑调，特别可爱 😂
funFact.en: Cockatiels are 'whistling masters', can learn songs and melodies. One even learned the entire 'Happy Birthday' song - always off-key, extra cute 😂

myths.zh: 有人说鸡尾鹦鹉会说话——少数确实会，但更擅长吹口哨。与其期望它说话，不如享受它给你吹的「走调版」流行歌曲。
myths.en: Some say cockatiels can talk - a few do, but they're better at whistling. Rather than expecting speech, enjoy their 'off-key' pop song renditions.

careTips.zh:
1. 每天需要和主人互动
2. 笼子要尽量大
3. 提供磨嘴玩具
4. 注意空气清新，鸟类对气味敏感
careTips.en:
1. Daily interaction with owner needed
2. Cage should be as large as possible
3. Provide beak grinding toys
4. Keep air fresh, birds are sensitive to odors

temperament.zh: 小身材大能量，好奇心旺盛。喜欢和同伴叽叽喳喳聊天，是鸟界的「社交达人」
temperament.en: Small body, big energy, very curious. Loves chatting with flock-mates, the 'social butterfly' of birds

diet.zh: 混合种子、谷物为主，搭配新鲜蔬菜。好养活不挑食
diet.en: Mixed seeds and grains as staple, with fresh veggies. Easy to keep, not picky

habitat.zh: 鸟笼不需要太大，但最好养两只以上，它们是群居动物，单独养会寂寞
habitat.en: Cage doesn't need to be huge, but best kept in pairs or more. They're social and get lonely alone

appearance.zh: 小巧玲珑，彩色条纹像穿了件小虎纹夹克。有绿色、蓝色、黄色等超多颜色变体
appearance.en: Petite, colorful stripes like wearing a tiny tiger-pattern jacket. Green, blue, yellow and many more color variations

history.zh: 世界上最受欢迎的宠物鸟，全球数量超过数百万只。维多利亚女王也养过虎皮鹦鹉！
history.en: World's most popular pet bird, millions worldwide. Even Queen Victoria kept budgies!

funFact.zh: 虎皮鹦鹉是公认最聪明的鸟之一，有只叫Puck的虎皮鹦鹉创下了1728个英语词汇的世界纪录！比很多人的英语词汇量都多📚
funFact.en: Budgies are among the smartest birds. A budgie named Puck holds the world record for 1,728 English words! More than many people's English vocabulary 📚

myths.zh: 「鹦鹉学舌只是重复，不懂含义」——其实研究发现虎皮鹦鹉能理解词语的上下文！它们不是复读机，是真有理解力。
myths.en: 'Parrots just repeat without understanding' - research shows budgies can understand word context! They're not just复读机, they genuinely comprehend.

careTips.zh:
1. 最好养两只以上，它们会互相陪伴
2. 每天更换干净的饮用水
3. 提供磨嘴石和玩具
4. 注意室内温度，不要低于15°C
careTips.en:
1. Best kept in pairs or more for companionship
2. Change water daily
3. Provide cuttlebone and toys
4. Keep room temp above 15°C

temperament.zh: 鸟界最甜蜜的「情侣鸟」！成对饲养时会互相理毛、依偎、喂食，感情好到让人羡慕。性格活泼，颜色艳丽
temperament.en: The sweetest 'lover birds' of the bird world! Paired birds groom, cuddle, and feed each other - their affection is enviable. Active personality, vivid colors

diet.zh: 混合种子、新鲜蔬果为主。和虎皮鹦鹉饮食类似。别喂牛油果、巧克力等有毒食物
diet.en: Mixed seeds and fresh fruits/veggies. Similar diet to budgies. No avocado, chocolate, or other toxic foods

habitat.zh: 需要较大鸟笼（尤其是成对饲养）。每天放飞时间让它们自由活动
habitat.en: Needs fairly large cage (especially for pairs). Daily free flight time

appearance.zh: 体型小巧，颜色艳丽多彩。常见桃脸、黑脸、费舍尔等品种，有绿色、蓝色、黄色等丰富色系
appearance.en: Small and compact, vividly colorful. Common varieties include Peach-faced, Masked, Fischer's. Various colors: green, blue, yellow and more

history.zh: 来自非洲草原和雨林，有9个亚种。因为雌雄成对后感情专一，西方人将其命名为Lovebird。是中国最受欢迎的宠物鸟之一
history.en: From African grasslands and rainforests, 9 subspecies. Named Lovebird for their monogamous devotion after pairing. One of China's most popular pet birds

funFact.zh: 牡丹鹦鹉一旦配对终生不离！如果伴侣去世，孤鸟会非常悲伤甚至拒绝进食。所以如果你要养，要么一对一对地养，要么做好终生陪伴它的准备💕
funFact.en: Lovebirds pair for life! If a partner dies, the surviving bird can become deeply depressed and refuse food. So if you keep one, either keep pairs, or be prepared to be their partner for life 💕

myths.zh: 「两只牡丹鹦鹉一起养会只顾着彼此不理人」——半真半假。成对后它们确实更亲密，但定期互动仍能保持和人的关系。单养反而会更粘人。
myths.en: 'Two lovebirds together will only focus on each other and ignore humans' - half true. Paired birds are more bonded but regular interaction can maintain human bonds. Singles are actually clingier with people.

careTips.zh:
1. 成对饲养更健康快乐
2. 每天放飞1小时以上
3. 注意空气清新，避免厨房油烟
4. 提供磨嘴玩具和秋千
careTips.en:
1. Keep in pairs for better health and happiness
2. Daily free flight 1+ hours
3. Fresh air, keep away from kitchen fumes
4. Provide beak toys and perches

temperament.zh: 阳光活力的「热带太阳」，极度粘人。叫声洪亮（非常洪亮！），是鸟界的「嗓门担当」。热情过头，爱「咬」表达爱意
temperament.en: Sunny and energetic 'tropical sun', extremely clingy. VERY loud vocalization - the 'loudest voice' of birds. Overly enthusiastic, expresses love by nibbling

diet.zh: 专业鹦鹉粮为主，搭配新鲜水果蔬菜。营养均衡对颜色维持很重要
diet.en: Professional parrot food as staple with fresh fruits and veggies. Balanced nutrition is important for maintaining colors

habitat.zh: 需要大鸟笼，每天大量放飞时间。声音大，不适合住公寓或有邻居的地方
habitat.en: Needs large cage, lots of daily free flight. Loud, not suitable for apartments or close neighbors

appearance.zh: 全身金黄橙红，翅膀有绿色羽毛，像一道彩虹！是世界上最鲜艳的鸟之一，颜值满分
appearance.en: Entire body golden yellow-orange-red, wings with green feathers - like a rainbow! One of the most colorful birds in the world, perfect appearance score

history.zh: 来自南美洲北部的热带雨林。因为颜色艳丽、感情丰富，在宠物鸟界非常受欢迎，但野外种群数量已受到宠物贸易影响
history.en: From tropical rainforests of northern South America. Very popular in pet bird hobby due to colorful appearance and affectionate nature, but wild populations affected by pet trade

funFact.zh: 太阳锥尾鹦鹉的叫声可以达到120分贝——和摩托车引擎一样响！有主人开玩笑说，养一只太阳锥尾就再也不需要闹钟了，只需要用耳机保护听力就行了🔊
funFact.en: Sun Conure screams can reach 120 decibels - as loud as a motorcycle engine! Owners joke: 'With a Sun Conure you never need an alarm clock, just ear protection' 🔊

myths.zh: 「鹦鹉咬人是不喜欢你」——太阳锥尾鹦鹉「咬」其实是在和你玩！它们用嘴巴探索世界。但咬的力度确实不容忽视，需要从小训练
myths.en: 'Parrots bite because they dislike you' - Sun Conure 'bites' are actually playing! They explore the world with their beak. But bite strength is significant and needs training from young age

careTips.zh:
1. ⚠️ 确认邻居能接受噪音再养
2. 需要大量社交互动
3. 每天放飞2小时以上
4. 补充维生素A（深色蔬菜）保持颜色
careTips.en:
1. ⚠️ Confirm neighbors can handle noise before getting one
2. Needs lots of social interaction
3. Daily free flight 2+ hours
4. Supplement vitamin A (dark veggies) to maintain colors

taxonomy.species: 太阳锥尾鹦鹉 A. solstitialis

origin.zh: 南美洲（巴西、玻利维亚等）

temperament.zh: 鹦鹉中的「完美平衡」——比虎皮聪明，比太阳锥尾安静，感情充沛又不太黏人。被称为「迷你太阳锥尾」
temperament.en: The 'perfect balance' of parrots - smarter than budgies, quieter than Sun Conures, affectionate but not too clingy. Called 'mini Sun Conure'

diet.zh: 专业鹦鹉粮搭配新鲜蔬果。喜欢各种水果，尤其是浆果
diet.en: Professional parrot food with fresh fruits and veggies. Loves various fruits, especially berries

habitat.zh: 需要中等大小鸟笼，每天放飞时间。相比太阳锥尾，更适合公寓饲养
habitat.en: Needs medium-sized cage, daily free flight. More apartment-friendly than Sun Conures

appearance.zh: 绿色身体配红色尾巴，脸颊是青灰绿色，翅膀有蓝色。颜色层次丰富但不过分鲜艳
appearance.en: Green body with red tail, blue-gray-green cheeks, blue on wings. Rich color layering but not overly flashy

history.zh: 来自南美洲，是Pyrrhura属鹦鹉中最受欢迎的宠物鸟。近年来在中国宠物鸟市场迅速走红
history.en: From South America, the most popular pet from the Pyrrhura parrot genus. Rapidly gaining popularity in China's pet bird market

funFact.zh: 绿颊锥尾鹦鹉特别喜欢钻进主人的衬衫领口或袖子里睡觉，被称为「口袋鸟」！它们认为衬衫里就是最安全的巢穴，完全不管主人是否行动不便🪺
funFact.en: Green Cheeks love sneaking inside shirt collars or sleeves to sleep, earning the nickname 'pocket bird'! They consider inside shirts the safest nest, completely ignoring if the owner can't move 🪺

myths.zh: 「绿颊锥尾不会说话」——确实说话能力比灰鹦鹉差很多，但部分个体能学会十几个词。更重要的是它们会理解语境，知道什么时候该讨好你。
myths.en: 'Green Cheeks can't talk' - indeed much less than African Greys, but some individuals can learn 10+ words. More importantly they understand context, knowing when to be charming.

careTips.zh:
1. 每天1小时以上的放飞和互动
2. 提供啃咬玩具，它们喜欢磨嘴
3. 食物多样化，多喂蔬菜
4. 注意温度变化，不要吹空调直吹
careTips.en:
1. 1+ hour daily free flight and interaction
2. Provide chewing toys, they love beak work
3. Varied diet, lots of veggies
4. Avoid temperature changes, no direct AC

taxonomy.species: 绿颊锥尾鹦鹉 P. molinae

temperament.zh: 兔子界的「小精灵」，胆子小但很聪明。被驯服后会主动蹭你，超有成就感
temperament.en: The 'little sprite' of rabbits, timid but smart. Once tamed, will主动 rub against you - super rewarding

diet.zh: 干草是主食（占80%），辅以兔粮和少量蔬菜。别喂太多水果，糖分太高
diet.en: Hay is the staple (80%), supplemented with pellets and some veggies. Don't overfeed fruit, too sugary

habitat.zh: 室内饲养，需要宽敞的活动空间。不建议一直关在笼子里
habitat.en: Indoor living, needs spacious activity area. Don't keep caged all the time

appearance.zh: 圆脑袋、大眼睛、超短耳朵、小到可以放进口袋里。整个就是一颗活蹦乱跳的毛球
appearance.en: Round head, big eyes, super short ears, small enough to fit in a pocket. Basically a bouncing ball of fluff

history.zh: 由荷兰的野生穴兔培育而来，是世界上最小的兔子品种之一。虽然小但脾气不小！
history.en: Bred from Dutch wild rabbits, one of the smallest rabbit breeds in the world. Small but feisty!

funFact.zh: 侏儒兔开心的时候会「跳舞」——原地蹦跳+甩头+扭屁股，被称为「Binky舞」，是世界上最可爱的舞蹈没有之一 💃
funFact.en: Dwarf bunnies 'dance' when happy - jump + head toss + butt wiggle, called the 'Binky Dance', the cutest dance in the world, period 💃

myths.zh: 有人说「兔子很好养，喂点菜叶子就行」——大错特错！兔子的消化系统很娇弱，错误饮食可能致命。必须以干草为主食！
myths.en: Some say 'rabbits are easy, just feed them veggie leaves' - WRONG! Their digestive system is delicate, wrong diet can be fatal. Hay MUST be the staple!

careTips.zh:
1. 干草是绝对的主食！
2. 定期修剪指甲
3. 不要抓耳朵提起来！
4. 每天让它在安全区域自由活动
careTips.en:
1. Hay is the absolute staple food!
2. Regular nail trimming
3. NEVER pick up by the ears!
4. Daily free roam in safe area

temperament.zh: 甜美温顺，是最像「玩具」的兔子品种。长长的垂耳+圆脸，萌到让人融化
temperament.en: Sweet and gentle, the most 'toy-like' rabbit breed. Long floppy ears + round face, adorable enough to melt hearts

diet.zh: 和荷兰侏儒兔相同：干草为主（80%），辅以兔粮和少量蔬菜
diet.en: Same as Netherland Dwarf: hay as staple (80%), pellets and some veggies

habitat.zh: 室内饲养，需要宽敞的笼子和每日放风时间
habitat.en: Indoor living, needs spacious cage and daily free roam time

appearance.zh: 最显著特征是大大的下垂耳朵，贴脸两侧。圆圆的脸、短身子，看起来像活生生的毛绒玩具
appearance.en: Most distinctive feature is the large droopy ears hanging beside the face. Round face, short body, looks like a living plush toy

history.zh: 由荷兰育种师用多种兔子杂交培育，在1950年代被正式认可。是目前中国最受欢迎的宠物兔品种之一
history.en: Bred by Dutch breeders crossing multiple rabbit breeds, officially recognized in the 1950s. One of China's most popular pet rabbit breeds

funFact.zh: 荷兰垂耳兔的垂耳不是天生的——刚出生时耳朵是立起来的，随着生长慢慢垂下来。而且它们高兴时跑跳的「Binky舞」看起来完全像失控的毛球，毫无形象！💃
funFact.en: Holland Lops aren't born with floppy ears - they're upright at birth and gradually flop down as they grow. And their happy 'Binky Dance' (jumping and twisting) looks totally like an out-of-control fluffball! 💃

myths.zh: 「垂耳兔的耳朵需要特别护理」——垂耳的护理其实不比立耳更复杂，只需定期检查内耳清洁就好。耳朵折叠会增加感染风险，所以检查频率要提高。
myths.en: 'Lop ears need special care' - lop ears aren't really harder to maintain than upright ears, just check inner ear cleanliness regularly. Folded ears do increase infection risk so check more frequently.

careTips.zh:
1. 干草是绝对主食！
2. 每周检查耳朵是否有感染迹象
3. 每天至少2小时放风
4. 避免被摔落，骨骼脆弱
careTips.en:
1. Hay is the absolute staple!
2. Check ears weekly for infection signs
3. At least 2 hours free roam daily
4. Prevent falls, fragile bones

temperament.zh: 活泼友善，好奇心旺盛。比侏儒兔胆大，更容易驯化，适合家庭与孩子互动
temperament.en: Active and friendly, very curious. Bolder than Dwarf rabbits, easier to tame, great for families with children

diet.zh: 干草为主（80%），搭配优质兔粮和新鲜蔬菜。不能喂水果过多
diet.en: Hay as staple (80%), quality pellets and fresh veggies. Don't overfeed fruit

habitat.zh: 室内饲养，需要足够大的笼子。每天放风是必须的
habitat.en: Indoor living, needs large enough cage. Daily free roam is a must

appearance.zh: 最独特的是短而直立的绒毛，摸起来像天鹅绒！颜色多样，常见黑色、蓝色、棕色等。非常有触感
appearance.en: Most unique feature is short upright velvety fur, feels like velvet! Various colors including black, blue, brown. Very tactile

history.zh: 迷你版雷克斯兔，于1980年代在美国培育出来。以其丝绒般的毛发质地著称，是兔子界的「丝绒公主/王子」
history.en: Miniature version of Rex Rabbit, developed in USA in the 1980s. Known for velvet-like coat texture, the 'velvet prince/princess' of rabbits

funFact.zh: 迷你雷克斯兔的毛被称为「最柔软的毛」之一——每根毛都是直立的，触感比普通兔毛密集很多。有主人说摸起来比奢侈品牌的天鹅绒还软！😍
funFact.en: Mini Rex fur is considered among the 'softest fur' - each hair stands upright, much denser than regular rabbit fur. Owners say it's softer than luxury brand velvet! 😍

myths.zh: 「兔子不需要出来玩，关在笼子里就好」——大错特错！无论哪种兔子都需要每天放风运动，否则会因压力和运动不足而生病。
myths.en: 'Rabbits don't need to come out, keeping them caged is fine' - totally wrong! All rabbits need daily free roam exercise, otherwise they'll get sick from stress and inactivity.

careTips.zh:
1. 干草永远是主食！
2. 每天放风2小时以上
3. 不要强迫它们，让它们自愿来找你
4. 注意脊椎保护，不要抱得太紧
careTips.en:
1. Hay is always the staple!
2. 2+ hours daily free roam
3. Don't force interaction, let them come to you
4. Protect spine, don't hold too tightly

temperament.zh: 温柔安静，性格沉稳，不太爱动。但因为毛量惊人，需要大量护理时间
temperament.en: Gentle and quiet, calm temperament, not very active. But extraordinary fur requires substantial grooming time

diet.zh: 干草为主食，充足的纤维素对消化和减少毛球症非常重要
diet.en: Hay as staple, ample fiber is crucial for digestion and reducing hairball issues

habitat.zh: 室内饲养，保持清洁干燥环境。长毛容易受潮和结块
habitat.en: Indoor living, keep clean and dry. Long fur easily gets damp and tangled

appearance.zh: 全身被超长毛发包裹，看起来就像一颗毛绒大球！几乎看不见眼睛和耳朵，只能看见一团蓬松的毛
appearance.en: Entire body covered in extremely long fur, looks like a giant fluff ball! Eyes and ears barely visible under all the fur

history.zh: 来自土耳其首都安卡拉，和安哥拉猫、安哥拉山羊来自同一地区。安哥拉兔毛是世界上最细最柔软的天然纤维之一
history.en: From Ankara, Turkey, same origin area as Angora cats and Angora goats. Angora rabbit fur is one of the world's finest and softest natural fibers

funFact.zh: 安哥拉兔的毛每年可以产出300-500克！安哥拉羊毛是比普通绵羊毛暖7倍的天然纤维。所以养安哥拉兔，理论上可以给自己织毛衣🧶
funFact.en: Angora rabbits can produce 300-500g of fiber per year! Angora fiber is 7 times warmer than regular sheep wool. So theoretically you could knit yourself a sweater from your pet rabbit 🧶

myths.zh: 「安哥拉兔很好养，毛多而已」——大错特错！安哥拉兔是所有兔子里护理要求最高的，每天都需要梳毛，否则毛会严重打结甚至造成皮肤问题。
myths.en: 'Angora rabbits are easy, just lots of fur' - totally wrong! They have the highest grooming requirements of all rabbits, needing daily brushing or fur tangles cause serious skin issues.

careTips.zh:
1. 每天必须梳毛！长毛打结会造成皮肤病
2. 定期修剪多余的长毛
3. 保持干燥环境，潮湿会导致毛球症
4. 充足的干草预防毛球堵塞
careTips.en:
1. Daily brushing is mandatory! Tangled fur causes skin disease
2. Regular trimming of excess fur
3. Dry environment essential, humidity causes hairball issues
4. Ample hay to prevent hairball blockage

temperament.zh: 独居小动物，必须一只一个笼子。性格温顺容易驯服，但领地意识很强
temperament.en: Solitary animal, must be housed alone. Gentle and easy to tame, but very territorial

diet.zh: 专业仓鼠粮为主，搭配少量坚果和蔬菜。别喂太多零食，会长胖变成球
diet.en: Professional hamster food as staple, some nuts and veggies. Don't overfeed treats or they'll become literal balls

habitat.zh: 需要大笼子+跑轮（越大越好）+ 垫料。它们是夜行动物，白天基本在睡觉
habitat.en: Needs large cage + exercise wheel (bigger is better) + bedding. Nocturnal, basically sleeping during the day

appearance.zh: 金色毛发、圆滚滚的身体、小小的耳朵、总在不停转动的鼻子。吃东西塞满腮帮子的样子可以治愈一切
appearance.en: Golden fur, round body, tiny ears, constantly twitching nose. Cheeks stuffed with food can cure anything

history.zh: 1930年在叙利亚被发现，所有宠物金丝熊都是1930年在耶路撒冷附近抓到的那一窝的后代！相当于全世界都是一家人
history.en: Discovered in Syria in 1930, all pet Syrian hamsters descend from one litter found near Jerusalem! The whole world's hamsters are one big family

funFact.zh: 仓鼠的腮帮子可以装下相当于体重一半的食物！它们是动物界的「搬运工+吃货」。你见过一只仓鼠同时塞3颗花生米还满脸淡定吗？绝对值得一看 🥜
funFact.en: Hamster cheeks can hold half their body weight in food! The 'porter + foodie' of animals. Ever seen a hamster stuff 3 peanuts while looking totally nonchalant? Worth watching 🥜

myths.zh: 「仓鼠可以两只一起养」——金丝熊绝对不行！它们会打架打到一方受伤甚至死亡。一定要一笼一鼠！
myths.en: 'Hamsters can live together' - absolutely not for Syrians! They'll fight until one is injured or dead. One hamster per cage!

careTips.zh:
1. 必须一笼一鼠！
2. 跑轮越大越好（至少21cm直径）
3. 垫料至少5cm厚，让它们可以打洞
4. 不要水洗！用浴沙洗澡
5. 寿命虽短，但请给它最好的照顾
careTips.en:
1. ONE hamster per cage!
2. Bigger wheel is better (min 21cm diameter)
3. At least 5cm deep bedding for digging
4. No water baths! Use sand bath
5. Short lifespan, but give the best care

name.zh: 罗伯罗夫斯基仓鼠（老公公）

temperament.zh: 极度活跃，速度超快，胆子小很难上手。更适合观赏而非互动。能同性两只一起养（稀有！）
temperament.en: Extremely active, lightning fast, timid and hard to handle. Better for watching than interacting. Can sometimes keep two same-sex together (rare for hamsters!)

diet.zh: 仓鼠专用粮，搭配少量种子和蔬菜。体型小食量少
diet.en: Hamster pellets with some seeds and veggies. Small body = small portions

habitat.zh: 大笼子+直径21cm以上的跑轮，基材厚一些。它们非常爱跑，一晚上能跑几十公里
habitat.en: Large cage + wheel at least 21cm diameter, deep bedding. They love running, covering dozens of km per night

appearance.zh: 世界上最小的仓鼠！身体只有拇指那么大，胖乎乎的，眼睛大到脸装不下。超级可爱但超级快
appearance.en: World's smallest hamster! Body only thumb-sized, chubby, eyes too big for the face. Super cute but super fast

history.zh: 原产自蒙古草原和中亚沙漠，以19世纪俄国探险家Roborovski命名。在中国常被称为「老公公」
history.en: Native to Mongolian steppes and Central Asian deserts, named after 19th-century Russian explorer Roborovski. Commonly called 'Lao Gong Gong' (grandpa) in China

funFact.zh: 老公公仓鼠是世界上速度最快的仓鼠！一只罗伯罗夫斯基每晚在跑轮上跑的距离相当于人跑4个马拉松！而且两只在跑轮上追逐的画面是互联网上最可爱的视频之一🐾
funFact.en: Roborovski is the world's fastest hamster! One Roborovski's nightly wheel run equals 4 human marathons! And watching two chase each other on a wheel is one of the internet's cutest videos 🐾

myths.zh: 「仓鼠能两只一起养」——老公公是少数能两只一起养的仓鼠，但前提是从小一起长大，并且提供足够大的空间。金丝熊绝对不行！
myths.en: 'Hamsters can live together' - Roborovskis are among the few that sometimes can, but only if raised together from birth with enough space. Syrian hamsters absolutely cannot!

careTips.zh:
1. 需要大跑轮（最小21cm）
2. 速度太快，上手练习要在浴缸里进行防止逃跑
3. 可以两只一起养，但要观察有无打架
4. 体型小，笼子栅栏间距要小
careTips.en:
1. Large wheel needed (minimum 21cm)
2. Too fast - practice handling in bathtub to prevent escapes
3. Can keep two together but monitor for fighting
4. Small body - cage bar spacing must be narrow

taxonomy.species: 罗伯罗夫斯基仓鼠 P. roborovskii

temperament.zh: 比金丝熊更社交，更活泼。中国市面上最常见的仓鼠，也就是「布丁」和「三线」仓鼠
temperament.en: More social and active than Syrian hamsters. Most common hamster in China's pet market, sold as 'pudding' and 'tri-line' variants

diet.zh: 专业仓鼠粮为主，搭配少量种子和蔬菜
diet.en: Professional hamster food as staple, with some seeds and veggies

habitat.zh: 中等大小笼子+跑轮+足够垫料。比金丝熊占用空间小
habitat.en: Medium-sized cage + wheel + ample bedding. Less space needed than Syrian hamsters

appearance.zh: 比金丝熊小，身上有三条深色条纹（三线仓鼠）。毛色有黄色（布丁）、白色、灰色等。圆滚滚超可爱
appearance.en: Smaller than Syrians, with three dark dorsal stripes (tri-line variant). Colors include yellow (pudding), white, gray. Round and adorable

history.zh: 原产于中亚草原，冬天毛色会变白（Winter White的由来）。在中国被昵称为「布丁仓鼠」是因为黄色品种颜色像布丁
history.en: Native to Central Asian steppes, fur turns white in winter (hence 'Winter White'). Called 'Pudding Hamster' in China because yellow variety looks like pudding

funFact.zh: 布丁仓鼠的腮帮子鼓起来时，看起来比头还大！有人拍过一个仓鼠一次把12颗葡萄都塞进腮帮子的视频——12颗！这是超自然现象😂
funFact.en: When Dwarf Hamster cheeks are full, they look bigger than the head! Someone filmed a hamster fitting 12 grapes in its cheeks at once - 12 grapes! That's supernatural 😂

myths.zh: 「侏儒仓鼠可以两只一起养」——和金丝熊不同，坎培尔侏儒仓鼠偶尔可以同性一起养，但繁殖的话公母绝对不能放一起，生育速度极快！
myths.en: 'Dwarf hamsters can live together' - unlike Syrians, Campbell's Dwarfs can sometimes share a cage same-sex, but NEVER mix genders - they reproduce at extraordinary speed!

careTips.zh:
1. 提供跑轮（至少17cm直径）
2. 垫料厚度5cm以上
3. 不要用浴沙代替垫料
4. 注意糖尿病风险，少喂高糖食物
careTips.en:
1. Provide wheel (minimum 17cm diameter)
2. At least 5cm deep bedding
3. Don't use sand bath as bedding substitute
4. Watch diabetes risk, limit high-sugar foods

temperament.zh: 佛系水中佛，整天就是漂浮+吃东西+偶尔游两下。是水族界的「躺平大师」
temperament.en: Zen water Buddha, just floating + eating + occasional swimming. The 'master of chilling' of the aquarium world

diet.zh: 专用蛙粮或血虫，因为视力不好，靠嗅觉找食物。投喂时别被其他鱼抢了
diet.en: Specialized frog food or bloodworms. Poor vision so they rely on smell. Make sure fish don't steal their food

habitat.zh: 需要至少10升水的鱼缸，水深不超过20cm。水温24-28°C
habitat.en: Needs at least 10L tank, water depth under 20cm. Water temp 24-28°C

appearance.zh: 超迷你的小青蛙，手指头那么大，四条腿划水的样子像在做水上芭蕾
appearance.en: Super tiny frogs, finger-sized, swimming with all four legs looks like water ballet

history.zh: 来自中非的刚果河流域，是水族箱中很受欢迎的小居民。不需要上岸，完全水生
history.en: From the Congo River basin in Central Africa, popular little residents of aquariums. Fully aquatic, never needs to leave water

funFact.zh: 它们「唱歌」时会发出嗡嗡的振动声——这是雄蛙在求偶。所以如果半夜听到鱼缸发出声音，别以为是鱼缸坏了！
funFact.en: They 'sing' by making buzzing vibrations - males calling for mates. If you hear sounds from the tank at night, don't think it's broken!

myths.zh: 有人说「青蛙需要陆地」——但非洲侏儒蛙是完全水生的！它们一生都在水里度过，连皮肤呼吸都在水下进行。
myths.en: Some say 'frogs need land' - but African Dwarf Frogs are fully aquatic! They spend their entire lives in water, even breathing through skin underwater.

careTips.zh:
1. 水温保持24-28°C
2. 每周换1/3的水
3. 盖子要盖好，它们会跳出来
4. 不要和太凶的鱼混养
careTips.en:
1. Keep water at 24-28°C
2. Change 1/3 water weekly
3. Keep lid on, they can jump out
4. Don't keep with aggressive fish

temperament.zh: 懒到极致的吃货！几乎整天埋在基材里不动，只有食物靠近才猛扑。会咬人，但主要出于进食本能
temperament.en: The laziest glutton! Almost always buried in substrate, only lunges at food. Will bite but mainly from feeding instinct

diet.zh: 什么都吃！蟋蟀、杜比亚蟑螂、老鼠、小鱼……几乎来者不拒。控制食量是最重要的任务
diet.en: Eats EVERYTHING! Crickets, dubia roaches, mice, small fish... almost nothing refused. Portion control is the #1 challenge

habitat.zh: 需要潮湿的椰土基材，可以半埋其中。需要保温，温度25-28°C
habitat.en: Needs moist coconut substrate to half-bury in. Needs heating, temperature 25-28°C

appearance.zh: 又圆又扁，嘴巴大到身体的一半！背上有绿色花纹，肚子白色。看起来像一个会动的绿色碗
appearance.en: Round and flat, mouth takes up half the body! Green patterns on back, white belly. Looks like a moving green bowl

history.zh: 来自南美洲潮湿草原，因为外形像游戏角色「吃豆人」而得名。是近年爬宠界最火的两栖动物之一
history.en: From South American humid grasslands, named for resemblance to the Pac-Man game character. One of the most popular amphibians in the reptile hobby

funFact.zh: 角蛙的体型几乎80%都是嘴和胃！它们非常贪吃，有记录的角蛙尝试吞下比自己大的东西——包括另一只角蛙！养两只角蛙千万要分开饲养🐸
funFact.en: Pacman frogs are about 80% mouth and stomach! They're incredibly greedy - recorded trying to swallow things larger than themselves, including other Pacman frogs! NEVER keep two together 🐸

myths.zh: 「角蛙是有毒蛙」——角蛙没有毒！但它们的咬合力非常强，被咬会很疼。不是毒，是暴力。
myths.en: 'Pacman frogs are poisonous' - they're NOT venomous! But their bite force is very strong, biting really hurts. Not poison, just brute force.

careTips.zh:
1. 基材保持湿润（但不是水浸）
2. 温度保持25-28°C
3. 严格控制喂食量，防止肥胖
4. ⚠️ 不要将两只角蛙放一起，会互相攻击
careTips.en:
1. Keep substrate moist (not flooded)
2. Temperature 25-28°C
3. Strictly control feeding portions
4. ⚠️ Never keep two together, they will attack each other

temperament.zh: 蛙界最「淡定」的品种，表情永远像在笑。耐上手，比其他树蛙更适合互动。慢悠悠的，从不着急
temperament.en: The most 'zen' frog, always looks like it's smiling. Tolerates handling well, better for interaction than other tree frogs. Never in a hurry

diet.zh: 蟋蟀、蟑螂为主。食欲很好，控制喂食量，容易发胖变成「胖胖肥大」形态
diet.en: Mainly crickets and roaches. Great appetite, control portions - easily becomes 'super dumpy' from overfeeding

habitat.zh: 树栖！需要高空间饲养箱，有爬附植物和水盆。温度22-28°C
habitat.en: Arboreal! Needs tall enclosure with climbing plants and water dish. Temperature 22-28°C

appearance.zh: 翠绿色皮肤，腹部白色，眼睛很大，嘴角天然上翘——永远像在微笑！胖的时候皮肤会有折叠，被称为「胖胖蛙」
appearance.en: Emerald green skin, white belly, large eyes, naturally upturned corners of mouth - always smiling! When fat, skin folds over - hence 'dumpy frog'

history.zh: 来自澳大利亚和新几内亚的树林，以18世纪英国博物学家John White命名。是最受欢迎的宠物树蛙之一
history.en: From Australian and New Guinean forests, named after 18th-century British naturalist John White. One of the most popular pet tree frogs

funFact.zh: 白氏树蛙越吃越胖，脂肪会把眼睛都挤出来！这种「超胖」形态被称为Dumpy（矮胖）形态，有专门爱好者追求养出最胖的白氏树蛙。当然适当肥胖，太胖还是不健康😄
funFact.en: White's Tree Frogs get so fat that fat rolls push over their eyes! This 'super fat' form is called 'dumpy' and some hobbyists actually try to grow the fattest one. Of course, slightly fat is fine, too fat is unhealthy 😄

myths.zh: 「树蛙皮肤很脆弱，摸了会死」——白氏树蛙是树蛙中最耐接触的品种，上手前洗干净手不涂护手霜，短时间上手完全没问题。
myths.en: 'Tree frog skin is fragile, touching causes death' - White's Tree Frogs are the most handling-tolerant frogs. Clean hands (no lotion) and brief handling is completely fine.

careTips.zh:
1. 提供高空间饲养箱和攀爬枝条
2. 每天喷水保持湿度
3. 温度保持22-28°C
4. 严格控制喂食频率，防止过度肥胖
careTips.en:
1. Tall enclosure with climbing branches
2. Daily misting for humidity
3. Temperature 22-28°C
4. Strict feeding schedule to prevent excessive obesity

temperament.zh: 蜥蜴界的「金毛」，性格温顺亲人，会趴在主人肩上看世界。发怒时下巴会变黑，像长了胡子
temperament.en: The 'Golden Retriever' of lizards, gentle and bonds with owners. Will perch on shoulders to see the world. Chin turns black when angry, like growing a beard

diet.zh: 杂食性，昆虫+蔬菜各半。蟋蟀、杜比亚蟑螂、羽衣甘蓝都是好选择
diet.en: Omnivorous, half insects and half veggies. Crickets, dubia roaches, and kale are all great choices

habitat.zh: 需要UVB灯+加热灯，干燥环境。饲养箱至少120x60x60cm
habitat.en: Needs UVB + basking lamp, dry environment. Enclosure at least 120x60x60cm

appearance.zh: 看起来像一只迷你恐龙，三角形的头、满身的小刺、会挥手的短爪子。酷毙了！
appearance.en: Looks like a mini dinosaur, triangular head, covered in small spikes, short claws that wave. Totally cool!

history.zh: 来自澳大利亚中部沙漠，是爬宠界最受欢迎的蜥蜴之一。因为性格好、互动性强，被称为「入门蜥蜴之王」
history.en: From the central Australian desert, one of the most popular pet lizards. Great personality and interactivity, called the 'King of Beginner Lizards'

funFact.zh: 鬃狮蜥会「挥手」！这不是在跟你打招呼（虽然很像），而是一种表示服从和示弱的行为。但养在客厅里有个会挥手的蜥蜴还是很酷的👋
funFact.en: Bearded Dragons 'wave'! Not greeting you (though it looks like it), but a sign of submission. Still, having a waving lizard in the living room is pretty cool 👋

myths.zh: 有人说「蜥蜴很危险」——鬃狮蜥完全没攻击性，除非你是一只蟋蟀。还有人说「蜥蜴不认人」——但养过的人都知道，鬃狮会认出主人的气味和声音！
myths.en: Some say 'lizards are dangerous' - Bearded Dragons have zero aggression unless you're a cricket. Others say 'lizards don't recognize people' - but owners know they recognize their human's scent and voice!

careTips.zh:
1. UVB灯是必需品，没有会生病
2. 需要温度梯度：热区35-42°C，冷区24-28°C
3. 饮食多样化很重要
4. 可以训练它用杯子喝水
careTips.en:
1. UVB lamp is essential, they get sick without it
2. Temperature gradient needed: hot 35-42°C, cool 24-28°C
3. Diet variety is important
4. Can train them to drink from a dish

temperament.zh: 蜥蜴界的「小可爱」，性格温和，萌萌的外表下有着有趣的个性。夜行动物，白天都在睡觉
temperament.en: The 'cutie' of lizards, gentle personality with fun character behind adorable looks. Nocturnal, sleeps all day

diet.zh: 纯肉食性，以蟋蟀、面包虫、杜比亚蟑螂为主。吃虫的画面有点重口但很过瘾
diet.en: Purely carnivorous, eats crickets, mealworms, dubia roaches. Feeding scenes are a bit intense but satisfying

habitat.zh: 不需要UVB灯（少数例外）。需要加热垫保持温度。比鬃狮蜥好打理
habitat.en: Doesn't need UVB light (rare exception). Needs heating pad for temperature. Easier to maintain than Bearded Dragons

appearance.zh: 黄色底色+黑色斑点，像穿了件豹纹小裙子。眼睛特别大，像戴了美瞳一样
appearance.en: Yellow base with black spots, like wearing a leopard print skirt. Extra large eyes look like colored contacts

history.zh: 来自巴基斯坦和印度的干旱地区，是最受欢迎的爬行动物之一。颜色变体多达上百种
history.en: From arid regions of Pakistan and India, one of the most popular reptiles. Hundreds of color morphs available

funFact.zh: 豹纹守宫的尾巴可以储存脂肪，像骆驼的驼峰！如果吃得太多，尾巴会变得比身体还粗——看起来就像一条有头的胖虫子😂
funFact.en: Leopard Gecko tails store fat like a camel's hump! If overfed, the tail becomes thicker than the body - looks like a fat worm with a head 😂

myths.zh: 「壁虎/守宫的尾巴断了会长回来」——豹纹守宫确实会，但新长出来的尾巴是光溜溜的，跟原来的不一样，像是「低配版」替代品。
myths.en: 'Geckos can regrow their tails' - Leopard Geckos can, but the new tail is smooth and different, like a 'budget version' replacement.

careTips.zh:
1. 不需要UVB灯，用加热垫就够了
2. 保持干燥环境
3. 提供躲避洞穴
4. 每周喂3-4次
5. 补充钙粉和维生素
careTips.en:
1. No UVB needed, heating pad is enough
2. Keep environment dry
3. Provide hiding caves
4. Feed 3-4 times weekly
5. Supplement calcium and vitamins

origin.zh: 新喀里多尼亚（法国海外领地）

temperament.zh: 温顺、好奇、不咬人，喜欢在人手上爬行。白天睡觉，晚上活跃
temperament.en: Gentle, curious, rarely bites, enjoys climbing on hands. Sleeps during day, active at night

diet.zh: 杂食性。可喂专用果泥粮（Pangea/Repashy）+ 偶尔喂昆虫（蟋蟀、麦皮虫）
diet.en: Omnivorous. Specialized fruit mix diet (Pangea/Repashy) + occasional insects (crickets, mealworms)

habitat.zh: 树栖型，原产热带雨林。温度保持22-26°C，湿度60-80%，需要高一些的笼子方便攀爬
habitat.en: Arboreal, from tropical rainforest. Keep at 22-26°C, humidity 60-80%, taller enclosure preferred for climbing

appearance.zh: 最大特征是眼睛上方有「睫毛」状突起，尾巴末端有抓握能力。颜色多样，有奶油色、橙色、棕色等
appearance.en: Distinctive 'eyelash' crests above eyes, prehensile tail tip. Colors range from cream, orange to brown

history.zh: 1866年被发现后以为已灭绝，直到1994年才被重新发现！现在所有宠物睫角守宫都是人工繁育，不允许野外捕捉
history.en: Discovered in 1866, then thought extinct until rediscovered in 1994! All pet crested geckos are captive-bred; wild collection is prohibited

funFact.zh: 睫角守宫的尾巴断掉后不会再长回来——但它们毫不在意，依然活得好好的。所以有很多「没尾巴」的睫角，大家亲切地叫它们「无尾派」🦎
funFact.en: Crested Geckos' tails don't regenerate once dropped - but they don't seem to care at all! Many tailless crested geckos ('frogbutts') live perfectly happy lives 🦎

myths.zh: 「守宫很难养，需要紫外线灯」——睫角守宫不需要UVB灯，果泥粮就能满足大部分营养需求，是爬行动物里最好养之一。
myths.en: 'Geckos need UV lights and are hard to keep' - Crested Geckos need no UVB, and fruit-mix diet meets most nutritional needs, making them one of the easiest reptiles to care for.

careTips.zh:
1. 用果泥专用粮作为主食，每2-3天换一次
2. 每晚喷水增加湿度，也是它们的饮水来源
3. 不需要加热灯，室温22-26°C即可
4. 提供树枝和植物供攀爬躲藏
5. 避免白天打扰，它们白天睡觉
careTips.en:
1. Use fruit-mix diet as staple, replace every 2-3 days
2. Mist enclosure nightly for humidity and drinking water
3. No heat lamp needed, room temp 22-26°C is fine
4. Provide branches and plants for climbing and hiding
5. Avoid disturbing during the day, they are nocturnal

origin.zh: 中美洲和南美洲热带地区
origin.en: Tropical regions of Central and South America

temperament.zh: 幼年时较驯服，成年后领地意识强。需要长期社会化训练。喜欢晒太阳，善于游泳
temperament.en: Docile when young, territorial as adults. Requires long-term socialization. Enjoys basking and is an excellent swimmer

diet.zh: 严格草食性。以深绿色蔬菜为主（羽衣甘蓝、芥菜叶、蒲公英），辅以水果。绝对不喂动物性蛋白质
diet.en: Strictly herbivorous. Mainly dark leafy greens (kale, mustard greens, dandelion), plus fruits. Never feed animal protein

habitat.zh: 原产热带雨林，擅长爬树。需要大型饲养箱（至少1.8米高），UVB灯必备，晒背区温度38-42°C
habitat.en: From tropical rainforest, excellent climbers. Need large enclosure (at least 1.8m tall), UVB lighting essential, basking spot 38-42°C

appearance.zh: 全身鲜绿色，背部有锯齿状背鳍，下颚有大型垂肉（dewlap），眼睛有独特的金色虹膜
appearance.en: Bright green body with dorsal spines, large dewlap under chin, distinctive golden iris eyes

history.zh: 中美洲原住民的重要食物来源，曾被称为「树上的鸡」。1970年代开始大量作为宠物引进美国，现已在佛罗里达成为入侵物种
history.en: Important food source for indigenous peoples of Central America, called 'chicken of the tree.' Imported to US as pets in the 1970s, now an invasive species in Florida

funFact.zh: 绿鬣蜥有「第三只眼」！头顶有一个顶眼（parietal eye），只能感知光线变化，用于感知天敌从上方靠近——真正的「后脑长眼」🦎
funFact.en: Green Iguanas have a 'third eye'! The parietal eye on top of their head detects light changes to sense predators approaching from above - literally eyes in the back of their head 🦎

myths.zh: 「绿鬣蜥是小宠物，好养」——幼年时只有20厘米，但成年后长达1.5-1.8米，需要一整个房间大的笼子。不推荐新手饲养。
myths.en: 'Iguanas are small and easy to keep' - Baby iguanas are only 20cm, but adults reach 1.5-1.8m and need an enclosure the size of a room. Not recommended for beginners.

careTips.zh:
1. 必须配备UVB灯（T5 HO 10.0规格）
2. 晒背区温度38-42°C，冷区保持26-28°C
3. 每天喂新鲜蔬菜，不喂动物蛋白
4. 每天洗澡15-20分钟，促进排便和水分摄入
5. 从幼年开始社会化训练，避免成年后攻击性
careTips.en:
1. UVB lighting required (T5 HO 10.0 bulb)
2. Basking spot 38-42°C, cool side 26-28°C
3. Fresh vegetables daily, no animal protein
4. Daily 15-20 min bath to aid digestion and hydration
5. Start socialization from young age to prevent adult aggression

origin.zh: 日本（由中国鲤鱼培育而来）

lifespan.en: 25-35 years, record lifespan up to 226 years

temperament.zh: 温和、好奇，会认识主人并来讨食。群居性强，喜欢成群游动
temperament.en: Gentle and curious, recognize their owner and beg for food. Highly social, prefer swimming in groups

diet.zh: 杂食性。专用锦鲤颗粒粮为主，可补充蔬菜、虾、蚯蚓。夏季每日多次喂食，冬季减少或停喂
diet.en: Omnivorous. Main diet is specialized koi pellets, supplemented with vegetables, shrimp, earthworms. Feed multiple times daily in summer, reduce or stop in winter

habitat.zh: 需要大型户外池塘或室内大水族箱（每条锦鲤至少1000升水），需过滤系统和充氧设备。适宜水温15-25°C
habitat.en: Requires large outdoor pond or indoor aquarium (at least 1000L per fish), with filtration and aeration. Ideal water temperature 15-25°C

appearance.zh: 体型圆润修长，颜色极为丰富：红、白、黑、黄、蓝、金等，品种超过100种。鱼鳞光泽如宝石
appearance.en: Rounded and elongated body, incredibly diverse colors: red, white, black, yellow, blue, gold, and more. Over 100 varieties. Scales shine like jewels

history.zh: 中国人2000年前开始养鲤鱼，日本在17世纪将其培育成观赏鱼。现代锦鲤文化在日本发展最盛，一条顶级锦鲤拍卖价可超过200万美元
history.en: Chinese began keeping carp 2000 years ago; Japan developed ornamental varieties in the 17th century. Modern koi culture flourished in Japan; a top koi sold at auction for over $2 million USD

funFact.zh: 日本有一条名叫「花子」的锦鲤，据鱼鳞年轮分析活了226年（1751-1977）！它被六代主人传承饲养，是有记录最长寿的锦鲤🐟
funFact.en: A Japanese koi named 'Hanako' reportedly lived 226 years (1751-1977), verified by scale ring analysis! She was passed down through six generations of owners — the oldest recorded koi 🐟

myths.zh: 「锦鲤只会长到鱼缸大小」——这是误解！锦鲤会一直长大，被关在小鱼缸里会发育不良甚至死亡。它们需要大型池塘。
myths.en: 'Koi only grow as big as their tank' — false! Koi keep growing regardless of tank size; small tanks cause stunted growth and health issues. They need large ponds.

careTips.zh:
1. 池塘至少要1000升，每增加一条加600升
2. 高效过滤系统必备，每小时过滤水量=池塘总量
3. 水温变化超过2°C/天需注意应激反应
4. 每周换水20-30%
5. 定期检测水质（氨氮、亚硝酸盐、pH）
careTips.en:
1. Pond minimum 1000L, add 600L per additional fish
2. High-efficiency filter required, hourly turnover = total pond volume
3. Temperature change over 2°C/day may cause stress
4. Weekly 20-30% water change
5. Regular water testing (ammonia, nitrite, pH)

origin.zh: 中国（唐朝开始驯化，宋朝开始室内饲养）
origin.en: China (domesticated since Tang Dynasty, indoor keeping since Song Dynasty)

size.zh: 中小型（5-30厘米，视品种而定）
size.en: Small to medium (5-30 cm depending on variety)

temperament.zh: 温和、群居，会认识主人。记忆力比传说中好得多，可以记住3个月以上的经历
temperament.en: Gentle and social, recognize their owner. Much better memory than the myth suggests — can remember experiences for over 3 months

diet.zh: 杂食性。专用金鱼颗粒粮或薄片粮，可补充活食（水蚤、丰年虾）和蔬菜。不要过量喂食
diet.en: Omnivorous. Specialized goldfish pellets or flakes, supplemented with live food (daphnia, brine shrimp) and vegetables. Do not overfeed

habitat.zh: 适应性强，但需足够空间。每条金鱼至少40升水，需过滤系统。水温16-24°C最佳，可耐受0-30°C
habitat.en: Adaptable, but needs adequate space. At least 40L per fish, filtration required. Optimal temperature 16-24°C, can tolerate 0-30°C

appearance.zh: 品种繁多：普通金鱼（单尾）、狮子头、水泡眼、蝶尾、琉金等200多个品种。颜色有红、橙、黄、白、黑等
appearance.en: Huge variety: common goldfish (single tail), lionhead, bubble eye, butterfly tail, ryukin, and 200+ more varieties. Colors include red, orange, yellow, white, black

history.zh: 中国人养金鱼超过1000年，是世界上最古老的观赏鱼。从锦鲤的变异个体培育而来，宋朝皇室将其作为皇家宠物。16世纪传入日本，17世纪传入欧洲
history.en: Chinese have kept goldfish for over 1000 years — the world's oldest ornamental fish. Bred from mutant carp, favored by Song Dynasty royalty. Introduced to Japan in the 16th century, Europe in the 17th

funFact.zh: 「金鱼只有3秒记忆」是彻头彻尾的谣言！科学实验证明金鱼可以记住并执行任务超过3个月。有人还训练出会走迷宫、会按开关拿食物的金鱼🐠
funFact.en: 'Goldfish have a 3-second memory' is completely false! Scientific tests prove goldfish remember and perform tasks for over 3 months. Some have been trained to navigate mazes and press levers for food 🐠

myths.zh: 「金鱼放小鱼缸养就好」——金鱼会产生大量氨氮废物，小缸水质迅速恶化。每条金鱼至少需要40升水和过滤系统，才能健康成长。
myths.en: 'Goldfish are fine in small bowls' — goldfish produce large amounts of ammonia waste, quickly fouling small bowls. Each fish needs at least 40L and filtration to stay healthy.

careTips.zh:
1. 每条至少40升水，配过滤系统
2. 每周换水20-30%
3. 不要过量喂食，每次喂2分钟内能吃完的量
4. 水温不能骤变，换水时注意温差
5. 定期检测氨氮和亚硝酸盐浓度
careTips.en:
1. At least 40L per fish with filtration
2. Weekly 20-30% water change
3. Don't overfeed — only what they can eat in 2 minutes
4. Avoid sudden temperature changes when changing water
5. Regularly test for ammonia and nitrite

origin.zh: 南美洲委内瑞拉、特立尼达和多巴哥
origin.en: Venezuela, Trinidad and Tobago, South America

size.zh: 微小型（雄鱼3-4厘米，雌鱼5-6厘米）

temperament.zh: 活泼、好动，雄鱼喜欢在雌鱼面前炫耀。适合群养，群体越大越活跃
temperament.en: Active and lively, males love to show off for females. Thrive in groups — the larger the group, the more active they are

diet.zh: 杂食性。薄片粮、颗粒粮，可补充活食（丰年虾、水蚤）。每天喂1-2次，少量多次
diet.en: Omnivorous. Flake food, small pellets, supplemented with live food (brine shrimp, daphnia). Feed 1-2 times daily in small amounts

habitat.zh: 适应性极强。最小20升水族箱，水温22-28°C，pH 7.0-8.0。不需要特别设备，适合新手
habitat.en: Extremely adaptable. Minimum 20L aquarium, temperature 22-28°C, pH 7.0-8.0. No special equipment needed, ideal for beginners

appearance.zh: 雄鱼色彩极为绚丽，尾鳍形状多样（扇形、剑尾、莫斯科蓝等），品种超过300种。雌鱼相对朴素
appearance.en: Males are brilliantly colorful with diverse tail shapes (fan, sword, Moscow blue, etc.), over 300 varieties. Females are comparatively plain

history.zh: 1866年由英国牧师罗伯特·约翰·莱姆赛·古比（Guppy）在特立尼达发现，因此得名。现已成为全球最普及的观赏鱼，每年销售量超过10亿条
history.en: Discovered in 1866 by British clergyman Robert John Lechmere Guppy in Trinidad, hence the name. Now the world's most popular aquarium fish, with over 1 billion sold annually

funFact.zh: 孔雀鱼是卵胎生！雌鱼体内受精、直接产出小鱼而不是卵。一次可产20-100条小鱼，而且刚出生就会游泳——完全不需要父母照料🐡
funFact.en: Guppies give birth to live young! Females fertilize internally and deliver baby fish directly — not eggs. One birth can produce 20-100 fry, and they can swim immediately after birth — no parental care needed 🐡

myths.zh: 「孔雀鱼好养，随便怎么养都行」——虽然耐受性强，但水质差、过度拥挤同样会让它们生病死亡。定期换水和适当密度是关键。
myths.en: 'Guppies are so hardy they need no care' — while resilient, poor water quality and overcrowding still cause illness and death. Regular water changes and proper stocking density are key.

careTips.zh:
1. 雌雄比例保持2:1以上，避免雄鱼过度追逐雌鱼
2. 每周换水20-25%
3. 水温保持24-26°C最佳
4. 提供水草作为幼鱼躲藏之处
5. 避免与大型鱼混养
careTips.en:
1. Keep female-to-male ratio at 2:1 or more to prevent males harassing females
2. Weekly 20-25% water change
3. Optimal temperature 24-26°C
4. Provide live plants for fry to hide in
5. Avoid mixing with larger fish

origin.zh: 泰国、柬埔寨、越南等东南亚地区
origin.en: Thailand, Cambodia, Vietnam and Southeast Asia

temperament.zh: 雄鱼对同类极具攻击性，不能与其他雄性斗鱼同缸。对主人温顺，有个性，能认出主人
temperament.en: Males are highly aggressive toward their own kind, cannot be kept with other male bettas. Gentle toward owners, have distinct personalities, and can recognize their keeper

diet.zh: 肉食性。专用斗鱼颗粒粮为主，定期补充活食（丰年虾、血虫）。每天喂1-2次，少量
diet.en: Carnivorous. Specialized betta pellets as main diet, regularly supplement with live food (brine shrimp, bloodworms). Feed 1-2 small amounts daily

habitat.zh: 能在小缸生存，但最小建议10-20升，水温24-28°C。有迷鳃器官，可直接从空气中呼吸，不需要高氧气。避免强水流
habitat.en: Can survive in small tanks, but minimum 10-20L recommended, temperature 24-28°C. Has labyrinth organ to breathe air directly, no high oxygenation needed. Avoid strong currents

appearance.zh: 颜色极为绚丽，有蓝、红、紫、绿、黄等。鱼鳍形态多变：半月形、皇冠尾、玫瑰尾等十余种。雌鱼颜色较淡、鳍较短
appearance.en: Brilliantly colorful: blue, red, purple, green, yellow. Fin types vary widely: halfmoon, crown tail, rose tail, and a dozen more. Females are duller with shorter fins

history.zh: 泰国人200年前开始用于斗鱼比赛，曾是泰国国王的赌博娱乐。19世纪末引入西方，现已成为全球最受欢迎的观赏鱼之一
history.en: Used in fighting competitions in Thailand 200 years ago, once a gambling entertainment of Thai kings. Introduced to the West in the late 19th century, now one of the world's most popular aquarium fish

funFact.zh: 斗鱼能认出镜子里的自己并对着镜子「炸鳍」展示攻击状态——但科学家发现它们同时会表现出应激反应，说明它们知道镜子里的「对手」有点不对劲🐠
funFact.en: Bettas will flare their fins at their own mirror reflection — but scientists find they also show stress responses, suggesting they somehow sense their mirror 'rival' is not quite right 🐠

myths.zh: 「斗鱼可以养在小杯子或花瓶里」——这是宠物店的营销噱头。斗鱼在小容器里水质迅速恶化，容易生病。最少需要10升，配过滤和加热棒。
myths.en: 'Bettas can live in small cups or vases' — this is a pet store marketing gimmick. Water quality degrades rapidly in tiny containers, causing illness. Minimum 10L with filter and heater is needed.

careTips.zh:
1. 不能与同性同缸，可与温和的小型鱼混养
2. 水温保持26-28°C，需加热棒
3. 每周换水25-30%
4. 不要喂太多，容易便秘
5. 提供宽敞的游泳空间和水草遮蔽
careTips.en:
1. Cannot share tank with same-sex bettas; can mix with peaceful small fish
2. Keep temperature 26-28°C, use heater
3. Weekly 25-30% water change
4. Don't overfeed — prone to constipation
5. Provide open swimming space and plants for cover

size.zh: 中型（体长15厘米，体高可达25厘米）
size.en: Medium (body length 15 cm, height up to 25 cm)

temperament.zh: 相对温和，但有领地意识。成对后会非常恩爱，共同保护卵和幼鱼。不适合与过小的鱼混养
temperament.en: Relatively peaceful but territorial. Bonded pairs are very devoted and guard eggs and fry together. Not suitable for mixing with very small fish

diet.zh: 杂食性偏肉食。专用薄片粮或颗粒粮，定期补充活食（丰年虾、红虫）和冷冻食品
diet.en: Omnivorous, leaning carnivorous. Specialized flake or pellet food, regularly supplement with live food (brine shrimp, bloodworms) and frozen foods

habitat.zh: 体型偏高，需要高型水族箱（至少60厘米高）。水温24-28°C，pH 6.0-7.5，喜软水。需水草和沉木装饰
habitat.en: Tall body shape requires tall aquarium (at least 60 cm height). Temperature 24-28°C, pH 6.0-7.5, prefers soft water. Benefits from plants and driftwood

appearance.zh: 菱形体型，背鳍和腹鳍极度延长，侧看如三角形。常见花色有银色黑条纹、全黑、大理石花纹、金色等
appearance.en: Diamond-shaped body with greatly elongated dorsal and anal fins, triangular from the side. Common patterns: silver with black stripes, all-black, marble, gold

history.zh: 1840年代进入欧洲水族市场，因其优雅的体型立刻风靡一时。现在是全球销量前5的观赏鱼，人工培育品种已达数十种
history.en: Entered the European aquarium market in the 1840s and immediately became popular for its elegant shape. Now one of the top 5 best-selling aquarium fish worldwide, with dozens of captive-bred varieties

funFact.zh: 神仙鱼是「一夫一妻制」的典范！一旦配对成功，两条鱼会终生相伴，一起照顾幼鱼。如果其中一条死去，另一条有时会长期绝食、郁郁寡欢😢
funFact.en: Angelfish are monogamous! Once paired, two fish stay together for life and raise fry jointly. If one dies, the other sometimes refuses to eat for an extended period out of grief 😢

myths.zh: 「神仙鱼可以和所有热带鱼混养」——神仙鱼会吃掉比它嘴小的鱼，也会欺负长鳍品种（如孔雀鱼）。要注意混养伙伴的选择。
myths.en: 'Angelfish can be mixed with all tropical fish' — they will eat fish small enough to fit in their mouth, and bully long-finned species like guppies. Choose tankmates carefully.

careTips.zh:
1. 水族箱至少60厘米高，200升以上
2. 保持水温26-28°C，需要加热棒
3. 每周换水25-30%
4. 成对饲养，不要单独饲养
5. 避免与小型鱼（如孔雀鱼）或攻击性鱼混养
careTips.en:
1. Aquarium at least 60 cm tall, 200L or more
2. Maintain temperature 26-28°C with heater
3. Weekly 25-30% water change
4. Keep in pairs, not alone
5. Avoid mixing with small fish (like guppies) or aggressive species

origin.zh: 亚洲（亚洲龙鱼原产东南亚）、南美洲（银龙鱼）、澳大利亚（澳洲龙鱼）
origin.en: Asia (Asian arowana native to Southeast Asia), South America (silver arowana), Australia (Australian arowana)

temperament.zh: 独行侠，领地意识极强，不与同种混养。对主人相对温顺，常在水面附近游弋，有「镇宅之鱼」的文化寓意
temperament.en: Solitary and highly territorial, cannot be housed with the same species. Relatively calm toward owners, often patrols near the water surface with cultural symbolism of good luck

diet.zh: 肉食性。幼鱼喂活食（蟋蟀、蜈蚣、小鱼）；成鱼可喂大颗粒专用粮和冷冻虾、鱼肉
diet.en: Carnivorous. Feed juveniles live food (crickets, centipedes, small fish); adults can be fed large specialized pellets and frozen shrimp/fish

habitat.zh: 需要超大型水族箱（单条龙鱼至少800-1000升，长度超过鱼身3倍）。水温26-30°C，需强效过滤。加盖防止跳缸
habitat.en: Requires very large aquarium (minimum 800-1000L per fish, length 3x the fish's size). Temperature 26-30°C, powerful filtration needed. Cover the tank tightly to prevent jumping

appearance.zh: 体型修长如剑，鳞片巨大并发出金属光泽。品种有金龙（金色）、红龙（红色）、过背金龙（最名贵）、银龙（银色）等
appearance.en: Sleek sword-like body with large metallic-sheen scales. Varieties include Golden Arowana (gold), Red Arowana (red), Crossback Golden (most prestigious), Silver Arowana (silver)

history.zh: 亚洲龙鱼是世界上最贵的观赏鱼之一，在中国和东南亚被视为财富和好运的象征。一条顶级过背金龙的价格可超过300万人民币。目前受《濒危野生动植物种国际贸易公约》（CITES）保护，合法销售的均为人工繁育
history.en: Asian arowana is one of the world's most expensive aquarium fish, symbolizing wealth and good luck in China and Southeast Asia. A top-quality crossback golden arowana can exceed 3 million RMB. Now protected by CITES; all legal trade fish are captive-bred

funFact.zh: 龙鱼是「口孵鱼」！雄鱼受精后把卵含在嘴里孵化，在长达2个月的孵化期内几乎不吃东西——真正的「父爱如山」🐉
funFact.en: Arowanas are mouthbrooders! After fertilization, the male carries eggs in his mouth for up to 2 months, barely eating during the entire incubation period — true paternal devotion 🐉

myths.zh: 「龙鱼带来好运，养得越贵越好」——龙鱼对饲养条件要求极高，养护不当反而死亡，不推荐新手贸然尝试。选择合法人工繁育个体，拒绝野外捕捉。
myths.en: 'The more expensive the arowana, the more luck it brings' — arowanas have extremely demanding care requirements and die easily without proper setup. Beginners should not attempt this. Always choose legal, captive-bred specimens.

careTips.zh:
1. 水族箱至少1000升，必须加盖（龙鱼擅长跳跃）
2. 强效过滤系统，每小时过滤量超过水体5倍
3. 水温保持26-28°C
4. 单独饲养，不与同种混养
5. 购买时要求CITES证书，确保合法来源
careTips.en:
1. At least 1000L aquarium with tight lid (arowanas are excellent jumpers)
2. Powerful filtration, 5x hourly turnover
3. Temperature 26-28°C
4. Keep alone, never with same species
5. Always request CITES certificate to ensure legal origin

origin.zh: 南美洲亚马逊流域（巴西、玻利维亚、秘鲁等）
origin.en: Amazon basin, South America (Brazil, Bolivia, Peru, etc.)

temperament.zh: 警戒性高、攻击性强，不适合作为互动宠物。即使人工繁育也保留野性，成年后难以驯服
temperament.en: Highly alert and aggressive; not suitable as an interactive pet. Even captive-bred individuals retain wild instincts and become very difficult to handle as adults

diet.zh: 肉食性。幼体喂鱼、小虾、虫类；成体喂整条鱼、鸡、鼠类。需要完整的猎物保证营养
diet.en: Carnivorous. Juveniles fed fish, small shrimp, insects; adults fed whole fish, chicken, rodents. Whole prey items needed for proper nutrition

habitat.zh: 需要超大型室内池（至少3×2米水陆两用空间），水温28-32°C，空气温度26-32°C，UVB灯必备。必须加装安全锁
habitat.en: Requires very large indoor enclosure (minimum 3×2m with land and water zones), water temp 28-32°C, air temp 26-32°C, UVB lighting essential. Secure locks mandatory

appearance.zh: 体型紧凑，吻部短宽，皮肤呈深棕色或橄榄绿色，背部有明显的骨质鳞甲（鳞盾）。是世界上最小的鳄鱼品种
appearance.en: Compact build with short, broad snout, dark brown to olive green skin, prominent bony osteoderms on back. The world's smallest crocodilian species

history.zh: 侏儒凯门鳄是世界最小鳄鱼，但「小」是相对而言。1990年代开始作为异宠进入欧美市场，因「幼体可爱」被冲动购买后大量遗弃，引发严重的动物保护问题
history.en: The dwarf caiman is the world's smallest crocodilian — but 'small' is relative. Entered the exotic pet market in the 1990s; many were impulsively bought as cute juveniles then abandoned as adults, causing serious animal welfare issues

funFact.zh: 侏儒凯门鳄的皮肤比其他鳄鱼更硬、骨化程度更高，这让它们在皮革市场价值较低，反而成为少数鳄鱼种群数量相对稳定的原因——「太硬了没人想做包」保护了它们😂
funFact.en: Dwarf caimans have the toughest, most ossified skin of any crocodilian — making them less valuable to the leather industry. This is actually a key reason their population is relatively stable: 'too hard for handbags' saved them 😂

myths.zh: 「侏儒凯门鳄是最小的鳄鱼，幼体很可爱，好养」——幼体只有20厘米很可爱，但成体超过1.5米，咬合力惊人，全国多省需要申请特殊许可证才能饲养。
myths.en: 'Dwarf caimans are small, cute, and easy to keep' — juveniles are only 20 cm, but adults exceed 1.5 m with powerful bites. Many regions require special permits to keep them legally.

careTips.zh:
1. 饲养前必须了解当地法规，部分地区需要野生动物饲养许可证
2. 饲养箱需要安全锁，防止逃跑
3. 喂食时使用长柄夹子，不要用手直接喂
4. 定期紫外线灯照射（12小时光照周期）
5. 不建议新手和有儿童的家庭饲养
careTips.en:
1. Research local laws first — many regions require exotic animal permits
2. Enclosure must have secure locks to prevent escape
3. Feed with long tongs, never by hand
4. Regular UVB exposure (12-hour light cycle)
5. Not recommended for beginners or families with children

origin.zh: 中国（安徽、江苏、浙江等长江下游地区）
origin.en: China (Anhui, Jiangsu, Zhejiang and other lower Yangtze regions)

temperament.zh: 相对温驯（与美洲鳄鱼相比），但仍是危险动物。行动缓慢，冬眠期长达5-6个月（10月到次年4月）
temperament.en: Relatively calm compared to American crocodilians, but still dangerous. Slow-moving; hibernates for 5-6 months (October to April)

diet.zh: 肉食性偏软食。主食贝类、蜗牛、蛙类、鱼类。牙齿不适合撕扯，喜欢整体吞咽
diet.en: Carnivorous, preferring soft prey. Mainly mollusks, snails, frogs, fish. Teeth are not designed for tearing; prefers swallowing prey whole

habitat.zh: 原产温带，是极少能耐受低温的鳄鱼之一，可在10°C以下冬眠。需要水陆两用大型围栏，有冬眠条件（低温泥穴）
habitat.en: Native to temperate climate, one of the very few crocodilians that tolerate cold; hibernates below 10°C. Requires large enclosure with land and water areas, plus winter hibernation conditions (cool mud burrow)

appearance.zh: 体型较小，全身暗灰色或黑色，腹部浅色。头部宽扁，吻部短圆，与美国短吻鳄非常相似（两者是近亲）
appearance.en: Relatively small, dark gray or black overall with pale underside. Broad, flat head with short rounded snout, closely resembling the American alligator (they are close relatives)

history.zh: 扬子鳄是中国「龙」传说的重要原型之一，已知在长江流域生存超过1亿年。目前野生种群仅剩约200条，是极度濒危物种（IUCN CR级）。人工繁育种群约有1万条
history.en: The Chinese alligator is believed to be one of the inspirations for Chinese dragon legends and has lived in the Yangtze for over 100 million years. Only ~200 wild individuals remain — Critically Endangered (IUCN CR). Captive population is about 10,000

funFact.zh: 扬子鳄冬眠时会钻进泥洞里，挖掘的洞穴系统非常复杂，有多个出入口、卧室和「通气孔」——就像一栋迷你地下别墅🐊 中国古人看到它从地里钻出来，真的以为是神龙现身！
funFact.en: Chinese alligators dig elaborate burrow systems for hibernation with multiple entrances, chambers, and 'air shafts' — like a tiny underground mansion 🐊 Ancient Chinese seeing them emerge from the earth genuinely believed they were witnessing a divine dragon!

myths.zh: 「扬子鳄是中国特有，可以合法购买作为宠物」——扬子鳄是国家一级保护动物，私人非法持有属于刑事犯罪。即使是人工繁育个体也需要特别资质才能持有。
myths.en: 'Chinese alligators are native to China and can be legally purchased as pets' — the Chinese alligator is a Class I protected species; illegal private possession is a criminal offense. Even captive-bred individuals require special authorization.

careTips.zh:
1. ⚠️ 严禁私人非法饲养，国家一级保护动物
2. 合法机构饲养需要完整的水陆两用大型围栏
3. 提供冬眠条件（低温泥穴，水温可降至5-10°C）
4. 以贝类、蛙类、鱼类为主食
5. 定期健康检查，与专业兽医合作
careTips.en:
1. ⚠️ Strictly prohibited for private ownership — Class I protected species in China
2. Legal facilities require large enclosures with both land and water zones
3. Provide hibernation conditions (cool mud burrow, water down to 5-10°C)
4. Main diet of mollusks, frogs, and fish
5. Regular health checks with specialized veterinarians

origin.zh: 东南亚（泰国、柬埔寨、越南、印度尼西亚等）
origin.en: Southeast Asia (Thailand, Cambodia, Vietnam, Indonesia, etc.)

temperament.zh: 相对温顺（与湾鳄相比），但仍是危险的大型爬行动物。幼体偶有人工繁育个体在专业机构展示
temperament.en: Relatively calm compared to saltwater crocodiles, but still a dangerous large reptile. Juveniles occasionally displayed in professional institutions

diet.zh: 肉食性。主食鱼类、青蛙、小型哺乳动物、水鸟。成体可捕食较大猎物
diet.en: Carnivorous. Mainly fish, frogs, small mammals, water birds. Adults can take larger prey

habitat.zh: 淡水鳄，栖息于低地湿地、河流、湖泊。水温26-32°C，需要大型水陆两用围栏和UVB照明。专业机构才能饲养
habitat.en: Freshwater crocodile, inhabits lowland wetlands, rivers, lakes. Water temp 26-32°C, requires large water-land enclosure and UVB lighting. Professional facilities only

appearance.zh: 体型修长，吻部较宽，颜色呈橄榄绿到深褐色。背部骨质鳞甲明显，腹部颜色较浅。与湾鳄相比吻部更宽、体型更小
appearance.en: Slender build with broad snout, olive green to dark brown coloring. Prominent dorsal scutes, paler underside. Broader snout and smaller than saltwater crocodile

history.zh: 暹罗鳄曾广泛分布于东南亚，但由于栖息地破坏和皮革贸易，野生种群几乎灭绝，IUCN列为极危（CR）。目前估计野生个体不足1000条，但泰国等国人工繁育种群超过10万条，主要用于皮革产业
history.en: Once widespread across Southeast Asia, wild populations were nearly wiped out by habitat loss and the leather trade — listed as Critically Endangered (IUCN CR). Wild population estimated under 1,000, but captive populations in Thailand exceed 100,000, mainly for the leather industry

funFact.zh: 暹罗鳄是出了名的「好爸爸」！雄鳄会在巢穴旁守护整个孵化期，小鳄鱼出壳时会发出叫声，雄鳄会用嘴轻轻把它们含出来带到水里——凶猛的鳄鱼展示出温柔的父性🐊
funFact.en: Siamese crocodiles are famously devoted fathers! Males guard the nest throughout incubation; when hatchlings call out, the father gently carries them in his mouth to water — a fierce predator showing tender paternal care 🐊

myths.zh: 「暹罗鳄比湾鳄温顺，可以当宠物养」——即使是相对温顺的暹罗鳄，成体依然是极危险的动物，攻击力足以致命，绝非普通宠物。
myths.en: 'Siamese crocodiles are gentle enough to keep as pets' — even the relatively calm Siamese crocodile is extremely dangerous as an adult, with lethal potential. Absolutely not a regular pet.

careTips.zh:
1. ⚠️ 极度濒危物种，饲养需要CITES许可及国家批准
2. 专业机构才具备饲养条件
3. 需要大型室内外复合围栏，防逃措施严格
4. 以整条鱼为主食，补充其他肉类
5. 定期与专业爬行动物兽医合作进行健康检查
careTips.en:
1. ⚠️ Critically endangered species — keeping requires CITES permit and national approval
2. Only professional facilities have appropriate housing
3. Large indoor/outdoor enclosure with strict escape prevention
4. Mainly whole fish, supplemented with other meats
5. Regular health checks with specialist reptile veterinarians

origin.zh: 非洲撒哈拉以南地区及马达加斯加

size.zh: 大型（3.5-5米，最大记录超过6米，重达700公斤）
size.en: Large (3.5-5 m, record over 6 m, up to 700 kg)

temperament.zh: 极度凶猛、领地意识极强。是非洲最危险的动物之一，每年造成的人员伤亡超过河马。不可能作为宠物
temperament.en: Extremely aggressive and highly territorial. One of Africa's most dangerous animals, responsible for more human fatalities annually than hippos. Impossible to keep as a pet

diet.zh: 肉食性。几乎捕食一切靠近水源的动物：鱼、角马、斑马、水牛，甚至狮子和大象幼崽。咬合力是动物界最强之一
